title: Anshan Country Club ( Take Anhai Road south out of the Anshan city just after Tangangzi
content: Planning hint: Anshan Country Club ( Take Anhai Road south out of the Anshan city just after Tangangzi, take a left where signposted A Country Club and 18 hole golf course on the south side of the city near Tangangzi

title: Anshan Qianshan Ski Centre ( Near Qianshan National Park
content: Planning hint: The centre also has snow mobiles, quad bikes and rubber ring slides for the kids After skiing, you can relax in the mixed-sex outdoor hot spring spa included in the

title: Skating ( In 219 park or Lieshishan park
content: Planning hint: If you bring your own shoes it is free or you can hire skates for a modest fee During winter you can skate on the lakes in the parks

title: Fu Shi Ting ( Several branches in the city
content: Food planning hint: Fu Shi Ting ( Several branches in the city, Shengli Road near No.2 middle school, Next to Gaungdu School, west of Leishishan park, and Yuanlin Road just south of No.9 Middle School ) Japanese fast food restaurant with set meals at low

title: Jullette Cafe ( Qi Yue Kafe ), Zhonghua Street
content: Food planning hint: ( Between Qingnian and Wenhua Street on Zhonghua Street in the centre of the city Jullette Cafe ( Qi Yue Kafe ), Zhonghua Street

title: Pizza house , Tiedong Wodao Jie ( Behind No.2 middle school (Er Zhong Xue)
content: Food planning hint: Serves a variety of pizzas as well as steaks Pizza house , Tiedong Wodao Jie ( Behind No.2 middle school (Er Zhong Xue)

title: San Bao BBQ , Yuanlin Road ( Just south of No.9 Middles School )
content: Food planning hint: San Bao BBQ , Yuanlin Road ( Just south of No.9 Middles School ) The town has dozens of Korean BBQ restaurants

title: San Bao Wan Chai , Two branches
content: Food planning hint: San Bao Wan Chai , Two branches: Yuanlin Lu and 219 Road ( Opposite No.9 Middle School and near the TV station Rice porridge, dim sum and dumplings Hong Kong style

title: Savour Life Coffee Shop , Shengli South Street ( Near to No.2 Middle School
content: Food planning hint: Savour Life Coffee Shop , Shengli South Street ( Near to No.2 Middle School Popular with the young professionals and foreigners

title: Sun Club ( Off of Dongshan Street, near Silong shopping centre
content: Planning hint: Sun Club ( Off of Dongshan Street, near Silong shopping centre They have a live band playing every night from 9pm

title: 219 Park , Yuanlin Lu, Anshan
content: Visit planning hint: The area is very popular with the local people who can frequently be seen exercising, dancing, singing, playing music and practicing taichi in the grounds - especially in the early morning of mid evening The park contains woodland areas around a series of lakes

title: Aviary ( Inside Qianshan park, near to the Matria Buddha cable car )
content: Visit planning hint: A large netted complex within which a huge variety of birds may be observed Aviary ( Inside Qianshan park, near to the Matria Buddha cable car )

title: Jade Buddha Temple ( 鞍山玉佛苑 ) ( Enter either by the gate on Qianshan
content: Visit planning hint: Jade Buddha Temple ( 鞍山玉佛苑 ) ( Enter either by the gate on Qianshan Lu Road, near Dongshan, or through 219 park from Yuanlin Lu Road ) Claiming to be the world's largest jade statue of the Buddha and carved form the world's largest single piece of jade stone, at almost 8 meters high and weighing in at 260.76 tons, this is an impressive sight

title: Lieshishan Park , Shengli Lu, Anshan
content: Visit planning hint: If the steps look too daunting, there is a gentle path to the east side of the entrance that will spiral up to the top ( From the train station, follow Eryijiu Lu (219 Road) due east to Shengli Square

title: Mengtai Park , Jianguo Street, Lishan, Anshan
content: Visit planning hint: The park includes an attractive lake behind which run a crescent shaped ridge of hills ( From train station, go east along 219 Road, turn left onto Zhonghua Street and follow this road till its conclusion

title: Yongle Park , Mingsheng Road, Anshan
content: Visit planning hint: Yongle Park , Mingsheng Road, Anshan A small park in the west end of the city

title: Bike through the hutongs
content: Planning hint: Bike through the hutongs Exploring the remaining hutongs by bicycle is a fantastic way to experience Beijing firsthand Cesar from Barcelona, a top hutong aficionado, organizes biking tours of the hutongs in English and Spanish

title: Get a foot massage
content: Planning hint: Get a foot massage Have a highly enjoyable and relaxing foot massage and/or pedicure etc (for a fraction of the

title: Hiking, camping, and tobogganing on the Great Wall
content: Planning hint: Hiking, camping, and tobogganing on the Great Wall There are numerous hiking options available on the Great Wall, with various tours and groups offering guided experiences, such as the well-established but expensive tour operator Beijing Hikers A recommended overnight camping spot can be arranged by visiting the village of Chenjiapu in Yanqing District , where the Chen family at Great Wall Fresh offers homestays and tent rentals

title: Houhai
content: Planning hint: Houhai in Xicheng District is a bar area located on Houhai Lake, west of the Bell and Drum Towers; once thriving but popularity has faded since the 2000s

title: Ladies' Street
content: Planning hint: Ladies' Street in Chaoyang District is a small bar area near the third embassy area

title: Nanluoguxiang and surrounding hutongs
content: Planning hint: Nanluoguxiang and surrounding hutongs in Dongcheng District located in the middle of the hutongs in the Gulou neighborhood, east of the Drum and Bell Towers; finding hard to locate bars in a maze of hutong alleys is one of the unique pleasures of nightlife in Beijing

title: Sanlitun
content: Planning hint: It is also the hub of Beijing's LGBT community, and home to the largest concentration of gay bars in the city Sanlitun in Chaoyang District been the centre of nightlife in Beijing for a long time

title: Workers Stadium
content: Planning hint: Workers Stadium in Chaoyang District and adjacent to Sanlitun; clubs line the east side of the stadium complex

title: 1 The inaugural line going east-west
content: District movement hint: 1 The inaugural line going east-west, passing through popular sites like the Forbidden City, Tian'anmen Square, Wangfujing, and Universal Resort

title: 4 A north-south route to the west of the Central Axis
content: District movement hint: 4 A north-south route to the west of the Central Axis, linking the Old Summer Palace, Peking University, Renmin University, Beijing Zoo and Beijing South Railway Station

title: 5 A north-south line located east of the Central Axis
content: District movement hint: 5 A north-south line located east of the Central Axis, with stops at Yonghegong (Lama Temple), the Temple of Heaven, and hutong areas in between

title: An east-west line that passes through Worker's Stadium in the Sanlitun area
content: Transfer hub hint: An east-west line that passes through Worker's Stadium in the Sanlitun area, the commercial and entertainment hub of the city

title: Changchun World Sculpture Park ( 长春世界雕塑公园; Chángchūn Shìjiè Diāosù Gōn
content: Planning hint: Changchun World Sculpture Park ( 长春世界雕塑公园; Chángchūn Shìjiè Diāosù Gōngyuán ), 9518 Renmin Street, Nanguan District (南关区人民大街9518号) ( Municipal Government Station, Metro Line 1; bus routes 28, 161, and CNY 30 to enter the park, CNY 30 to enter the sculpture museum and CNY 30 to enter the African art museum

title: Changchun Zoo and Botanical Garden ( 长春动植物园 )
content: Planning hint: Changchun Zoo and Botanical Garden ( 长春动植物园 ), 2121 Ziyou Avenue, Nanguan District (南关区自由大路2121号) ( the South Gate is 700 m east of Exit B of the Northeast Normal University Station on Metro Line 1; you can also take bus no

title: Longtou Mountain
content: Planning hint: These hills contain ancient Tombs including the Mausoleum of Princess Zhenxiao and royal tombs of the Balhae kingdom It is in Yanbian Korean Autonomous Prefecture

title: Northeast Tiger Park ( 东北虎园 )
content: Planning hint: Besides tigers, the park also has a variety of other animals, including pandas, lions, black bears, brown bears, Tibetan mastiffs, ponies, reindeers, alpaca, sika deer, peacocks, white cranes, ostriches, emus, vultures and many other species Northeast Tiger Park ( 东北虎园 ), 10500 Jingyue Street, Nanguan District (南关区净月大街10500号) ( the entrance is about 640 m south of Changyingshijicheng Station on Metro Line

title: Shengli Park ( 胜利公园 )
content: Planning hint: Shengli Park ( 胜利公园 ), Intersection of Renmin Street and Beijing Street, Kuancheng District (宽城区人民大街与北京大街交会处) ( Shengli Park Station, Metro Line 1 ) The park offers activities such as a petting zoo and bumper cars (summer) and a frozen pond for skating (winter)

title: Ferryport
content: Planning hint: This bar is located on Changqing Jie and Guilin Hutong in the Guilin Lu section of Changchun Small dark place with music in the evenings

title: German Brauhaus ( 1 block W of Kangping St/Xi'an Da Lu intersection
content: Planning hint: German Brauhaus ( 1 block W of Kangping St/Xi'an Da Lu intersection, on W side of Qingyun St ) Serve Flensburger beer exclusively

title: Old Ship Bar ( 老船吧 )
content: Planning hint: Serves beer and other beverages, has indoor barbecue features for seafood as well as other types of barbecue, Western flavors, a cheerful atmosphere and melodious music Old Ship Bar ( 老船吧 ), Between Jingcheng Street and Anshun Road

title: Puppet Manchukuo government's Agricultural Department ( 伪满兴农部旧址 )
content: Visit planning hint: Puppet Manchukuo government's Agricultural Department ( 伪满兴农部旧址 ), 8 Ziyou Avenue, Chaoyang District (朝阳区自由大路8号) ( about 960 m west of the Northeast Normal University Station on Metro Line 1 ) Now it is the Northeast Normal University's affiliate high school

title: Puppet Manchukuo government's Culture and Education Department ( 伪满
content: Visit planning hint: Puppet Manchukuo government's Culture and Education Department ( 伪满洲国文教部旧址 ), 696 Ziyou Avenue, Chaoyang District (朝阳区自由大路696号) ( about 820 m west of the Northeast Normal University Station on Metro Line 1 ) Now it is the Northeast Normal University's affiliate primary school

title: Puppet Manchukuo government's Economics Department ( 伪满经济部 )
content: Visit planning hint: Puppet Manchukuo government's Economics Department ( 伪满经济部 ), 829 Xinmin Street, Chaoyang District (朝阳区新民大街829号) ( about 800 m south of Wenhua Square Station on Metro Line 2; use Exit C ) Now it is Jilin University's No.3 Bethune Hospital

title: Puppet Manchukuo government's Foreign Affairs Department ( 伪满洲国外交部旧址
content: Visit planning hint: Puppet Manchukuo government's Foreign Affairs Department ( 伪满洲国外交部旧址 ), 1122 Jianshe Street, Chaoyang District (朝阳区建设街1122号) ( about 730 m east of Nanchanglu Station on Metro Line 3 ) Now it is a Traditional Chinese Medicine clinic operated by the Moii Group

title: Puppet Manchukuo government's Justice Department ( 伪满洲国司法部旧址 )
content: Visit planning hint: Puppet Manchukuo government's Justice Department ( 伪满洲国司法部旧址 ), 828 Xinmin Street, Chaoyang District (朝阳区新民大街828号) ( about 800 m south of Wenhua Square Station on Metro Line 2; use Exit C ) Now it is Jilin University's Bethune Medical Department

title: Puppet Manchukuo government's Military Department ( 伪满洲国军事部旧址 )
content: Visit planning hint: Puppet Manchukuo government's Military Department ( 伪满洲国军事部旧址 ), 71 Xinmin Street, Chaoyang District (朝阳区新民大街71号) ( just outside Exit C of Wenhua Square Station on Metro Line 2 ) Now it is Jilin University's No.1 Bethune Hospital

title: G240
content: District movement hint: 2nd Experimental Middle School(市二实验中学）via Satellite Square (卫星广场)&Culture Square (文化广场)&Guilin Road (桂林路)to Tram Company(电车公司)

title: G362
content: Arrival advice: From the train station to Hongqi Street (红旗街), Chongqing Road (重庆路) and Guilin Road (桂林路)

title: K306
content: Arrival advice: Busy route that goes north-south along Renmin Avenue (人民大街) from the train station to Changchun University (长春大学)

title: Changsha Walking Street ( 长沙步行街 )
content: Food planning hint: Changsha Walking Street ( 长沙步行街 ) See Do section for details

title: Huo Gong Dian ( 火宫殿; lit
content: Food planning hint: You might enjoy Choudoufu ( stinky tofu ), Changsha Doupi, Pineapple bread (contains chunks and similar to some Indian breads), Yangrou Chuar (lamb kebabs), Niurou (beef in baskets, relatively fat-free), corn soup and vegetables which are cooked in front of you Huo Gong Dian ( 火宫殿; lit: The Fire Palace ), 78 Pozi St (坡子街) ( behind Wal-Mart, on the snack street )

title: Stinky tofu
content: Food planning hint: Stinky tofu is a classic traditional snack in Changsha It is recommended to go to Black Classic to buy the most authentic stinky tofu

title: Taiping Old Street ( 太平老街 )
content: Food planning hint: The old houses and narrow side alleys offer photo opportunities, and there are a few shops for souvenirs (packaged snacks, porcellain, etc.) There's also a workshop where you can try pottery Taiping Old Street ( 太平老街 ), 五一大道与太平街交叉口西南50米 ( between Wuyi Square (五一广场) and the river, south of Wuyi Dadao (五一大道) street )

title: FeeTel Inns Changsha
content: Best used as a stay area because FeeTel Inns Changsha , Wuyi St, Furong District (芙蓉区, 五一大道) ( near the corner of Huangxing Zhong Rd (黄兴中路) )

title: The Orange Isle Art Inn , Near Orange Isle Park
content: Representative stay option: A small, design-focused guesthouse with rooms themed around Hunan's art scene Offers a peaceful, creative atmosphere just steps away from the Xiang River

title: Yuelu Shan Youth Hostel ( 岳麓山国际青年旅舍 ), Villa No
content: Representative stay option: Yuelu Shan Youth Hostel ( 岳麓山国际青年旅舍 ), Villa No 1, Lushan Huaqiaocun, 50 Xinmin Rd (新民路50号麓山华侨村1号别墅) ( in a courtyard behind Yangcheng Restaurant (Yángchéng Cānguăn hòumiàn), in Yuèlù, west of the Xiang river )

title: Bean Aroma Coffee Roasters , Yuelu District
content: Planning hint: A hidden cafe focusing on single-origin beans from Yunnan, roasted in-house A quiet escape from the city's bustle, popular with local students and artists

title: Changsha Museum ( 长沙博物馆
content: Visit planning hint: Changsha Museum ( 长沙博物馆, Changsha Municipal Museum ), 3 Binjiang Culture Park, Xinhe Delta, Kaifu District (开福区新河三角洲滨江文化园3号) ( Bus nos The nearest metro station is the Beichen Delta metro station on Line 1, which is about 1 km from the museum )

title: Hunan Embroidery Museum ( 湖南湘绣博物馆 Xiang Xiu Bowuguan )
content: Visit planning hint: Hunan Embroidery Museum ( 湖南湘绣博物馆 Xiang Xiu Bowuguan ), 39 Chezhan North Road, Furong District (芙蓉区车站北路39号) ( about 700 metres north of Changsha Railway Station metro station on Line 2; Bus routes 101, 112, 139, 148, 202, 263, 408, 501 North, 501 South, 602, 701 and group bookings) This museum is on the second floor of a store that sells high-quality embroidery

title: Hunan Science and Technology Museum ( 湖南省科技馆 )
content: Visit planning hint: Hunan Science and Technology Museum ( 湖南省科技馆 ), 9 Muchong West Road, Tianxin District (天心区杉木冲西路9号) ( directly south of Exit 2 of the Provincial Government metro station on Line 1 ) The museum consists of two separate buildings: Buildings A & B

title: Longping Rice Museum ( 隆平水稻博物馆 )
content: Visit planning hint: Museum founded in 2019 by the late Yuan Longping, a famous Chinese agronomist known as the 'Father of Hybrid Rice' for having developed the first hybrid rice varieties in the 1970s The museum has exhibitions on the history, culture and science of rice cultivation, as well as an exhibition on Yuan Longping and his achievements

title: The Geological Museum of Hunan ( 湖南省地质博物馆 )
content: Visit planning hint: The Geological Museum of Hunan ( 湖南省地质博物馆 ), 49 Shanmuchong West Road, Tianxin District (天心区杉木冲西路49号) ( about 800 m southwest of the Provincial Government metro station on Line 1; a short distance west of the Hunan Science and Technology Museum ) Foreign visitors should register at the enquiries desk before entering the exhibition halls

title: Xie Zilong Photography Museum ( 谢子龙影像艺术馆 ), No
content: Visit planning hint: Xie Zilong Photography Museum ( 谢子龙影像艺术馆 ), No 387, Yanghu Street, Xiaoxiang South Road, Yuelu District ( Yanghu Wetland Station of Metro Line 3 )

title: Line 2 (east-west)
content: Transfer hub hint: Line 2 (east-west) - Connects the Changsha Railway Station, Changsha South Railway Station, and West Bus Station (Wangchengpo stop) There is also a stop for Juzizhou

title: Line 3 (Southwest to Northeast)-It starts from Shantang Station
content: District movement hint: Line 3 (Southwest to Northeast)-It starts from Shantang Station, passes through Yuelu District, Tianxin District, Kaifu District, Furong District, Yuhua District and Changsha County in Changsha City, and ends at Guangsheng Station

title: Line 4 (northwest to southeast)-Changsha Rail Transit Line 4 starts from Guanling Station
content: Transfer hub hint: The town commercial center, and other important urban functional centers and hub areas end at Dujiaping Station Line 4 (northwest to southeast)-Changsha Rail Transit Line 4 starts from Guanling Station and passes through various districts in Changsha City, connecting three major scenic spots including Han Dynasty Tomb Relics Park, Yuelu Mountain and Moon Island, three major universities and Yuelu Mountain International University Science and Technology City, and connecting to Wangchengqing Bay

title: Line 5 (north-south)-Changsha Rail Transit Line 5 starts from Maozhutang Station and ends
content: District movement hint: Line 5 (north-south)-Changsha Rail Transit Line 5 starts from Maozhutang Station and ends at Shuiduhe Station

title: Grandma's Nook
content: Food planning hint: Grandma's Nook , Xin Cheng Shang Jie A-183, 60 Hua Yuan Jie, Hutang M-Th 12:00 - 20:00, F-Su 10:00 - 21:00

title: Long Yin ( 龙隐•香缇湾 • 常州菜 ), 1st Floor, China International Sensing Valley, No
content: Food planning hint: 2, Innovation 1st Road, Longhutang Street Long Yin ( 龙隐•香缇湾 • 常州菜 ), 1st Floor, China International Sensing Valley, No

content: Food planning hint: Sweet Peach ( 蜜桃餐厅•伴山(环球港店) ), 3F, Jiangnan Global Harbor Performance Hall, No 598, Tongjiang Middle Road

title: 320Life ( 320Life(钟CNY 店) ), 3-110 Richmond City Mall, South Avenue
content: Planning hint: 320Life ( 320Life(钟CNY 店) ), 3-110 Richmond City Mall, South Avenue

title: Queen Pub , Heping North Rd
content: Planning hint: The barman speaks good English and stocks quite a few imported beer and spirits Queen Pub , Heping North Rd

title: Shi Li Yang Chang ( 十里洋场 ), Shop No
content: Planning hint: Shi Li Yang Chang ( 十里洋场 ), Shop No 1-6, Qingguo Lane Historical and Cultural Block

title: Xi Live House ( 熹LIVE HOUSE(亚细亚店) ), 4 / F, Asia Cinema, No
content: Planning hint: Xi Live House ( 熹LIVE HOUSE(亚细亚店) ), 4 / F, Asia Cinema, No

title: Changzhou Museum ( 常州博物馆 )
content: Visit planning hint: Changzhou Museum ( 常州博物馆 ), 1288 Longcheng Avenue, Xinbei District (新北区龙城大道1288号) ( on the west side of Changzhou Civic Square 760 m from the Civic Square metro station on Line 1; bus routes 24, 213 and b12 stop just outside the museum ) Tu-Su 09:00-17:00, no entry after 16:00, closed on Mondays

title: SUPcz ( Art Districts in Changzhou
content: Visit planning hint: SUPcz ( Art Districts in Changzhou, China ) ( various locations around CZ ) "Artists Co-op" in Changzhou

title: Song Dynasty pillars , YanLing Middle Rd ( 100 m south of Dong Po Park )
content: Visit planning hint: Fragments of a pair of pillars from a long ago destroyed temple sit next to a minor canal parallel to the YanLing Rd Dating from 979, they are estimated to have once been 5m tall but the ravages of time have reduced the tallest to about 2m and the other only a base

title: The Lotus Building ( 江苏常州武进莲花馆 ) ( in the suburbs of Wujin )
content: Visit planning hint: Built on an artificial lake, this building is in the shape of a lotus flower The building consists of three lotus flowers in different shapes while the main body and the petals are made of steel

title: Tianning Temple ( 天宁寺 Tianning Si )
content: Visit planning hint: Tianning Temple ( 天宁寺 Tianning Si ), 636 Yanling Middle Road, Tianning District (天宁区延陵中路636号) ( a few hundred meters east of the Culture Palace metro station; bus routes 220 and A Buddhist temple with a 13 story wooden Pagoda said to be the tallest in the world

title: Yancheng Safari Park ( 淹城野生动物世界 )
content: Visit planning hint: Yancheng Safari Park ( 淹城野生动物世界 ), 199 Wuyi Middle Road, Wujin District (武进区武宜中路199号) ( take bus B1 to Yancheng Central Public Bus Terminal (淹城公交中心站); alternatively take a metro train to Yanzheng Avenue metro station and head west to Wujin Civic Square to catch the Jinhu bus line (金湖线), which stops just outside the park ) Visitors who wish to drive their own vehicle through the park are charged an extra CNY 200 if they have between 1 and 9 passengers or CNY 400 if they have more than 10 passengers

Transfer hub hint: 2 Starts at bus terminus attached to the new northern train and long distance bus station and rattles down almost the entire length of Heping Lu and around the university town in the south

title: Chunxi Road ( 春熙路 )
content: Planning hint: If you are looking for stores in the same vein as Louis Vuitton and Ermenegildo Zegna, these stores are located at Chengdu IFS, which is nearer to the metro station than Chunxi Road itself It is a good place to find something to eat, as you can find a great variety including hotpot buffets, Japanese restaurants and Western food

title: Drink tea , Renmin Park (People's Park)
content: Planning hint: Not for the faint hearted, take the opportunity to have your ears cleaned by local "experts" armed with a tuning fork and a myriad of "insertion tools" On a sunny afternoon pick a table in the park with an out-door tea house and sip your tea while listening to the locals gossiping

title: Floraland ( 国色天乡 )
content: Planning hint: Floraland ( 国色天乡 ), Wanchun Town, Wenjiang District (温江区万春镇) ( Take a train to Wansheng Station on Metro Line 4, exit the station via Exits A or B, then catch bus no The park includes a moderate selection of rides (water, relaxing and thrill), and various recreation activities

title: Foot and body Massage
content: Planning hint: Generally, these places cater to groups of people who come in together, relax in a private room, perhaps eating fruit, pig ear, or sipping tea, while receiving a fully-clothed massage or foot washing Some places offer CNY 25 per hour for a very nice foot massage, including washing, soaking and massaging feet, free hot/cold drink (tea, coke or juice), fresh fruit

title: New Century Global Center (Chengdu Global Center) ( 新世纪环球中心（成都环球中心）
content: Planning hint: 1700, North Section of Tianfu Avenue, Wuhou District ( traffic: New Century Global Center has more than 20 bus routes, including Chengdu bus 74, Chengdu bus 74, Chengdu bus 125 express, Chengdu bus 125 express, Chengdu bus 171A, Chengdu bus 171B, Chengdu bus 188 New Century Global Centre consists of New Century Global Shopping Centre, Ocean Paradise, Intercontinental Hotel, Central Business City and Music Fountain Plaza, etc.; It is divided into four districts, namely, East, West, South and North, and the main body of the building is made of sea-blue colour, with white floating boards articulating the undulating body of the building into a whole

title: Play Weiqi (the game of Go)
content: Planning hint: As a symbol of Chinese culture, Weiqi is one of the world's great strategy games where a few simple rules lead to limitless possibilities Chengdu Weiqi Classroom is the only place where foreigners can study this game with English speaking assistance

title: Read a Book
content: Planning hint: The Chengdu Bookworm (see listing in the Eat Section) has a membership-based lending library of English language books, as well as travel guides for sale Peter's Tex Mex, as well as some of the other restaurants that cater to foreigners, have book exchanges

title: 成都漆器工艺体验工坊 ( Chengdu Lacquerware Craft Workshop )
content: Planning hint: A workshop where you can learn about the intricate art of Chengdu lacquerware, a national intangible cultural heritage Under master guidance, you can try your hand at polishing or painting a small piece, creating a unique souvenir
tags: 成都漆器工艺体验工坊

title: Fiesta Thai
content: Food planning hint: Specializes in Thai cuisine Fiesta Thai , Linjiang Zhong Lu 6, Right beside Traffic Hotel and the 902 Panda Base Bus Stop

title: Hai Di Lao Hot Pot
content: Food planning hint: Usually offered in small or large sizes, a small size will cost about CNY 40 and feed 3 or 4 people Hai Di Lao Hot Pot Lanzhou beef noodles ( 兰州拉面 Lánzhōu lāmiàn ), Located everywhere

title: Hokkaido Japanese Restaurant ( 北海道日本料理 )
content: Food planning hint: Hokkaido Japanese Restaurant ( 北海道日本料理 ), Various locations throughout the city ( Locations include Chunxi Rd (春熙路), Yulin S Rd (玉林南路), outside of Sichuan University (Near Cafe Paname), and more ) Meals range from CNY 20 upwards, expect a plate of sushi to be quite a bit more expensive, but sides are generally decent priced

title: Mingting Restaurant
content: Food planning hint: 26, Jinniu District (成都市金牛区外曹家巷26号附14) A very popular Sichuan restaurant with outdoor seating Mingting Restaurant (明婷饭店), Waicaojia Alley No

title: Namaste/Afila ( 亚非拉-娜玛什蒂印度餐吧 )
content: Food planning hint: Specializes in Indian and Nepalese cuisine, particularly tandoori and curries Namaste/Afila ( 亚非拉-娜玛什蒂印度餐吧 ), 20 Remin Nan Rd, Section 4, Wuhou District (武侯区人民南路四段20号)

title: Steamed buns ( 包子; baozi )
content: Food planning hint: Yagcai bao (芽菜包) is a local Sichuan special variety you are unlikely to find elsewhere and typically contains some mixture of Yacai (芽菜), a type of preserved vegetable, and potentially some meat Sold for breakfast or lunch from street vendors throughout the city

title: Wenshu Temple Vegetarian Restaurant ( 文殊院素餐馆 )
content: Food planning hint: Offers a huge selection of traditional vegetarian dishes, including some containing imitated meat Wenshu Temple Vegetarian Restaurant ( 文殊院素餐馆 ), 15 Wenshu St (文殊院街15号)

title: Wenshu Temple Vegetarian Restaurant ( 文殊院素餐馆 ), 15 Wenshu St (文殊院街15号)
content: Food planning hint: Offers a huge selection of traditional vegetarian dishes, including some containing imitated meat Wenshu Temple Vegetarian Restaurant ( 文殊院素餐馆 ), 15 Wenshu St (文殊院街15号)

title: Chengdu Mix Hostel ( 成都驴友记青年旅舍 )
content: Representative stay option: Chengdu Mix Hostel ( 成都驴友记青年旅舍 ), 23 Xinghui W Rd, Renjiawan, Wanfu Bridge ( In downtown near Wenshu Temple ) The staff all seem somewhere around twenty

title: Chengdu Wenjun Mansion Hotel , 180 Qintai St
content: Representative stay option: This attractive courtyard-style hotel is situated on one of the more tourist-friendly streets in the city, surrounded by buildings in a similar Han and Tang Dynasty style The hotel offers a wide range of rooms from single to family

title: Holly's Hostel , 246 Wuhouci St
content: Representative stay option: Though not as trendy or cool as other hostels in Chengdu, Holly's has a better location than most other hostels in the city Situated across the Jinli Street, a good starting point for traveling through Chengdu, Wuhouci Dajie also has lots of Tibetan restaurants, hot pot restaurants, noodle joints, massage parlors, and camping/climbing stores

title: Jin Jiang Inn
content: Representative stay option: Part of a China-wide hotel chain; 3 locations in Chengdu; the South Chengdu Yulin location is near Renmin Nan Rd and the U.S Rooms are small but clean and well apportioned

title: Mr. Panda Hostel ( 熊猫先生青年旅舍 )
content: Representative stay option: Panda Hostel ( 熊猫先生青年旅舍 ), 107 Zhengfujie (正府街107号) ( Close to Wenshu Monastery metro station exit E ) Hostel in central Chengdu that caters to foreigners and Chinese alike with excellent English spoken by all staff

title: Super 8 Hotel
content: Representative stay option: Super 8 Hotel , Soho Bldg, 60 Kehua N Rd ( above an enclosed shopping arcade, near the western gate of Sichuan University ) Rooms are small and poorly designed

title: 8trees Wine Bar & Restaurant , 9 Pingan Alley
content: Planning hint: On the lighter side, there is the conscious side dish which is very popular with weight-watching regulars who complement their meals with the rich creamy soups offered in the menu Recommended signature dishes are the tantalizing mouthwatering North American beef, marinated with fresh herbs and spices; the lamb main simmered with exotic spices

title: Cafe Paname , 143 Kehua N Rd (科华北路143号) ( Nearby Sichuan University )
content: Planning hint: A bar with a younger crowd and laid-back environment Expect an occasional DJ event which will make the bar a little more lively on Fridays and Holidays Cafe Paname , 143 Kehua N Rd (科华北路143号) ( Nearby Sichuan University )

title: Feeling4Seasons Cafe
content: Planning hint: They also provide Internet service: wireless access for your laptop, loan of a wireless card if you don't have one, use of a PC if required It is also one famous China blog freelancer's cafe bar; he published a book named "Ten Years, Flying with one Dream"

title: High Connections Coffee House
content: Planning hint: High Connections Coffee House , Fu A-20 6 Shuangqing S Rd, Qingyang District ( On the west side of Chengdu near Metro and the Southwest Financial University ) Their coffee (both Espresso and good old fashioned drip American style) and muffins are an excellent way to begin a day

title: Highfly Cafe , 18 Linjiang Rd
content: Planning hint: There is one computer for free Internet access and a small book exchange (2 for 1) They serve beers and Western food including pizza and breakfast

title: Little Bar (New) ( 小酒馆 (芳沁店) )
content: Planning hint: The bigger shows are on Friday and Saturday and the bands start playing at 20:00 and finish at 22:00 Little Bar (New) ( 小酒馆 (芳沁店) ), 87 Fangqin St, Yulin Shangwugang, 1F (成都市芳沁街87号附5号丰尚玉林商务港1CNY

title: A Thousand Plateaus Art Space ( 千高原艺术空间; Qian Gaoyuan Yishu
content: Visit planning hint: A Thousand Plateaus Art Space ( 千高原艺术空间; Qian Gaoyuan Yishu Kongjian ), 87 Fangqin St 芳沁街87号 ( in Yulin Community, next to Little Bar and K Gallery ) A contemporary art gallery in Chengdu exhibiting Chinese and international artists

title: A Thousand Plateaus Art Space ( 千高原艺术空间; Qian Gaoyuan Yishu Kongjian
content: Visit planning hint: A Thousand Plateaus Art Space ( 千高原艺术空间; Qian Gaoyuan Yishu Kongjian ), 87 Fangqin St 芳沁街87号 ( in Yulin Community, next to Little Bar and K Gallery ) A contemporary art gallery in Chengdu exhibiting Chinese and international artists

title: Chengdu Art Museum , No
content: Visit planning hint: Through its diverse programs-including exhibitions, workshops, and public lectures-the Chengdu Art Museum aims to promote creativity, cultural dialogue, and appreciation for the arts among the public The museum features modern architectural design and spacious exhibition halls that host a wide range of national and international art exhibitions

title: Chengdu Museum ( 成都博物馆
content: Visit planning hint: Chengdu Museum ( 成都博物馆, chéng dū bó wù guǎn ), 1 Xiaohe Street, Qingyang District (青羊区小河街1号) ( Metro lines 1 and 2, Tianfu Square Station A 6 floors museum containing different interesting things about Chengdu civilization from ancient times to modern times

title: Chengdu Natural History Museum ( 成都自然博物馆 )
content: Visit planning hint: Chengdu Natural History Museum ( 成都自然博物馆 ), 88 Shilidian Road, Chenghua Avenue, Chenghua District (成华区成华大道十里店路88号) ( Exit B, Shilidian Station, Metro Line The museum has around 70,000 items, of which around 10,000 are on display, including many fossils

title: Kuanzhaixiangzi 30. . Kuanzhaixiangzi ( 宽窄巷子 ) ( Line 4 Metro
content: Visit planning hint: Kuanzhaixiangzi ( 宽窄巷子 ) ( Line 4 Metro, Kuanzhaixiangzi Alley Station ) Very nice place with lots of (expensive) tea houses, restaurants and local snacks

title: Sichuan Art Museum ( 四川美术馆 (sì chuān měi shù guǎn) )
content: Visit planning hint: Sichuan Art Museum ( 四川美术馆 (sì chuān měi shù guǎn) ), 6 Renmin Road West, Qingyang District (青羊区人民西路6号) ( 300 metres west of Tianfu Square Station at the intersection of Lines 1 and 2 ) Sichuan Art Museum is a major contemporary art institution located in the heart of Chengdu's Qingyang District near Tianfu Square in Sichuan Province, China

title: Tianfu Square ( 天府广场 (tiān fǔ guǎng chǎng) ) ( Line 1/2 M
content: Visit planning hint: Every evening at dusk, as well as at noontime, an elaborate water show, synchronized to music, bursts out from the square's fountains This square, overlooked by an enormous Chairman Mao statue in the center of the city, has been spruced up

title: Tianfu Square ( 天府广场 (tiān fǔ guǎng chǎng) ) ( Line 1/2 Metro
content: Visit planning hint: Every evening at dusk, as well as at noontime, an elaborate water show, synchronized to music, bursts out from the square's fountains This square, overlooked by an enormous Chairman Mao statue in the center of the city, has been spruced up

title: Line 1 runs north-south through the city center along Renmin Rd and Tianfu Ave
content: District movement hint: Line 1 runs north-south through the city center along Renmin Rd and Tianfu Ave, from Weijianian to Science City or Wugensong, connecting the North and South railway stations

title: Line 3 runs southwest-northeast
content: District movement hint: Line 3 runs southwest-northeast, from Chengdu Medical College to Shuangliu West Station, serving to those hot touristic sites in Chengdu

title: Line 5 runs north-southwest, parallel to Line 1, from Huagui Road to Huilong
content: District movement hint: Line 5 runs north-southwest, parallel to Line 1, from Huagui Road to Huilong It diminuing the population on Line 1

title: Line 6 runs northwest-east-southwest
content: District movement hint: Line 6 runs northwest-east-southwest, from Wangcongci to Lanjiagou; this line has the longest subway tunnel sections

title: Liangjiang Evening Cruises ( 重庆两江夜游 ), Office address
content: Planning hint: Liangjiang Evening Cruises ( 重庆两江夜游 ), Office address: China Youth Travel Service Chongqing, 7-19/97 Zhongshan Yi Road, Yuzhong District (渝中区中山一路97号7-19重庆中国青年旅行社) ( all the boats depart from the 5th and 6th piers of the Chaotianmen dock, which is at the northeast extremity of Yuzhong District ) A 1-hour trip on the Yangtse (Chang Jiang) and Jialing rivers gives you a night view of Chongqing's modern skyline

title: Liangjing passage boat
content: Planning hint: Liangjing passage boat (两江小渡,), address: Chongqing Hongyadong Wharf (重庆洪崖洞码头) A trip from Chaotianmen to Danzishi which takes about 6 min

title: Northern Hot Springs Park ( 北温泉风景区
content: Planning hint: Northern Hot Springs Park ( 北温泉风景区, 北泉风景区, 北温泉公园 ), State Highway 212, Beibei District (北碚区212国道旁边) ( take a train to Beibei Station on Metro Line 6; after exiting the station, head west to Beiquan Road (北泉路) and catch bus no For around 1600 years, this area has been a popular bathing spot as well as an important religious site for followers of Buddhism

title: Ronghui Hot Spring ( 融汇温泉 )
content: Planning hint: Ronghui Hot Spring ( 融汇温泉 ), 6 Huiquan Road, Shapingba District (沙坪坝汇泉路6号) ( take a train to Yanggongqiao Station on Metro Line 1, then catch bus no This resort made the news in 2018 with its 'hot pot springs' - a bathing pool designed to resemble a hot pot, complete with red-coloured water and inflatable chillies

title: Yangtze River Cableway ( 长江索道 )
content: Planning hint: This cableway, which is operated by the Chongqing Passenger Cableway Company Ltd (重庆市客运索道有限公司) takes one across the Yangtze River and provides a great view of the city Yangtze River Cableway ( 长江索道 ), 151 Xinhua Road, Yuzhong District (渝中区新华路151号)

title: Yangtze River cruises
content: Planning hint: Cruises on the Yangtze River will take you through the cradle of China, while giving you the opportunity to see some spectacular scenery There are several different companies operating these cruises

title: 山城第三步道 ( Shancheng Third Pedestrian Trail )
content: Planning hint: A suspended walkway clinging to the cliffside, this trail connects historical sites like the Kangjian Hall and the Bodhi Vajra Pagoda It provides a quiet escape and unique angles to view Chongqing's mountainous urban landscape, away from the crowded tourist hotspots

title: 渝味360碗美食体验店 ( Yuwei 360 Bowl Food Experience Store )
content: Food planning hint: As part of the official "Yuwei 360 Bowl" initiative to promote Chongqing cuisine , these designated stores offer a curated tasting experience of the city's diverse and authentic local dishes in one place 渝味360碗美食体验店 ( Yuwei 360 Bowl Food Experience Store )

title: Chongqing Grand Hotel ( 重庆大酒店 )
content: Best used as a stay area because Chongqing Grand Hotel ( 重庆大酒店 ), 84 Xiaolongkang New Street, Shapingba District (沙坪坝区小龙坎新街84号)

title: Chongqing Jinjiang Oriental Hotel ( 重庆欧瑞锦江大酒店 ), No
content: Best used as a stay area because 6 Xihu Road, Yubei District (渝北区西湖路6号) Chongqing Jinjiang Oriental Hotel ( 重庆欧瑞锦江大酒店 ), No

title: DLT Hotel ( 重庆大礼堂酒店 )
content: Best used as a stay area because DLT Hotel ( 重庆大礼堂酒店 ), 173 Renmin Road, Yuzhong District (渝中区人民路173号) ( behind the Great Hall of the People ) Completely renovated in 2007

title: Sheng Ming Hotel ( 重庆圣名大酒店
content: Best used as a stay area because Sheng Ming Hotel ( 重庆圣名大酒店, formerly known as the Chung King Hotel 重庆饭店 ), 45-47-Xinhua Road, Yuzhong District (渝中区新华路45-47号) ( Metro Lines 1 and 6, Xiaoshizi Station, Exits 2 and 3 ) Somewhere in the hotel is a Western restaurant which will provide you with one of the biggest spaghetti bolognaise you have ever seen

title: Somerset JieFangBei Chongqing ( 重庆盛捷解放碑服务公寓 )
content: Best used as a stay area because Each of its studios to two-bedrooms apartments features separate living and dining areas, an ensuite bathroom, a kitchen, home entertainment system, scenic views and Wi-Fi access Somerset JieFangBei Chongqing ( 重庆盛捷解放碑服务公寓 ), 9F, Block B Hejing Building, No 108 Minzu Road, Yuzhong District (渝中区民族路108号重庆合景大厦B栋9CNY )

title: Outside beer gardens ( above the underground arcade )
content: Planning hint: Serve reasonably priced drinks and is always crowded with good atmosphere and live premiership matches on big screens, do not eat here though! Outside beer gardens ( above the underground arcade )

title: Shapingba (west)
content: Planning hint: A young people and university place and have many places for entertainment

title: Underground arcade ( in Jiangbei (north)
content: Planning hint: Underground arcade ( in Jiangbei (north), the entrance is across from the big hotel near McDonalds ) Many bars and restaurants

title: Ciqikou ( 磁器口 Chongqing Ancient Town )
content: Visit planning hint: Walking uphill away from the river and main tourist area, it is still populated by regular families and homes as it has always been It is mostly comprised of small shops selling tourist stuff, but does lead down to the river where it is possible to board a restaurant boat and where the present hostel is located

title: Datang Plaza ( 大唐广场 )
content: Visit planning hint: A gravity-defying square perched atop a building-street level on one side, but dropping an astonishing 22 storeys on the other, a true showcase of Chongqing's wild topography

title: Drone show "Glamorous Chongqing"
content: Visit planning hint: Each Saturday night (and on major holidays), Chongqing's skies become a canvas for a spectacular drone show, with thousands of synchronized drones dancing above the confluence of the Yangtze and Jialing rivers Pro tip: the best views are from a bar or restaurant at level 6 of the 29

title: Great Hall of the People ( 重庆人民大会堂 ) ( access through pedes
content: Visit planning hint: It somewhat resembles an enlarged version of the Temple of Heaven in Beijing The ground of the square is paved with smooth marble tiles; there is magic music fountain; at the southern end of the square stands a stage for performances in the

title: Hongyadong ( 洪崖洞 )
content: Visit planning hint: Hongyadong ( 洪崖洞 ), 88 Jialingjiang Binjiang Road, Yuzhong District (渝中区嘉陵江滨江路88号) ( Metro Line 2, Linjiangmen Station, Exit D and Metro Line 1, Xiaoshizi Station, Exits 6 & 9 ) Near Jiefangbei, a recreation of the old Chongqing, clinging to the side of the mountain with many small shops

title: Jiefangbei Shopping Square
content: Visit planning hint: Around the square are more than 3,000 stores of various kinds, including more than two dozen large malls and shopping centers, dozens of star-graded hotels, and offices such as banks, stock markets, trade and finance companies, postal and telecommunication services, and places of entertainment Around the monument is a broad, paved pedestrian square lined by numerous glassy office skyscrapers and highrise hotels, reminiscent of New York 's Times Square or Tokyo 's Shibuya district

title: Liangjiang International Film City ( 两江国际影视城
content: Visit planning hint: Liangjiang International Film City ( 两江国际影视城, Liangjiang Movie City, 民国街 Republic Street ), Longxing Industrial Park, Liangjiang New District, Yubei District (渝北区两江新区所属的龙兴工业园区内) ( direct bus services to the site are available from the Longtousi Bus Station; other buses that stop here include bus nos The streets feature replicas of many well-known buildings from the time, as well as staff dressed in period costumes

title: Liziba Station , No
content: Visit planning hint: The train literally whooshes through the building, making it one of the city's quirkiest photo-ops and proof that Chongqing's engineers never shy away from creative solutions This is where Chongqing's metro line takes a surreal detour-straight through the middle of a 19-storey apartment block

title: Shibati (18 Stairs) ( 十八梯 )
content: Visit planning hint: The Shibati Memories Museum (十八梯记忆馆) near the northern entrance explains the history of the area A historic neighborhood on the south side of the Yuzhong Peninsula

title: Jiangbei (Northplace) which includes Paradise Walk shopping cen
content: Transfer hub hint: Jiangbei (Northplace) which includes Paradise Walk shopping center - There are two bus stations near the pedestrian street (Guanyinxiao)

title: Jiangbei (Northplace) which includes Paradise Walk shopping center
content: Transfer hub hint: Jiangbei (Northplace) which includes Paradise Walk shopping center - There are two bus stations near the pedestrian street (Guanyinxiao)

title: Jiefangbei
content: Transfer hub hint: There are two bus stations in Jiefangbei, south and west of the monument Jiefangbei , the primary centre of Chongqing, contains a pedestrian mall with a major shopping and entertainment centre and a series of supertall skyscrapers around the Jeifangbei monument

title: Erhai Paradise ( By Erhai Lake )
content: Planning hint: Explore the island and come back by boat, where your driver will be waiting to take you to a restaurant for dinner, or temples and bars as you wish However this is really unnecessary as there is never a shortage of taxi drivers waiting at the ferry and the local bus service is extremely inexpensive and accessible

title: Johnny 'O palm reading , @Tibetan Cafe, ( Remin Lu, across from Bad Monkey Bar )
content: Planning hint: The guy, that looks like a retired Super Mario with dark sunglasses, reads your palm and gives you an interesting perspective of what happened to you in the past Johnny 'O palm reading , @Tibetan Cafe, ( Remin Lu, across from Bad Monkey Bar )

title: Peter's Tourist Center ( 李震票务中心 )
content: Planning hint: Fluent English speaking with experience in arranging tours around Dali, especially cultural tours like Shaxi day tour and Yi, Bai, Hui minority markets and villages Peter's Tourist Center ( 李震票务中心 ), #65 Bo Ai Street, Dali Old Town, Yunnan, China中国 云南 大理古城 博爱路65号

title: Dali Cookery School , East Gate Village, Dali Old Town
content: Food planning hint: Visit the local market to buy all the fresh veggies Dali Cookery School , East Gate Village, Dali Old Town

title: Golden Local-Style Noodles
content: Food planning hint: Noodle shop that specialized in Cross-the-Bridge Noodles, a local specialty where a bowl of hot broth is brought to the table, and then the rice noodles and a number of plates with small quantities of other foods is immediately added by the waiter Golden Local-Style Noodles , Renmin Road ( near Fuxing Road, several storefronts to the left of Bad Monkey )

title: Marley's Cafe , Huguo Road ( Central Old Dali Town cross with boai )
content: Food planning hint: Marley's Cafe , Huguo Road ( Central Old Dali Town cross with boai ) Cheap and has a narrow balcony great for people watching

title: Om Shanti , 245 Renmin Road ( East, down towards lake )
content: Food planning hint: Vegetarian restaurant which serves great food and has a great, laid back atmosphere The staff are very helpful too and can give you loads of helpful information

title: Vegetarian Buffet ( 一然堂 )
content: Food planning hint: All-you-can-eat vegetarian buffet operated by Buddhists, the choices are usually four different vegetable dishes, soup, rice, and pickled vegetables Vegetarian Buffet ( 一然堂 ), Boai Road ( north of Mingcheng Art Garden Hotel, just off of Boai Road )

title: Vegetarian, Beef and Pork Dumplings , Renmin Road
content: Food planning hint: Nine dumplings with sauce just made and freshly steamed only cost CNY 3.5 Vegetarian, Beef and Pork Dumplings , Renmin Road

title: Jim's Tibetan Guest House
content: Representative stay option: They own another more upmarket place called Jim's Tibetan Hotel (see listing below) Very comfortable, clean and well appointed single and double rooms

title: Koreana Guesthouse
content: Representative stay option: The staff is pleasant and well-trained and the manager speaks good English Avoid rooms facing the street as they can be quite noisy in the evenings and mornings

title: New No
content: Representative stay option: 5 Guest House ( down Renmin Road near East Gate ) Its rooftop deck claimsa very nice view of the area

title: No. 3 Guesthouse
content: Representative stay option: The helpful staff speak Korean, Chinese and English and will accommodate most reasonable requests Rooms on the second floor are pricier than those on the first

title: Smile Cafe
content: Representative stay option: Cheap accommodation with nice rooms, laundry, free internet, hot water, courtyard with sun and table tennis, TV and DVD player The young English-speaking couple that run Smile Cafe have befriended many a visitors with their laid back attitudes, approachability, and helpfulness

title: TTF Cafe Hostel
content: Representative stay option: TTF Cafe Hostel , 11 Luyu Road, Dali Old Town (大理古城绿玉路11号) ( One minute walk on Luyu Road (绿玉路) from south end of Boai Road (博爱路) where intersects with Yita Road (一塔路) ) Dorms and private rooms available

title: Neverland Cafe
content: Planning hint: On Bo Ai Lu has homemade wine and fruit wines, and needs your help in advising how to blend good wines Owner speaks English and listens to Billie Holiday

title: City Wall
content: Visit planning hint: City Wall Take a walk in Dali Old Town's city wall for an elevated view on the town Access from the Southern Gate

title: Puxian Temple ( 普贤寺 Pǔxián Sì )
content: Visit planning hint: Puxian Temple ( 普贤寺 Pǔxián Sì ) An authentic, non-touristy temple

title: The northern route
content: Visit planning hint: The northern route of 6 km of path offers one of the sharpest cliff views of the entire Dali valley, and on a clear day you can see Jizu Mountain well beyond Erhai lake At the bend in the main valley it also offers a path up the mountains for 2 km which ends at a mountain pool where you can take a swim on a warm day

title: The southern route
content: Visit planning hint: You can even turn this into an 8 hour hike if you continue southwards Xiaguan along good paths (with several early exit points down the mountain) and enjoy the spectacular view The southern route winds down for 11 km through a few valleys to Gantong temple

title: riding a horse or walking up (1½ hours) to Zhongho temple from the city (from the gate acr
content: Visit planning hint: riding a horse or walking up (1½ hours) to Zhongho temple from the city (from the gate across Ren Min Lu street)

title: taking a cable car from the city (near Guan Yin Temple) to get to Gantong Temple; or ridin
content: Visit planning hint: taking a cable car from the city (near Guan Yin Temple) to get to Gantong Temple; or riding a horse to Zhongho Temple from Dali Tianlongbabu TV City; or walking up (1½ hours) to the somewhat middle of Cloud Traveler's path from Dali Tianlongbabu TV City; or

title: Cherry picking
content: Planning hint: For families or middle-aged and elderly tourists, when cherries are ripe in summer, they can go to the major picking gardens in the suburbs to experience the fun Most picking gardens allow tourists to taste them in the garden, or take them away at a

title: Cool off at the seaside
content: Planning hint: Summer and autumn are the best times to visit Dalian (May to October, especially in May when the weather is warm but not too hot) As the romantic city of Dalian, Jinshitan has the 10-mile Golden Coast (a very long natural beach) that often appears on tourist postcards

title: Discoveryland
content: Planning hint: Discoveryland in is a popular theme park with the fastest catapult roller coaster in Asia and the third fastest in the world

title: Lüshun
content: Visit planning hint: Lüshun Formerly known as Port Arthur, is a historically significant city on the southern tip of the Liaodong Peninsula, about 40 km (25 mi) south west of the city centre

title: Squares
content: Visit planning hint: Squares Within China, Dalian is renowned for its squares and green places, with a large number scattered throughout the city, each with its own distinct character Zhongshan Square hosts the city's financial center and some fine old Japanese buildings; People's Square is the seat of the city government and boasts an impressive fountain; and Xinghai Square is the largest square in Asia and home to a wide range of tourist attractions

title: Xinghai Park
content: Visit planning hint: Xinghai Park consists of a 150,000-m² land garden and an 800-m-long arch-shaped beach, has high-quality greenery and presents the atmosphere and artistic conception of the Vienna Royal Garden A large swimming pool has been built in the west of the park, making it the largest summer paradise in Dalian

title: Zhongshan Park
content: Visit planning hint: In 2003, the "Yixian Square" was built in the park, and a full-length bronze statue of Mr Sun Yat-sen was built in the center of the square

title: Ask someone
content: District movement hint: This can be your best choice when you know your destination well or you are checking whether you are on the right bus, but asking long and complicated questions can be considered slightly rude and bothering by locals

title: Do not consider riding a bike a good way to discover the city unless you have a great stre
content: District movement hint: The city is located in a hilly area with a great amount of slopes, which may ruin a nice and relaxing trip inside the city Do not consider riding a bike a good way to discover the city unless you have a great strength

title: a translating software and Chinese map software
content: District movement hint: Due to the policy of Baidu, none of the map services are offering English services since they have cores provided by Baidu Using a translating software and Chinese map software (Baidu, Tencent, etc.)

title: unofficial local English services
content: District movement hint: This is usually useful when you are travelling to other districts where bus stands do not feature English, or when you are planning to ride a bus whose route has a very complicated A variety local platforms with single bus route search are set up by bus fans

title: Children's Park ( 儿童公园 ), Yingbin Street/Yunzhong Street Crossing
content: Planning hint: Children's Park ( 儿童公园 ), Yingbin Street/Yunzhong Street Crossing A large park with many family attractions

title: Church of Our Lady of the Sacred Heart ( 圣心圣母教堂 ), No
content: Planning hint: The bell tower was destroyed during the Cultural Revolution and renovated in 1982, followed by further restoration in 2006 and 2016 It now serves as the cathedral of the Catholic Diocese of Datong and the residence of the diocese leaders

title: Datong Park ( 大同公园 ), Weidu Avenue, Pingcheng District (大同市平城区魏都大道)
content: Planning hint: Datong Park ( 大同公园 ), Weidu Avenue, Pingcheng District (大同市平城区魏都大道) A free park that contains amusement rides

title: Datong Red Memory Museum , No
content: Planning hint: The permanent exhibition is "Red Memories - Exhibition of Historical Relics of Modern Revolution in Datong", which mainly displays relics from the Chinese Communist Party and the Communist Youth League organizations in the Datong area from 1921 to 1949, as well as their student, worker and mass movements It is of certain value for understanding the history of the Datong area in the first half of the 20th century, although the perspective of the CCP may not be suitable for all foreign tourists

title: Memorial Hall of the Former Residence of the County Magistrate of D
content: Planning hint: It is a three-courtyard siheyuan (traditional courtyard house) in the style of northern Shanxi, built in the late Qing Dynasty or the Republican era, covering an area of approximately 1500 m² Memorial Hall of the Former Residence of the County Magistrate of Datong County ( County Magistrate's Compound )

title: Southeast County ( Guangfujiao Historical and Cultural District )
content: Planning hint: The "Shanxi Provincial Historical and Cultural Block" mainly includes streets and alleys such as Damiaojiao, Lihuaijiao, Guangfujiao, Houweijiao, Zhengfuxiang, Caijiaxiang, Dongmen Daxiang, and Shirenjie This block is the best-preserved area of Datong City in terms of its old appearance and historical sites.It has one Shanxi Provincial Cultural Relics Protection Unit ("Lihuaijiao No

title: DaTong Green Island Youth Hostel Railway Station
content: Representative stay option: DaTong Green Island Youth Hostel Railway Station , F5, Block A, Jin Hu International Tower, No.1029 Wei Du Avenue (opposite the train station) ( biggest tower across train station A young hostel offering most satisfying help by the staff

title: Chunyang Taoist Temple ( 纯阳宫 ) ( on bus line 35 or 38 )
content: Visit planning hint: Chunyang Taoist Temple ( 纯阳宫 ) ( on bus line 35 or 38 ) A small collection of Daoist temples and a peaceful courtyard

title: Datong Museum ( 大同博物馆 )
content: Visit planning hint: The museum covers an area of 5600 m², of which 1,800 m² exhibition area, has now become the second largest museum in Shanxi Province, 1.3 million pieces of cultural relics, a product 132 Meet the public more than pieces of precious relics in 1000, half of the initial display of rare collections

title: Dongguan Basketball Center ( 东莞篮球中心
content: Planning hint: Dongguan Basketball Center ( 东莞篮球中心 , Dōngguǎn Lánqiú Zhōngxīn ), Liaobu Town Home of the Guangdong Southern Tigers

title: Dongguan Yulan Theater ( 东莞玉兰大剧院
content: Planning hint: Dongguan Yulan Theater ( 东莞玉兰大剧院 , Dōngguǎn Yùlán Dà Jùyuàn ), 96 Hongfu Road, Nancheng District ( 南城区鸿福路96号 )

title: Yinxian Resort ( 隐贤山庄 )
