title: Jin'aozhou Pagoda ( 金鳌洲塔 )
content: Visit planning hint: Jin'aozhou Pagoda ( 金鳌洲塔 ), Jinqu Road South ( 金曲路南 ) ( The nearest bus stops are Jiangbin Gardens ( 江滨花园 ) and Wanjiang Bridge ( 万江桥 ) , both of which are about 15 minutes walk from the pagoda Experts are said to be impressed by the fact that since 1737, the pagoda has tilted by less than 1% despite being situated only a few meters from the river bank

title: Lingnan Tiandi , Zumiao Street, Chancheng District
content: Planning hint: Walk through a renovated historic district featuring Lingnan-style buildings, cafes, boutiques, and cultural exhibitions Lingnan Tiandi , Zumiao Street, Chancheng District

title: Qiandeng Lake Park , Nanhai District
content: Planning hint: Relax in a large urban park popular for walking, jogging, and evening light displays around the lake Qiandeng Lake Park , Nanhai District

title: Shiwan Ceramics Street , Shiwan Town, Chancheng District
content: Planning hint: Visit ceramic workshops and galleries to observe traditional Shiwan pottery techniques and purchase locally made ceramics Shiwan Ceramics Street , Shiwan Town, Chancheng District

title: Lingnan Tiandi Restaurants , Chancheng District
content: Food planning hint: A concentration of restaurants offering Cantonese dishes, desserts, and modern Chinese cuisine Lingnan Tiandi Restaurants , Chancheng District

title: Hampton by Hilton Foshan West Station , No
content: Best used as a stay area because A comfortable budget-friendly hotel near Foshan West Railway Station, offering free parking and basic modern amenities for travellers 8 Shui'an Street, Shishan Town, Nanhai District ( near Foshan West Railway Station )

title: Hilton Garden Inn Foshan
content: Best used as a stay area because Hilton Garden Inn Foshan , 20 Guilan Middle Road, Guzhen Subdistrict, Nanhai District ( in the historic Guzhen area of Nanhai District, close to metro connections and local dining ) A well-known mid-range hotel offering comfortable rooms, fitness facilities, and reliable service in Nanhai District

title: Downtown Foshan Milk Tea Shops , Chancheng District
content: Planning hint: Numerous local and chain milk tea shops offering popular Chinese-style beverages Downtown Foshan Milk Tea Shops , Chancheng District

title: Qiandeng Lake Tea Houses , Nanhai District
content: Planning hint: Traditional tea houses around Qiandeng Lake, popular for afternoon tea and casual meetings Qiandeng Lake Tea Houses , Nanhai District

title: Huang Fei-hung Memorial Hall
content: Visit planning hint: Museum commemorating this martial arts master Huang Fei-hung Memorial Hall

title: Leigang Park ( in the center of Nanhai; Metro Guangfo
content: Visit planning hint: The park hosts children's attractions and a large lake Leigang Park ( in the center of Nanhai; Metro Guangfo: Leigang )

title: Liangyuan Park
content: Visit planning hint: Formerly the residence of the Liang clan, the park is actually a large garden housing a number of traditional Chinese-style buildings

title: Nanfeng Kiln ( Shiwan's Nanfeng Ancient Furnace )
content: Visit planning hint: Nanfeng Kiln ( Shiwan's Nanfeng Ancient Furnace ) A great place to see ceramics being made, and then to buy them

title: Sanshui Lotus World ( 三水荷花世界; Sānshuǐ Héhuā Shìjiè )
content: Visit planning hint: Sanshui Lotus World ( 三水荷花世界; Sānshuǐ Héhuā Shìjiè ) The largest lotus ecological park in the world

title: Zhongshan Park ( 中山公园; Zhōngshāngōngyuán ) ( Along Fenjiang River
content: Visit planning hint: Zhongshan Park ( 中山公园; Zhōngshāngōngyuán ) ( Along Fenjiang River ) Offers nine specific scenic areas and family entertainment facilities

title: Foshan West Railway Station Bus Hub ( adjacent to Foshan West Railway S
content: Transfer hub hint: A bus interchange serving Foshan West Railway Station, providing local bus connections for passengers arriving by high-speed rail Foshan West Railway Station Bus Hub ( adjacent to Foshan West Railway Station in Nanhai District )

title: Kuiqi Road Station ( along Kuiqi Road
content: District movement hint: Kuiqi Road Station ( along Kuiqi Road, connecting residential and commercial areas in southern Chancheng ) A station on Foshan Metro Line 1 providing access to southern parts of the city and connections to multiple bus routes

title: Zumiao Bus Hub ( near Zumiao Temple in central Chancheng District )
content: Transfer hub hint: A major inner-city bus interchange serving the historic and commercial center of Foshan, with frequent connections across the city Zumiao Bus Hub ( near Zumiao Temple in central Chancheng District )

title: Fuzhou Fighting Ferrets Football Club
content: Planning hint: A motley assortment of nationalities who play at Jinshan Wentizhongxin every Sunday at 09:15 Fuzhou Fighting Ferrets Football Club

title: Paintball ( In Jinjishan Gongyuan, right on top of the hill )
content: Planning hint: Great fun for those masochists among us who enjoy being hit by high velocity projectiles in delicate parts of the body Paintball ( In Jinjishan Gongyuan, right on top of the hill )

title: Sauna/spa
content: Planning hint: They often have three different pools, one hot, one boiling (by western standards), and a normal one Sauna and Turkish bath used to be available, staff gives you all you need

title: Walk in traditional architecture street , Nan Hou Jie ( South of Xi Hu )
content: Planning hint: Freshly renovated pedestrian street, back into time atmosphere, lots of small alleys to stroll by, great for shopping but avoid overpriced restaurants and bars Walk in traditional architecture street , Nan Hou Jie ( South of Xi Hu )

title: Boiled shark ( 鯊魚滑 )
content: Food planning hint: A Geng (thick soup) using shark's meat, it won't have a strong smell

title: Cafe Forum ( on the corner of Ring Road Two and Wushi Road )
content: Food planning hint: Good quality meals in a box and reasonably priced coffee, but the service can sometimes be atrocious Cafe Forum ( on the corner of Ring Road Two and Wushi Road )

title: Daming Food Street ( 达明美食街 )
content: Food planning hint: Daming Food Street ( 达明美食街 ), 鼓CNY 区达明路美食街 ( At the north exit of Three Lanes and Seven Alleys ) A typical Chinese streetfood street with all kind of 小吃 (xiaochi, snacks) such as BBQ skewers, desserts, etc

title: Lemon leaf , 5F, 66 Hubin Road ( opposite the front door of West Lake )
content: Food planning hint: Lemon leaf , 5F, 66 Hubin Road ( opposite the front door of West Lake ) Featured dish: lemon fish and curry crab

title: Moby Pizza ( On the second floor
content: Food planning hint: Moby Pizza ( On the second floor, northeast corner of Jintai Road and Bayiqi Road opposite McDonalds )

title: Roman Holiday
content: Food planning hint: Roman Holiday , Jiao Tong Road, by the Hong Yun Xing Cheng Apartments ( when you arrive near the apartments, there will be an alley on the right side of the street with advertisements of Italian food, follow them down the alley until you see Roman Holiday on the left ) Also, some good fusion Japanese/Italian/Chinese dishes

title: Best Western , Downtown ( Near Hot Springs Park )
content: Representative stay option: Nice western hotel with soft beds in a good location Best Western , Downtown ( Near Hot Springs Park )

title: Empark Grand Hotel ( 世纪金源大饭店, lit.
content: Representative stay option: Empark Grand Hotel ( 世纪金源大饭店, lit.: Golden Resources Hotel ) ( Off Wushi Road, to the east ) Good Macau restaurant on ground floor

title: Howard Johnsons , Mawei District . Don't be fooled by the name
content: Best used as a stay area because Howard Johnsons , Mawei District Very classy hotel with a good western restaurant on the ground floor and an excellent Japanese restaurant on the second floor

title: Ju Chun Yuan Hotel ( 聚春园大酒店 ), Dong Jie Kou ( A central intersection )
content: Representative stay option: Ju Chun Yuan Hotel ( 聚春园大酒店 ), Dong Jie Kou ( A central intersection ) Very central for shopping and such

title: Shangri-La Hotel ( 香格里拉大酒店 ) ( corner of Wuiyi Square )
content: Representative stay option: Shangri-La Hotel ( 香格里拉大酒店 ) ( corner of Wuiyi Square ) Also has a great and (by five-star standards) inexpensive coffee bar with free internet access

title: 1-2-3 Bar , Baima Road ( Almost opposite Shao Yuan Yi Hao )
content: Planning hint: The sign says 1-2-3, but Chinese pronounce it "do-re-mi" for reasons that are not at all clear 1-2-3 Bar , Baima Road ( Almost opposite Shao Yuan Yi Hao )

title: Club Blog Club , 136 Hubin Road
content: Planning hint: A coffee shop managed by a Western resident that overlooks West Lake Club Blog Club , 136 Hubin Road

title: Saint Nobody , Beida Road ( Near Guxi Church )
content: Planning hint: An anti-fuzhou look which makes you feel like a traveler lost in an unknown city The most mysterious club in fuzhou with cheap beer and good indie music

title: The Bamboo Bar ( about 200 m from Shao Yuan Yi Hao nearer to Yangqiao Road )
content: Planning hint: The Bamboo Bar ( about 200 m from Shao Yuan Yi Hao nearer to Yangqiao Road ) Cheap beer, waterside tables, live football games on TV

title: The Pure Drop , Hubin Road ( Near West Lake )
content: Planning hint: A lively and convivial atmosphere, cheap, cold beer, live music every night The Pure Drop , Hubin Road ( Near West Lake )

title: Baiyun Mountain ( Near Gu Mountain )
content: Visit planning hint: Plus some great views over the city After the grueling top section, you will be rewarded by some genuinely beautiful hospitality and refreshing tea in a cave!

title: Fu Forest Trail ( 福道 (Fudao) )
content: Visit planning hint: 1 entrance (福道-1号入口) is the eastern end near West Lake, go to Shanhaiguan (山海观) bus stop Fudao is an elevated urban forest trail on metal bridges within Fuzhou city

title: Fuzhou Confucius Temple ( 福州文庙 )
content: Visit planning hint: Fuzhou Confucius Temple ( 福州文庙 ), 10 Shengmiao Road, Gulou District (鼓CNY 区圣庙路10号) ( just outside Namendou Metro Station ) This is the oldest Confucius Temple in Fujian Province

title: Gu Mountain ( 鼓山, Gu Shan; lit.
content: Visit planning hint: A Taoist temple houses nationally important archives written in monks' blood as well as superb veggie restaurant Gu Mountain ( 鼓山, Gu Shan; lit.: Drum Mountain ) ( 20 minutes bus ride from town )

title: Qi Mountain ( 旗山
content: Visit planning hint: A forest park with big, waterfalls and stunning views over receding mountain ranges from a vertigo-inducing suspension bridge 82, 141, 901, 902, or Zhang (樟) 13 to the Qi Shan Intersection (旗山路口), then use the park bus to travel up the winding 17-km road to the site )

title: Yantai Mountain ( 烟台山 )
content: Visit planning hint: Yantai Mountain ( 烟台山 ), 福建省福州市仓山区仓前路35号 ( between Dadao and Shangteng metro stations, on Line 1, on the east bank of the river ) The former Western nations trading area of fuzhou

title: Chinese New Year/Spring Festival
content: Planning hint: Chinese New Year/Spring Festival ( 春节 Chūnjié ) occurs on first day of first lunar month, usually in January or February This is a 15 day celebration and some districts can be quite deserted as many migrant workers return to their home provinces

title: Daytime River "Cruise"
content: Planning hint: After spending a couple of hours walking around or even dinner, it will cost you only CNY 1 to cross back to the Riverside Hostel Daytime River "Cruise" As cheap as CNY 5, you get a ride down to the last terminal at ZhongSan University and back

title: Dragon Boat Festival
content: Planning hint: This festival commemorates the sacrifice of Qu Yuan ( 屈原 ), a famous poet who drowned himself in the river by way of making a statement against government corruption during the Warring States Period Dragon Boat Festival ( 端午节 Duānwǔ jié ) on fifth day of fifth lunar month, usually in May or June

title: Mid-autumn Festival
content: Planning hint: Mid-autumn Festival ( 中秋节 Zhōngqiū jié ) is on the 15th day of 8th lunar month, usually in September or October Lian Xiang Lou and Taotao Ju's moon cakes are especially famous (see "Eat" section)

title: Pearl River Night Cruise
content: Planning hint: Pearl River Night Cruise ( 珠江夜游 ) Dashatou Pier ( 大沙头码头 ), Tianzi Pier ( 天字码头 ), and Xidi Pier ( 西堤码头 ) - This is a one- to two-hour cruise in the evening and a great way to see the Guangzhou skyline along the Pearl River, including a light show at Bai-E-Tan Higher end cruises usually include dinner buffet

title: Ride the public buses.
content: Planning hint: Where the journey terminates, ask anyone what buses will take you back and request the driver to let you know when to get off So long as you have sufficient small change for the journey, tell the driver you are in just for a joyride

title: Dessert ( 甜品, 糖水 )
content: Food planning hint: Other popular choices include tofu pudding ( 豆腐花 ), red bean paste ( 紅豆沙 ), green bean paste ( 綠豆沙 ), guilinggao ( 龟苓膏 ), black sesame paste ( 芝麻糊 ) and sago ( 西米露 ) Dessert ( 甜品, 糖水 ) A Cantonese meal is not complete without Cantonese desserts

title: Seafood ( 海鲜 )
content: Food planning hint: From picking live fish or lobsters in front of your eyes to eating the sea creatures with their heads attached, this is a great adventure for any visitors Seafood ( 海鲜 ) Eating fresh seafood the Cantonese way is a good way to explore Cantonese culture

title: Siu Mei / Shao Wei ( 烧味 )
content: Food planning hint: Siu Mei / Shao Wei ( 烧味 ) Cantonese barbecue is famous around the world where many have seen the image of roasted ducks and chicken hanging in front of a store Some varieties include barbecued pork ( 叉烧 ), roast goose ( 烧鹅 ) and roast pig ( 烧肉 )

title: White Cut Chicken ( 白切鸡 )
content: Food planning hint: Many Cantonese restaurants have their signature dish based on this, such as the Wenchang Chicken from Guangzhou Restaurant, Real Taste Chicken from Bingsheng Restaurant and Qingping Chicken from various restaurants It is lightly flavored to allow one to savor the true taste of the chicken meat, and is usually served with a dipping sauce of ground ginger and spring onion on the side

title: Yum Cha / Dim Sum ( 饮茶/ 点心 )
content: Food planning hint: Yum Cha / Dim Sum ( 饮茶/ 点心 ) "A pot of tea with two pieces ( 一盅两件 )" is Guangzhou's dim sum culture Many locals stay for hours chatting and reading newspaper with just a small order of food

title: Butterfly Cave
content: Planning hint: The final stage is a walk inside a netted area in which a large variety of butterflies may be observed Inside this cave are many strange rock formations including stalagmites and stalactites

title: Dreaming on Li River Show ( 夢幻漓江秀; Mènghuàn Líjiāng Xiù )
content: Planning hint: Dreaming on Li River Show ( 夢幻漓江秀; Mènghuàn Líjiāng Xiù ), 95 Qixing Rd (七星路95号; Qīxīnglù) The show tries to recreate the culture of the various ethnic groups around Guilin

title: Guilin Shangri-la park ( halfway along the road between Guilin and Yangshuo )
content: Planning hint: The boat will drop you off at the 'village' where you can see displays of local crafts including weaving, embroidery, buffalo horn carving and calligraphy Set in beautiful scenery, this ethnic theme park tries to introduce visitors to the wide range of local nationalities and their cultures

title: Mountain Bike Rental , 40 Sanduo Road (三多路40号) . 09:00
content: Planning hint: A centrally located bike shop at city downtown with 24/27 speed mountain bikes for rent (CNY 45-100 a day) Many one and multi-day cycling/hiking trips in and around Guilin

title: Two Rivers and Four Lakes Cruise , Binjiang Rd
content: Planning hint: At the mid point in the tour, there will be a demonstration of traditional cormorant fishing A boat tour around the four lakes and two rivers of Guilin city

title: Wupai River Drifting ( 2 hours north of Guilin (in Ziyuan County) )
content: Planning hint: Wupai River Drifting ( 2 hours north of Guilin (in Ziyuan County) ) White water rafting down the scenic river

title: Chilli Paste
content: Food planning hint: Chilli Paste is a sauce used for local dishes and also sold to other parts of China and abroad It is made from chilli, lobster, garlic and Sanhua Wine

title: Fermented Beancurd
content: Food planning hint: Fermented Beancurd has been made in Guilin for more than 300 years and is known to have a unique taste

title: Fruits
content: Food planning hint: Guilin is renowned for its fruit, especially shatian pomelo, arhat fruit and gingkgo

title: Horse hoof cake
content: Food planning hint: Horse hoof cake ( Matigao ) is a local snack It is a crumbly cake stuffed with red beans filling

title: Rice with Mung Bean Paste
content: Food planning hint: Rice with Mung Bean Paste is made from steamed rice filled with mung bean paste or other Often eaten for breakfast

title: Sweet tofu
content: Food planning hint: Look for roadside vendors adding orange-coloured liquid to a steaming hot bag of tofu, which you then drink with a straw Sweet tofu infused with a certain flower is another delicious breakfast item

title: Eva Inn , 66 Binjiang Rd, Xiufeng District ( in front of Sheraton )
content: Best used as a stay area because Eva Inn , 66 Binjiang Rd, Xiufeng District ( in front of Sheraton ) It has 113 rooms and a gourmet restaurant with terrace dining

title: Guilin Bravo Hotel , 14 Ronghu South Rd, Xiufeng District
content: Best used as a stay area because Offers air-conditioned rooms, all of which have satellite TV with free in-house movies, mini-bar, refrigerator, and high-speed Internet access Guilin Bravo Hotel , 14 Ronghu South Rd, Xiufeng District

title: Guilin Osmansthus Flower Hotel , No
content: Representative stay option: Guilin Osmansthus Flower Hotel , No A good 3-star hotel located in the downtown

title: Ming palace hostel
content: Best used as a stay area because Ming palace hostel (桂林王城青年旅馆) No.10-3, Donghua Road, Xiufeng District, Guilin (桂林秀峰区东华路10号王城青年旅舍（中华小学旁，王府花园对面）) dorm rooms from CNY 16-30, clean rooms, very helpful staff, free washing machine, very close to west gate into solitary beauty peak walled area, river, tourist area

title: Overseas Chinese Hostel ( 花俏大沙 ), 13 Zhongshan Nanlu (中山南路13号)
content: Representative stay option: Overseas Chinese Hostel ( 花俏大沙 ), 13 Zhongshan Nanlu (中山南路13号) A little inconveniently located, but clean and a good alternative to a full FYH

title: Soluxe Qixia Hotel ( 3 minutes walk to Li River
content: Representative stay option: Soluxe Qixia Hotel ( 3 minutes walk to Li River, 5 minutes walk to Seven Star Park and approaching Liberation Bridge ) 366 rooms, with stylish decoration, neat and clean environment and free internet access

title: Kaya café & bar
content: Planning hint: Kaya café & bar , Zhonghua Lu 6 ( from the walking street, walk to Solitary Beauty Peak (North), at the gate, go right and first left again, 50 meters on your right side ) One of the few real bars in Guilin

title: Lakeside Inn , No1-1-2 Shan lake Building, Shan Lake North Road
content: Planning hint: Drinks and German beer, at the other side of the ShanHu Hotel building, right between the Central Square and the Sun and Moon Pagodas Lakeside Inn , No1-1-2 Shan lake Building, Shan Lake North Road

title: Logo ( formerly Le Feitz )
content: Planning hint: Bar/club, often has a cover band playing and/or DJs very loud, but not a bad atmosphere if there's a good crowd Logo ( formerly Le Feitz ), 1-8 Chaoyang Rd m from Guangxi Normal University north gate )

title: Sharon's Coffee
content: Planning hint: Red Lips -- On the Road -- Usual Place -- Go In , Chuanshan South Rd ( street to Chuanshan Park, at the corner of Lijiang Road, close to Li River Chuanshan Bridge ) Four bars nearby, each nicely decorated and with relaxed atmosphere, some with Internet access, young audience, often English-speaking Chinese students

title: West Bank Café , 4/F, Binjiang Building, 18 Binjiang Rd
content: Planning hint: West Bank Café , 4/F, Binjiang Building, 18 Binjiang Rd Decent coffee accompanied by jazz music and river view

title: Eighth Route Army Guilin Office Museum ( 八路军桂林办事处纪念馆 )
content: Visit planning hint: 1, 2, 18, 89, 100, 301 or K99 and get off at the Fengbei Road Intersection (凤北路口); you could also walk here from the Jingjiang Princes' Palace - the museum is less than 1 km north of the palace ) Eighth Route Army Guilin Office Museum ( 八路军桂林办事处纪念馆 ), 14 Zhongshan North Road, Diecai District (叠彩区中山北路14号) ( take bus nos

title: Guilin Art Museum ( 桂林美术馆 )
content: Visit planning hint: Guilin Art Museum ( 桂林美术馆 ), 173 Longchuanping Rd, Xiangshan District (象山区龙船坪173号) ( take bus 33 and get off at the last stop ) 09:30-17:00, no entry after 16:30, closed on Mondays

title: Guilin Guanshitang Chicken-Blood Stone Museum ( 桂林观石堂鸡血玉博物馆 )
content: Visit planning hint: Guilin Guanshitang Chicken-Blood Stone Museum ( 桂林观石堂鸡血玉博物馆 ), Opposite Reed Flute Cave Carpark, Xiufeng District (秀峰区芦笛岩景区停车场对面) ( take bus 3, 213 or Sightseeing Bus 1 ) Visitors should be aware that there have been a lot of complaints about rude staff pressuring people to buy overpriced items in the museum shop

title: Jingjiang Princes' City ( 靖江王城, 靖江王城 Jingjiang Princes' Palace ), No
content: Visit planning hint: 1 Wangcheng (Princes' City), Xiufeng District (秀峰区王城1号) ( May be approached from different directions; the closed bus stop to the main entrance is Lequn Intersection (乐群路口), which is served by bus nos 07:30-18:00 (March 1st to April 4th & October 8th to December 7th), 07:30-18:30 (May 1st to October 7th), 08:00-18:00 (December 8th to February 28th)

title: Official Residence of Li Zongren ( 李宗仁官邸 )
content: Visit planning hint: Built in the 1940s to accommodate Li Zongren, a Guilin-born Kuomintang military leader who served as vice president of the Republic of China from 1948 to 1949 and acting president from 1949 to 1950 Official Residence of Li Zongren ( 李宗仁官邸 ), 4 Wenming Road, Xiangshan District (象山区文明路4号) ( near the Wenming Road bus stop, which is served by bus nos

title: Sun and Moon Pagodas ( 日月双塔 )
content: Visit planning hint: Although there is nothing much to see inside the pagodas, the view from the outside as well as the surrounding lake offers a good respite from the traffic and noise of Guilin's city center Sun and Moon Pagodas ( 日月双塔 ), 10 Wenming Road, Xiangshan District (象山区文明路10号) ( near city center and close to Li Zongren's residence; take bus no

title: Xinyouke Sour Soup Beef (Chaoyang Store) ( 心有客酸汤牛肉(朝阳店) ), No
content: Food planning hint: 39, Ground Floor, Building 12, Chaoyang Village, Qingxi Street（清溪街道朝阳村12栋底层39号） Xinyouke Sour Soup Beef (Chaoyang Store) ( 心有客酸汤牛肉(朝阳店) ), No

title: Guizhou Karst Hotel
content: Representative stay option: Guizhou Karst Hotel Near the People's Square and face the Nanming River A 4-star hotel with high quality service

title: Guizhou Art Museum ( 贵州美术馆 )
content: Visit planning hint: 2, 15, 101, 214, 311 or Circular Route 1 and get off at the Museum (博物馆) bus stop; or, catch one of the many buses that stop at the nearby Beijing Road (北京路) bus stop ) Guizhou Art Museum ( 贵州美术馆 ), 168 Beijing Road, Yunyan District (云岩区北京路168号) ( take bus no

title: Guizhou Nationalities Museum ( 贵州省民族博物馆 )
content: Visit planning hint: Guizhou Nationalities Museum ( 贵州省民族博物馆 ), 23 Jiandao Street, Nanming District (南明区箭道街23号) ( catch bus no A museum focused on the history and culture of Guizhou's various ethnic groups

title: Guizhou Provincial Museum ( 贵州省博物馆 )
content: Visit planning hint: Guizhou Provincial Museum ( 贵州省博物馆 ), 107 Lincheng Road East, Guanshanhu District (观山湖区林城东路107号) ( Metro Line 1, International Eco-Conference Center Station, Exit B ) A reservation in mini-app is required, though that requires a Chinese phone number

title: Guizhou Science and Technology Museum ( 贵州科技馆，贵州省科学技术官 )
content: Visit planning hint: Guizhou Science and Technology Museum ( 贵州科技馆，贵州省科学技术官 ), 40 Ruijin Road South, Nanming District (南明区瑞金南路40号) ( there is a bus stop just outside the museum called Cinanmen (次南门), which is served by over two dozen bus routes ) The museum also features a children's science and technology park and a 4D movie theatre

title: Hongfu Temple ( 弘福寺 )
content: Visit planning hint: Hongfu Temple ( 弘福寺 ), Qianlingshan Park, 187 Zaoshan Road, Yunyan District (云岩区枣山路187号黔灵山公园内) ( it is a 40- to 60-minute walk to the temple, but there is also a cable car, which stops at 17:00, and sedan chair rides ) The temple, built as a monastery in the early Qing Dynasty, is comparable in extent to the Lama Temple in Beijing

title: Qianlingshan Park ( 黔灵山公园
content: Visit planning hint: Sample local food and crafts from vendors, see curious and very brave wild monkeys (accustomed to people), as well as take in the view from the hilltops near Hongfu Temple Qianlingshan Park ( 黔灵山公园, 黔灵公园 Qianling Park ), 187 Zaoshan Road, Yunyan District (云岩区枣山路187号) ( the bus stop outside the park is served by more than two dozen bus routes )

title: Changying Wonderland ( 长影环球100奇幻乐园 )
content: Planning hint: Changying Wonderland ( 长影环球100奇幻乐园 ), 100 Yehai Avenue, Xiuying District (秀英区椰海大道100号) ( bus no 14:30-20:30 (weekdays), 13:00-21:00 (weekends)

title: Haikou Bay Performing Arts Center ( 海口湾演艺中心 )
content: Planning hint: Haikou Bay Performing Arts Center ( 海口湾演艺中心 ), 42 Binhai Avenue, Longhua District (龙华区滨海大道42号) ( on the west side of Evergreen Park, next door to the Haikou Conference & Exhibition Center; take bus no For the latest show schedule (in Chinese only), see the official WeChat account (WeChat ID: 小海艺)

title: Hainan Center for the Performing Arts ( 海南省歌舞剧院 )
content: Planning hint: Hainan Center for the Performing Arts ( 海南省歌舞剧院 ), 68 Guoxing Avenue, Qiongshan District (琼山区国兴大道68号) ( a short distance west of the Hainan Provincial Museum; take bus no 12, 27, 33, 43, 51, 52, 56, 67 or 68 and get off at Hainan Plaza (海南广场) ) call between 8:30 and 22:00)

title: Splash City ( 海口狂欢水世界
content: Planning hint: Splash City ( 海口狂欢水世界, previously known in English as Wet‘n'Wild Haikou ), 63 Yangshan Avenue, Longhua District (龙华区羊山大道63号) ( at the Mission Hills Tourist Resort, which provides a free shuttle bus service; you may catch these free shuttle buses from various points in the city, including the Haikou East Station and Evergreen Park; regular buses also stop here, including bus nos meters in height; children under 1.2 meters and adults over 70 enjoy free

title: Banqiao Road Local Restaurant Area
content: Food planning hint: Banqiao Road Local Restaurant Area This large covered outdoor restaurant area is a unique local experience To begin with have a look around the integrated fresh food market and choose what you want

title: Hainan University Night Market
content: Food planning hint: Hainan University Night Market It is a busy night food market outside the Hainan University and caters for the wallet of undergraduates, which means food is cheap and reasonably priced Common items include Chao Bing, Qingbuliang (various beans and jelly in iced coconut soup), BBQ

title: People's Bridge Night Market
content: Food planning hint: On Haidian island connected by a bridge to the mainland, this area is 3 minute away from the Hainan University Night Market It has a night market for cheap clothing and cheap food

title: Romantic Turkey ( 浪漫的土耳其餐厅 )
content: Food planning hint: Romantic Turkey ( 浪漫的土耳其餐厅 ), Building 6, Bilin Pavilion, 102 Jinmao West Road, Longhua District (龙华区金贸西路102号碧林阁6栋) ( Inside the Yehai Village (椰海山庄) apartment complex; the nearest bus stop is Jinyin Plaza (金银广场), which is served by bus nos A Turkish restaurant run by a Turkish Australian man

title: The area south of East Haixiu Road
content: Food planning hint: The area south of East Haixiu Road has a number of small streets with small local restaurants cooking the food out in the street and with tables both in and out Expect to pay CNY 20-30 per person

title: Yushang Jianglai Xinjiang Cuisine ( 御尚疆来新疆菜 )
content: Food planning hint: Yushang Jianglai Xinjiang Cuisine ( 御尚疆来新疆菜 ), 10 Jinlong Road, Longhua District (龙华区金龙路10号) ( next door to AA Party; take bus no Dancers from Xinjiang occasionally perform on the stage on the ground floor

title: As in other Chinese cities you may check apps like ctrip for hotels in Haikou
content: Representative stay option: As in other Chinese cities you may check apps like ctrip for hotels in Haikou, see the pictures and visit the hotel to check the rooms in the spot

title: Hainan Airlines Business Hotel , 38 Datong Rd, Longhua District
content: Best used as a stay area because Hainan Airlines Business Hotel , 38 Datong Rd, Longhua District Four-star hotel with rooms with Internet access

title: Hainan Huatian Hotel , No
content: Best used as a stay area because This four-star hotel is also near a number of city attractions, shopping malls, and business establishments Each of the hotel's Hainan accommodation is furnished with air-conditioning, cable TV, and Internet access

title: Home Inn . Has two branches
content: Representative stay option: Staff helpfulness makes up for limited English though you can get lucky with one or two at the reception almost half the time Has two branches: one is at 61 Bailong Rd and the other is more centrally at 91 Haixiu Middle Rd

title: International Financial (Jasper) Hotel , 29 Datong Rd
content: Best used as a stay area because The 4-star hotel particularly suits business travelers, as it provides deluxe rooms and meeting spaces, and low-key recreation nooks International Financial (Jasper) Hotel , 29 Datong Rd

title: Drink a fresh coconut
content: Planning hint: Vendors will chop the top off the coconut and give you a straw to drink the juice inside Available on most street corners

title: Fushan Coffee ( 福山咖啡; fúshān kāfēi ), Bailong South Rd, 白龙南路琼苑广场道层
content: Planning hint: Other branches at Bin4 Hai3 Da4 Dao4 (滨海大道会展中心附CNY ), Nan2 Sha1 Lu4 59 (南沙路59号), Yi4 Long2 Lu4 (义龙路市人大宾馆道层) Large cafe with primarily male guests hanging around for hours drinking coffee and smoking
tags: 白龙南路琼苑广场道层

title: Heping Road
content: Planning hint: Heping Road on Haidian Island has many small outdoor places to drink inexpensive local beer

title: Xuewu
content: Planning hint: Xuewu near Heping road on Haidiandao offers a decent outdoor environment and a pub style indoor area and night BBQ The whole BBQ chickens are recommended by other travelers

title: Baishamen Park ( 白沙门公园 )
content: Visit planning hint: Located at the northern end of Renmin Avenue (人民大道), in Baishamen Park on Haidian Island in the northern end of the city Includes a small amusement park

title: Evergreen Park ( 万绿园 )
content: Visit planning hint: Evergreen Park ( 万绿园 ), Binhai Ave ( bus routes 3, 6, 7, 17, 18, 37, 39, 42, 43, 54, 57, 72, 76, 83, 92, K2, express bus 6 (快速公交6号线), night bus 2 (夜2路), tourist bus 1 (游1路), tourist bus 2 (游2路), tourist bus 5 (游5路), tourist bus 6 (游6路), tourist bus 7 (游7路) ) Beautiful park with green grass, palm trees, and ocean views

title: Former Residence of Feng Baiju ( 冯白驹故居 )
content: Visit planning hint: There is a small museum about him next to the residence Former Residence of Feng Baiju ( 冯白驹故居 ), Changtai Village, Yunlong Town, Qiongshan District (琼山区云龙镇长泰村) ( take Tourist Bus 5 )

title: Former Residence of Qiu Jun ( 丘浚故居 ), No
content: Visit planning hint: 9 Lane 3, Jinhua Road, Qiongshan District (琼山区金花路三巷9号) ( the nearest bus stop is Zhuyun Market (朱云市场), which is served by bus routes 10, 31, 38, 44, 46, 49, 58, 69 and k3 ) Built in the second year of the Ming Dynasty (1369), Qiu Jun's former residence is the oldest wooden building in Haikou and a rare example of early Ming architecture

title: Qiongtai Academy ( 琼台书院 )
content: Visit planning hint: Established in commemoration of Qiu Jun, believed to be the most brilliant scholar in Hainan and a renowned Ming Dynasty academic Qiongtai Academy ( 琼台书院 ), 8 Zhongshan Road, Fucheng Town, Qiongshan District (琼山区府城镇中山路8号) ( take bus no

title: Qiu Jun's Tomb ( 丘浚墓 )
content: Visit planning hint: Qiu Jun's Tomb ( 丘浚墓 ), Qiu Jun Road, Chengxi Town, Xiuying District (秀英区城西镇邱浚路) ( the nearest bus stops are Liuniushan Market (罗牛山市场) and Haikou Meatworks (海口肉联厂), which are served by bus nos The park includes a museum about Qiu Jun, which opened in May 2022

title: Buses are very inexpensive, but you need to know the routes
content: Arrival advice: If you choose to get the bus from the airport, show the address of your hotel to the attendant who will show you the bus that will take you closest There is an airport shuttle that cost CNY 15 per person from airport to Home Inn (formerly Civil Aviation Hotel) at Haixiu Avenue in downtown Haikou

title: Commuter trains run in an east-west direction along Hainan's high-speed railway line
content: Transfer hub hint: Since there's only one line and not many stations on the route, these trains are mainly useful for getting to the airport and the two major railway stations Stops include Haikou Railway Station, Changliu, Xiuying, Chengxi, Haikou East Railway Station and Haikou Meilan International Airport

title: Taxi which is the most expensive option
content: Arrival advice: The taxi from the airport is half an hour to the city centre It should cost CNY 50-60 to the city centre

title: Early morning bike ride
content: Planning hint: Start on the north side of the lake, and head west towards Zhejiang University, then down Lingyin Road past the Botanical Gardens and into Longjing Village Keep heading West and south through the tea villages, bamboo forest, and scenic valleys to the river and cut over towards Six Harmonies Pagoda

title: Go for a run
content: Planning hint: Join the "Even If It Rains" running group of locals and laowei at 19:30 on Tuesday nights from the Maya Bar (across the road from the stadium in Shuguang Rd, at the traffic lights where Shuguang Rd The Vasque mountain race of approx 35 km through the mountains, tea fields and lakeside is held around October and in November is held the Hangzhou marathon, half marathon and lesser distances

title: Go hiking in the mountains
content: Planning hint: Hangzhou has the most accessible and interesting hiking environments within walking distance of any city Purchase a topographic map, not difficult to find

title: Hangzhou Paradise Park
content: Planning hint: Includes the Theme Park of Holland Village, the Theme Park of Marco Polo's Tour, Ecological Garden, Niton Hot Spring Holiday Village, Conference Center, Tennis Ball Club, Golf Club, Tiancheng Residential Holdings Here, you can feel excitement and fun of the 108 meters high Sightseeing Tower which is the highest in Asia, the roller coaster, flying trapeze, ropeway, looting boat in rip current, pirate ship, etc

title: Start with the climb up to the Baochu Pagoda from Beishan Road
content: Planning hint: Stay with the high ground where you can and you should come out near the corner of Shuguang Rd and Beishan Rd in an easy 2 hours, with plenty of opportunities for side explorations The trail passes the pagoda and continues on with a rock scramble and great views to a series of stone paths that follow the ridge

title: Walk around the lake
content: Planning hint: You can also hire small non-motor powered boats (CNY 120/hour for personal boat with driver, or use the ferry services) to take you around the lake and to the two islands, which feature some interesting sites The lake is not very big and there are two shortcuts (causeways) through it

title: Banana Leaf
content: Food planning hint: Although there is a pleasant atmosphere and good quality food, many customers find that the food is untraditional Banana Leaf , Changsheng Road (2 junctions north of the Hyatt on the east side of the lake)

title: Chuan Wei Guan
content: Food planning hint: Chuan Wei Guan For Hot Pot, this city-wide chain (5 restaurants throughout town) is best, and this hotpot place also has several good Sichuan dishes

title: Grandma's Kitchen
content: Food planning hint: Grandma's Kitchen suffers a bit from its own popularity, making a long wait inevitable and service haphazard (forgotten dishes and the like) Grandma's Kitchen (外婆家) has expanded to almost 20 locations in Hangzhou, each packed to the brim with customers

title: Honglin Teppanyaki
content: Food planning hint: This newish Teppanyaki restaurant is clean and spacious, with large table around hotplates able to seat 10-20 people at a go However, the "butter" they use is quite suspicious and you will be harassed to eat everything they put on the plate

title: Hubin 28
content: Food planning hint: Hubin 28 serves good food from all over China in a restaurant designed with a mixture of modern fittings and traditional furniture It has received good reviews in many foodie magazines in Hong Kong

title: Mu Zhi Lan
content: Food planning hint: Mu Zhi Lan , Nanshan Rd ( next to the Bernini coffee shop ) is one of the best, especially location-wise The all-you-can-eat deal is around CNY 180, but the seating and views are excellent, as is the food

title: Zhīwèiguān restaurant
content: Food planning hint: Zhīwèiguān restaurant on Rénhé lù (仁和路) is well-known among Chinese in Hangzhou It has a variety of cheap and traditional dishes

title: Zhōngshān nánlù
content: Food planning hint: Zhōngshān nánlù (中山南路) This is one of the great street food strips in China It begins at the Drum Tower, only a short walk from the end of Gaoyin ancient street

title: Enjoyor Hotel , 65 Qingchun Rd ext 7800
content: Best used as a stay area because This hotel has 168 rooms, and also offers hydropathy treatments, a variety of dining options, and helpful services Enjoyor Hotel , 65 Qingchun Rd ext 7800

title: Hangzhou International Youth Hostel
content: Representative stay option: Despite being literally a few paces from the clubs of Nanshan Road, this hostel is set back far enough to be relatively noise free and features a comfortable courtyard/patio with a pond Hangzhou International Youth Hostel , Nanshan Road ( Right on the east side of the lake and just off "bar street", next to Qing Temple )

title: Hangzhou Sunny Huansha Hotel , 17 Huansha Road, Shangcheng District
content: Best used as a stay area because A 3-star hotel offering 100 aptly furnished rooms with smart amenities such as desktop computer with free internet access Hangzhou Sunny Huansha Hotel , 17 Huansha Road, Shangcheng District

title: My Inn Hotel ( 我的客栈 )
content: Best used as a stay area because My Inn Hotel ( 我的客栈 ), 264 QiuTao Rd, ShangCheng District; 杭州市上城区秋涛路264号(长途汽车南站对面) ( Adjacent to Metro 1 Wujian Road, and South Bus Station ) Bathrooms are clean, there is a convenience store in the lobby, and laundry, kitchen and business facilities in the building

title: Redstar Culture Hotel , 280 South Jianguo Road, Shangcheng District
content: Best used as a stay area because Redstar Culture Hotel , 280 South Jianguo Road, Shangcheng District Maximize your reservation by attending a gala at its 900-capacity theater and enjoy a sumptous meal on their Chinese restaurant that offers Jiangsu, Sichuan, and Zhejiang cuisines

title: SouthLine Hotel ( Nanxian Dajiudian )
content: Representative stay option: A small but clean, well-located and reasonably well-appointed mid-range hotel one-half block off the lake and right next to the Zhejiang Art Academy on Nanshan Rd SouthLine Hotel ( Nanxian Dajiudian )

title: 7 Club , Shuguang Road ( Behind the flower shop opposite Yellow Dragon Hotel )
content: Planning hint: 7 Club , Shuguang Road ( Behind the flower shop opposite Yellow Dragon Hotel ) Normally contains a quieter atmosphere and specializes in hard-to-find imported bottle beers

title: G+
content: Planning hint: The more sophisticated of the big clubs, catering to slightly better heeled 20-30s crowd G+ , in the Wahaha Building on Qingchun Road

title: JZ Club , 6 Liuying Rd ( Nanshan Road )
content: Planning hint: One of the most sophisticated bars in Hangzhou, with live jazz performances every night and a range of beers, cocktails and wines JZ Club , 6 Liuying Rd ( Nanshan Road )

title: SOS
content: Planning hint: The big boy of Hangzhou, and is truly massive, with advanced sound and light, and is always full SOS has fewer regulars, and more out-of-town clubbers

title: Shamrock Irish Pub , Jiefang Rd and Jianguo Rd
content: Planning hint: Good pub food on the menu some live music on weeknights Shamrock Irish Pub , Jiefang Rd and Jianguo Rd

title: Tree House ( Near the KFC in Beigan Yi Yuan
content: Planning hint: A small venue which is the main hub for foreigners living in Xiaoshan district, famous for its cheap beer and outdoor seating Tree House ( Near the KFC in Beigan Yi Yuan

title: Bai Causeway
content: Visit planning hint: Starting at the eastern end of Beishan Road, this cause way leads to Solitary Hill and cuts off the distances between, say, Hubin Road and the Shangri La

title: Boat Ride
content: Visit planning hint: There are numerous providers of boat rides on the lake There are lots of private gondola rides with varying insurance coverage, range and

title: Hubin Parks
content: Visit planning hint: Relatively newly designed as the West Lake Tunnel that goes underneath was being built in early 2004, these parks are good to sit for a bit, buy ice cream or a newspaper, and most importantly hire a boat from the cluster of boat docks at each park Hubin Parks 1, 3, 6, and probably the numbers in between, are the parks between Hubin Road and the West Lake

title: Lord Ruan's Mound
content: Visit planning hint: An island made by piling dirt dredged from the lake 200 years ago At night (summer), entertainment activities take place in the garden on the island

title: Mid-Lake Pavilion ( Huxin Pavilion )
content: Visit planning hint: Mid-Lake Pavilion ( Huxin Pavilion ) Built in 1552, it is the oldest island in Hangzhou

title: Solidary Hill And Zhongshan Park
content: Visit planning hint: Where Lou Wai Lou restaurant is located, this is the only natural island on the lake Besides an expensive restaurant, the popular area is the home of the Xiling Seal-Engravers' Society, and the seals, calligraphy, engraving-masters, and relics that go along with it

title: Ten Scenes of West Lake
content: Visit planning hint: The classic view of West Lake seen from the Broken Bridge is quite fascinating, and the Legend of the White Snake (a famous Chinese legend which takes place here) also brings this ancient bridge much more charm of culture and history Almost 3 km long, the Su causeway dates from the year 1189 and has a bunch of willows and peach trees

title: Bowling
content: Planning hint: There is also a bowling club behind the Sino Way hotel with 2 floors and pool tables Very popular among the Chinese in Harbin

title: Harbin Summer Music Festival ( 哈尔滨之夏音乐节 Hāěrbīn Zhīxià Yīnyuèjié )
content: Planning hint: Held every two years in July (next will be in 2018), this festival is organized by the city and brings in famous Chinese bands for free concerts held in the city square Harbin Summer Music Festival ( 哈尔滨之夏音乐节 Hāěrbīn Zhīxià Yīnyuèjié )

title: Ice Festival
content: Planning hint: Ice Festival, Zhaolin Park ( 冰雪游园会, 兆麟公园 Bīngxuě yóuyuánhuì, Zhàolíngōngyuán ), in the city center at Zhaolin Park, south side of the river Rather small exhibits compared to the other two main festivals

title: Sun Island International Snow Sculpture Art Fair ( 太阳岛国际雪雕艺术博览会; Tàiyán
content: Planning hint: Sun Island International Snow Sculpture Art Fair ( 太阳岛国际雪雕艺术博览会; Tàiyángdǎo guójì xuědiāoyìshù bólǎnhuì ), on Sun Island, north side of the river ( Just a few steps from the Sun Island gondola station or just cross the frozen river by feet ) However, if you plan to visit the Ice and Snow World then this is not a must see

title: WB International Movie Theatre ( 万达国际电影城 Wàndá Guójì Diànyǐng Chéng )
content: Planning hint: WB International Movie Theatre ( 万达国际电影城 Wàndá Guójì Diànyǐng Chéng ), Zhongyang Dajie Wal-mart

title: Yangge Traditional Chinese Dance
content: Planning hint: You will notice that during the warmer months (and even sometimes in the winter) there will be legions of senior citizens out on the street doing a group dance complete with drumming and costumes This is called niu yang ge and if you are adventurous just jump in and dance along!

title: Assorted Meats on a Stick ( 串儿; Chuàn'ér )
content: Food planning hint: Sold on every street, try asking for grilled bread buns (考馒头; Kǎomántou), its really good Finish everything off with an egg and tomato Gada Tang (soup)

title: Harbin Smoked Sausage ( 哈尔滨红肠 Hā'ěrbīn Hóngcháng )
content: Food planning hint: A treat only known to Harbin, you see stores selling it everywhere, it is REALLY good Harbin Smoked Sausage ( 哈尔滨红肠 Hā'ěrbīn Hóngcháng )

title: Haws
content: Food planning hint: Hawthorn fruit stacked on sticks and served covered with a sweet sauce You tend to find other fruits available also

title: Hotpot and Harbin beer ( 火锅和哈尔滨啤酒 Huǒguō hé Hā'ěrbīnpíjiǔ )
content: Food planning hint: Hotpot and Harbin beer ( 火锅和哈尔滨啤酒 Huǒguō hé Hā'ěrbīnpíjiǔ ) Can be found anywhere in Harbin

title: Lamb
content: Food planning hint: Lamb with spices grilled over coals served with sesame flat bread from the nice Uighur guys (from Xinjiang province) on a street between Hong Bo Shopping Center and Guogeli Dajie CNY 5 will buy you a good meal

title: Russian Breads
content: Food planning hint: Lots of Bread and pastry stores around the city, including Zhongyang Dajie

title: Bremen Hotel ( 勃莱梅大酒店 ), No.146 Zhongshan Road
content: Representative stay option: Western style hotel that must have been great when it was new Bremen Hotel ( 勃莱梅大酒店 ), No.146 Zhongshan Road

title: Be For Time ( 避风塘茶CNY )
content: Planning hint: Be For Time ( 避风塘茶CNY ), 102 Xidazhi Jie (南岗区西大直街102号) ( Under Pacers near HIT ) CNY 18 all you can eat/drink

title: Costa Coffee
content: Planning hint: Coffee House, unlike Starbucks it's not quite as packed with people and you can still meet a lot of foreigners here a bit cheaper than Starbucks in some things, but mainly the same applies here too, Chinese western snacks and no real coffee Costa Coffee , Zhonyang Dajie, quite close to the Flood Monument, next to a Russian Shop and Babelas Kitchen

title: Luyu Cafe ( 鹿鱼咖啡 )
content: Planning hint: Situated in a historic Russian building right next to Zhongyang street, the warm atmosphere and nicely decorated surroundings, combined with a creative coffee blend from the friendly owner, will let you forget that you're in a city with a population of 10 million Luyu Cafe ( 鹿鱼咖啡 ), 43 Hongzhuan Jie 红专街43号(靠近中央大街) ( Just a few meters left from Zhongyang St

title: Rumi Cafe ( 入迷咖啡 )
content: Planning hint: Rumi Cafe ( 入迷咖啡 ), A7#13 Seasons of Berlin, Academy St., University Area, Harbin (哈尔滨学院路柏林四季A7#13)

title: Starbucks
content: Planning hint: Starbucks , Zhonyang Dajie ( one in Europlaza and one in the corner in a bigger shopping-mall, quite at the beginning of Center Street Coffee house, here you can meet a lot of foreigners a bit more expensive than usual in China

title: Harbin Confucius Temple ( 哈尔滨文庙 )
content: Visit planning hint: Harbin Confucius Temple ( 哈尔滨文庙 ), 25 Wenmiao Street (文庙街25号) ( right beside the campus of the Harbin Engineering University, about 1km east of the Harbin Engineering University metro station on Line 1 ) This Confucius temple is one of the largest of its kind in northeast China

title: Harbin Jewish New Synagogue ( 哈尔滨犹太新会堂 Hā'ěrbīn Yóutài Xīnhuìtáng )
content: Visit planning hint: Further up Tong Jiang Jie is the old synagogue that is now a youth hostel and cafe, with the old Jewish school next door -both worth a detour to look at from the outside Harbin Jewish New Synagogue ( 哈尔滨犹太新会堂 Hā'ěrbīn Yóutài Xīnhuìtáng ), 162 Jing Wei Jie

title: Huining Fu
content: Visit planning hint: It's been declared a national historic reserve, and apart from the ruined city walls there's a museum on the site as well A few kilometres south of Acheng centre, you'll find the ruins of, the capital of the 12th century Jin dynasty

title: Old Quarter
content: Visit planning hint: Not well maintained but an interesting walk and you can maybe find Russian antiques in some of the thrift stores A section of the city just west of Zhongyang Dajie is still dominated by Russian buildings built around the turn of the century

title: Riverbank Park ( 江畔公园 Jiāngpàngōngyuán )
content: Visit planning hint: Long tree covered walkway that stretches the city-side banks of the Songhua river, a really nice and pleasant walk Riverbank Park ( 江畔公园 Jiāngpàngōngyuán ), Along the Jiangpan Road in Daowai District ( Runs parallel to the Songhua River )

title: Temple of Heavenly Bliss ( 极乐寺 Jílèsì )
content: Visit planning hint: Temple of Heavenly Bliss ( 极乐寺 Jílèsì ), Dongdazhi Street (东大直街; Dōngdàzhíjiē) ( In the eastern part of the city ) Large and active Buddhist temple

title: Line 2
content: District movement hint: Line 2 This line connects the north of the river, islands in the middle, and south together Stops at Harbin station, Zhongyang Dajie, can change onto line 1 at the provincial museum

title: Drive duck boats
content: Planning hint: Drive duck boats around the lake at Bao Gong park or Xinghua park Costs about CNY 30/half an hour

title: Ferris wheel at Xinghua park
content: Planning hint: At other times of the day you might see older people singing traditional songs or playing er'hu or flute in pavilions Ferris wheel at Xinghua park Costs CNY 10/person and you can get a good birds-eye view

title: Go-Karting

title: Soho Bar , 198 Shengli Road
content: Planning hint: Showing live sports on a multitude of widescreen TVs and with its athletic-themed staff, Soho Bar is the best place in town to watch Premier League football, rugby and whichever international sports events you care to imagine Due to the plethora of TVs available, staff are quite happy to let you take over the remote control to find the game or event of your choice

content: Visit planning hint: The view across Hefei is great on a clear day and there is a TV tower at the top The Hefei Zoo is near but not much; it's a long walking distance along Wangjiang road

title: Unmarked taxis
content: Transfer hub hint: You often see these kind of illegal taxis around the railway station, airport, or in the outskirts Saying that, there are times when legit taxis are very scarce, and if you really need to be somewhere, it might be an option

title: Get to the mountains ( take bus 54 north until it ends at the edge of town; this bus can b
content: Planning hint: Get to the mountains ( take bus 54 north until it ends at the edge of town; this bus can be easily caught along the north side of Xinhua Square heading west )

title: Go Dojo , Zhongxing International Mansion, No.118, Ulanqab East Road, Saihan District
content: Planning hint: Go Dojo , Zhongxing International Mansion, No.118, Ulanqab East Road, Saihan District Training in the game of Go , run by professional player Zhang Jiayao

title: People's Park , Zhongshan west road
content: Planning hint: You can drive a pedal boat (CNY 50/CNY 60 for 2/4 people) on one of the lakes, ride a giant wheel or just walk around in this very nice park Parts are like an amusement park, other parts just like a normal park

title: Fengwei Huoguo ( just southwest of Xinhua Square, facing north with a large green sign )
content: Food planning hint: Fengwei Huoguo ( just southwest of Xinhua Square, facing north with a large green sign ) Busy every night, for good reason

title: Mongolian Food @ the Race Track
content: Food planning hint: Meals served in traditional Mongolian style in your own private yurt Mongolian Food @ the Race Track

title: Shiao Hotel ( a large hotel along Zhongshan road
content: Food planning hint: Shiao Hotel ( a large hotel along Zhongshan road, west of Victory shopping plaza, with a multi-colored deck at 22 stories with a large Eiffel Tower-like radio tower atop it -- hard to miss ) Buffet overlooking all of Hohhot that rotates so you get the whole 360

title: Xi Bei
content: Food planning hint: Xi Bei , Chengjisihan Dajie, Xincheng District ( at the new stadium to the northwest of the city ) A northwestern Chinese cuisine chain, which started in Inner Mongolia; one of the four stores in Hohhot

title: Zang Can Bar (Tibet Food Bar) ( in the heart of the city
content: Food planning hint: Zang Can Bar (Tibet Food Bar) ( in the heart of the city, east side of Xinhua Square, look down the alley way south of the hotel, it is on the north side ) A small Tibetan restaurant

title: Zecheng Ice Boiled Mutton
content: Food planning hint: Unlike traditional mutton hot pot, which is cooked with water, they heat it with ice cubes mixed with mutton The store's secret condiments are also part of the reason for its booming business

title: Inner Mongolia Jin Jiang International Hotel
content: Best used as a stay area because Inner Mongolia Jin Jiang International Hotel , 119 Hulun South Road, Saihan District ext 7800 This five-star hotel in Hohhot brings guests to a new level of luxury, offering almost 1000 rooms with relaxing amenities, event venues and catering services, and recreational facilities

title: Lemongo Youth Hostel
content: Best used as a stay area because Lemongo Youth Hostel , 228 Hailar Rd, Xincheng District ( Near Inner Mongolia University of Technology ) The dorm rooms are very clean, lots of space between beds, and spacious, well furnished common areas

title: Kumis (Fermented Mare's Milk) Kumis is a low-alcohol beverage made from fermented mare's m
content: Planning hint: This traditional Mongolian drink is often seen at feasts and is believed to have digestive and health benefits Kumis (Fermented Mare's Milk) Kumis is a low-alcohol beverage made from fermented mare's milk

title: Milk Skin Tea Milk skin is made from boiled cow or sheep's milk
content: Planning hint: Milk Skin Tea Milk skin is made from boiled cow or sheep's milk, and it is often consumed with tea This tea has a rich, milky taste and is a distinctive beverage in the Inner Mongolia region

title: Milk Tea Inner Mongolian milk tea is one of the most iconic beverages of Hohhot and the en
content: Planning hint: It is made by boiling brick tea (usually black tea) with milk and salt, and in some areas, ingredients like fried rice or butter are added Milk tea is not only a daily drink but also a common offering when hosting guests, symbolizing the warm hospitality of the nomadic people

title: Mongolian Butter Tea Similar to milk tea
content: Planning hint: Mongolian Butter Tea Similar to milk tea, this drink includes butter and salt, resulting in a richer, more nutritious flavor Butter tea is commonly enjoyed during the colder months, as it warms the body and provides energy

title: Yogurt Inner Mongolian yogurt is well-known for its rich and creamy texture
content: Planning hint: Unlike most industrially produced yogurts available on the market, Hohhot's yogurt tends to be thicker, and it's often served with honey, sugar, or fruit jam for added flavor Yogurt Inner Mongolian yogurt is well-known for its rich and creamy texture, with a natural milky flavor

title: Hohhot Museum ( 呼和浩特博物馆 )
content: Visit planning hint: Hohhot Museum ( 呼和浩特博物馆 ), 44 Xinhua Street, Xincheng District (新城区新华大街44号) ( next to the Hall of the People; take a metro train to the Renmin Huitang Station on Line 1; alternatively take bus no 09:30-17:00, no entry after 16:30, closed on Tuesdays

title: Inner Mongolia Art Museum ( 内蒙古美术馆 )
content: Visit planning hint: Inner Mongolia Art Museum ( 内蒙古美术馆 ), 20 Xinhua Street East, Saihan District (赛罕区新华东街20号) ( diagonally opposite the Inner Mongolia Museum; take a metro train to the Shizhengfu Station on Line 1; alternatively take bus no 09:00-17:00, no entry after 16:00, closed on Mondays

title: Inner Mongolia Museum of Natural History ( 内蒙古自然博物馆 )

content: Visit planning hint: The largest Buddhist temple in the city and main seat of Buddhism in Inner Mongolia Xilitu Zhao ( 席力图召; Xílìtúzhào ), 112 Danan Street, Yuquan District ( opposite Da Zhao )

content: Visit planning hint: Zhuhai ( Buses do not run at night though, so if you want to go after 5PM, get a cab for CNY 100-200 Some very nice restaurants and rustic inns you can stay in (preferable to Tunxi)

content: District movement hint: Lotus peak and Celestial Capital peak are each typically In 2019, Celestial Capital Peak reopened

title: Wang's Noodle Soup ( 王氏浆面条 )

title: Keyou Hotel ( 客佑酒店 ), No
content: Best used as a stay area because 19-6, Yingbin Road, Jiefang District The design incorporates Henan Opera and Tai Chi culture, and provides zero-pressure mattresses, mini-fridges, and some room types include kitchens

title: Qingtian River Scenic Area ( Qingtian River Scenic Area )
content: Visit planning hint: A national 5A-level tourist attraction, it is known as the "Three Gorges of the North" because of its alternating canyons, mountains and waters, and boat tours are available Qingtian River Scenic Area ( Qingtian River Scenic Area ), 博爱县青天河镇 ( You can take a tourist bus from Jiaozuo Passenger Station, which takes about 1 hour

title: Shennong Mountain ( 神农山 )
content: Visit planning hint: Shennong Mountain ( 神农山 ), Northwest of Qinyang City ( You can take a tourist bus directly from Jiaozuo or Qinyang city The mountain is majestic and famous for its original secondary forests and ancient road landscapes

title: Bridge Head Fan Pot ( 桥头粉丝煲 )
content: Food planning hint: The main ingredients are vermicelli, pork and shiitake mushrooms, and the seasonings are garlic, bean paste, salt, etc Bridge Head Fan Pot ( 桥头粉丝煲 )

content: Visit planning hint: Jiaxing Museum, with an area of 22,000 square meters, is a comprehensive museum integrating collection, research, display and education Jiaxing Museum has a rich collection, which reflects the cultural features of Jiaxing in different periods from different aspects

content: Visit planning hint: Majiabang Culture Museum ( 马家浜文化博物馆 ), 297 Majiabang Road, Nanhu District (南湖区马家浜路297号) ( bus nos A museum displaying artefacts recovered from the nearby Majiabang Neolithic site

content: Visit planning hint: Larger than the old branch mentioned in the South Lake section 36, 71, 81, 90, 92 and Tourist Bus 8 ) visitor bookings) tour guide bookings)

title: For Wuzhen
content: Arrival advice: For Wuzhen, either take a local train to Tongxiang station, then change for a bus, or catch a bus directly from Jiaxing Coach Station A tourist coach service also runs directly from Shanghai South Coach Station (next to Shanghai South Station) to Wuzhen

title: For Xitang
content: Arrival advice: Some coach services from Shanghai South Coach Station (next to Shanghai South Station) run directly to Xitang (though most run only to Jiashan, requiring a change to a local bus.) Buses from Jiashan to Xitang cost CNY 5 For Xitang, either take a local train to Jiashan station or Jiashan South station, then change for a bus, or catch a bus directly from Jiaxing or Jiaxing South station

title: Jilin Ice Lantern Festival
content: Planning hint: Jilin Ice Lantern Festival not as famous as the festivals in Harbin but still worth a visit (during mid-January)

title: Jilin City Museum
content: Visit planning hint: Jilin City Museum In 1976, Jilin was hit by a heavy meteorite storm Many of the stones were collected and placed into this museum

title: Jingyuetan National Scenic Area
content: Visit planning hint: Jingyuetan national forest park in Changchun of Jilin Province is located in the eastern mountains to the western steppe transition zone, Changbai Mountain is a hilly are with peaks m above sea level Jingyuetan National Scenic Area is one of the AAAAA class scenic spots of the first group in China

title: Longtou Mountain
content: Visit planning hint: Longtou Mountain , northwest of Changchun These hills contain ancient tombs including the Mausoleum of Princess Zhenxiao and royal tombs of the Balhae kingdom

title: Puppet Emperor's Palace
content: Visit planning hint: Puppet Emperor's Palace is the former residence of Puyi, the last emperor of China and the Puppet Emperor of Manchukuo on behalf of the Japanese In the north east of Changchun

title: Rimmed Trees
content: Visit planning hint: The Rimmed Trees of Jilin city are extolled as one of the four major natural wonders of China along with the Three Gorges of the Yangtze River, the landscape of Jilin and the Stone Forest of Yunnan

title: Wen Miao Confucian Temple
content: Visit planning hint: Wen Miao Confucian Temple in Jilin City one of the "Four Confucius Temples of China"

title: Minghu Ju ( 明湖居 )
content: Planning hint: Qing Dynasty theater showing traditional operas with a restaurant and tea house Minghu Ju ( 明湖居 ), 29 Daminghu Rd, Lixia District

content: Planning hint: Shandong Acrobatics Troupe Theatre ( 山东省杂技团金奖演艺厅 ), 71 Wenhua Road, Lixia District Home theatre of world class Chinese acrobatic troupe

content: Food planning hint: A shopping mall with fast food chains on the street, restaurants serving regional Chinese cuisines within an inner courtyard, and alleys of simple food stalls Daguanyuan ( 大观园 ), 34 Xiaowei Er Rd, Shizhong District

content: Food planning hint: Lydia restaurant , 38 Shanda Road (山大路38号 Shandalu) ( Not far from the technology market ) Favorite place of foreign students and young Chinese

content: Food planning hint: Meishi Street ( 美食街 ), 34 Jinshiyi Rd, Shizhong District Food street with restaurants and a snack center

title: Jinan Tianjia Business Affairs Hotel , 2 Fukang Street
content: Representative stay option: Jinan Tianjia Business Affairs Hotel , 2 Fukang Street Disounted rates for doubles of CNY 128; breakfast CNY 8

title: Joyinn & Suites-Shanda
content: Representative stay option: Discounted rates for double rooms from CNY 130 including breakfast Joyinn & Suites-Shanda , 77 Shanda North Road ( Next to Shandong University )

title: Banjo bar ( Further up the street from English Corner )
content: Planning hint: Banjo bar ( Further up the street from English Corner ) This place has bands playing on most evenings

title: Cinderella , Jingshi Lu, underneath the big sports stadium
content: Planning hint: Cinderella , Jingshi Lu, underneath the big sports stadium A big club, mostly locals visiting

title: English Corner ( 街角酒店 )
content: Planning hint: English Corner ( 街角酒店 ), 3 Foshan Street, Lixia District Bar serving cold bottle beer near the Sofitel

title: Jenny's Cafe ( Right across the street from the Bank of China on LiShan Lu )
content: Planning hint: This place used to be a foreigner hangout until management changed and the staff became unfriendly, the dishes halved in size and the They also serve imported beer (Paulaner, Erdinger, Guinness, etc.) if you want a quality beer for a change

title: Soho Disco
content: Planning hint: Populair with foreign students Different kinds of beer are available

title: Baotu Spring Park ( 趵突泉公园 )
content: Visit planning hint: Includes gardens, pavilions and a number of small museums and memorial halls dedicated to famous locals Must-see park immediately to the west of Quancheng Square surrounds the 'number 1 spring under heaven', Baotu Spring

title: Five Dragon Pool Park ( 五龙潭公园 )
content: Visit planning hint: A small park within which is a very deep pool of spring water, a few natural springs, pavilions and a temple for the Tang Dynasty army general Qin Qiong who lived in Jinan Five Dragon Pool Park ( 五龙潭公园 )

title: Jinan Old Town , Qushuiting Street, Lixia District
content: Visit planning hint: A neighbourhood of alleys and traditional Chinese buildings immediately east of the Jinan Confucius Temple, an expansion with new faux-traditional Chinese architecture was completed in 2016 There are numerous springs, tea houses, the Hundred Flower Pond, and the former residence of 20th century Chinese scholar Lu Dahuang

title: Laoshe Memorial Hall
content: Visit planning hint: A small museum dedicated to early 20th century Chinese author Laoshe based in his former residence while living in Jinan Laoshe Memorial Hall , 58 Nanxin St, Lixia District ( A short walk south from Baotu Spring )

title: Memorial Temple of Xin Qiji
content: Visit planning hint: Rebuilt from the original Li Hongzhang Temple, this is a memorial to Xin Qiji, a famous poet and warrior from the Song dynasty Memorial Temple of Xin Qiji , Daming Hu Road, Lixia District ( West side of Xia Garden, south bank of the lake )

title: Minghu Art Gallery ( 明湖美术馆 ), Quehua Rd, Lixia District
content: Visit planning hint: An impressive modern pagoda standing on an island near the center of the lake containing examples of traditional Chinese arts Minghu Art Gallery ( 明湖美术馆 ), Quehua Rd, Lixia District

title: Explore the three treasures ( 寻味三宝 )
content: Food planning hint: Explore the three treasures ( 寻味三宝 ), 260 Sanbao Road, Jingdezhen Jingcheng Town 景德镇竟成镇三宝路260号

title: Jingdezhen International Youth Hostel ( 景德镇国际青年旅舍 )

title: Ancient Kiln Folk Customs Museum ( 古窑民俗博览区 )
content: Visit planning hint: Ancient Kiln Folk Customs Museum ( 古窑民俗博览区 ), 1 Guyao Road, Cidou Avenue, Changjiang District (昌江区瓷都大道古窑路1号) ( The nearest bus stop is Fengshushan (枫树山), which is served by over a dozen bus routes, including routes 1, 2, 3, 6

title: Jingdezhen Imperial Kiln National Archaeological Remains Park ( 景德镇御窑
content: Visit planning hint: Jingdezhen Imperial Kiln National Archaeological Remains Park ( 景德镇御窑厂国家考古遗址公园 ), 187 Zhushan Middle Road, Zhushan District (珠山区珠山中路187号) ( Catch bus no 27 or K26 and get off at the Imperial Kiln Galleries (御窑长廊) )

title: Sanbao Village ( 三宝村 )
content: Visit planning hint: There are many artists' studios, private museums and homestays in Sambo Village Most houses can see ceramic elements

title: Taoxichuan Ceramic Art Avenue
content: Visit planning hint: The old industrial area of red brick buildings and tall coal chimneys was converted into an art district of studios, galleries, and coffee shops It serves as a gathering point every week for artists and students to sell their ceramics

title: East Bus Station ( Buses depart for Yiwu and other eastern regions
content: Transfer hub hint: East Bus Station ( Buses depart for Yiwu and other eastern regions A key station for buses traveling to Yiwu and other destinations in the east

title: South Bus Station ( Bus No. 19 (Railway Station
content: Arrival advice: South Bus Station ( Bus No 19 (Railway Station - South Bus Station) )

title: Nanshan Park ( Dehua Building )
content: Planning hint: So if you come to Jiujiang, you must stop by to see Nanshan Park's Ramei, built according to the mountain, steep stairs will wheeze.The park is not big but full of talent All the way up to the highest point is Dehua Building, standing downstairs you can see Jiujiang city and beautiful Lushan

title: Osmanthus tea cake is a traditional Han nationality spot in Jiujiang City
content: Food planning hint: Osmanthus tea cake is a traditional Han nationality spot in Jiujiang City, Jiangxi Province.Osmanthus tea cake is golden yellow, thin as paper, with "small and fine, thin and crisp, crisp and sweet, fragrant and beautiful" characteristics

title: Poyang Lake crab ( 鄱阳湖螃蟹 )
content: Food planning hint: Crabs are best enjoyed in autumn (September to November) and are widely served in local restaurants around Jiujiang and the Poyang Lake area during the season Poyang Lake crab ( 鄱阳湖螃蟹 )

title: Poyang Lake fish ( 鄱阳湖鱼 )
content: Food planning hint: Steamed white fish，Braised white fish，Steamed mandarin fish.Freshwater fish served steamed or braised, highlighting natural flavors Poyang Lake fish ( 鄱阳湖鱼 )

title: six grain rice dew ( Jiujiang )
content: Planning hint: Jiujiang has a kind of wine very famous, called Jiujiang sealed jar wine.Six grain rice dew and it has quite a connection, it is produced by Jiangxi Fengcang Wine Industry Co Ltd.Inherited intangible cultural heritage technology, drinking six grain rice dew, winter will warm the stomach, summer cool off.It's a very good drink to try

title: Boyang Lake (PoYangHu)
content: Visit planning hint: Boyang Lake (PoYangHu), Located in Jiujiang, Nanchang and Shangrao,it is the largest freshwater lake in China and the second largest lake in China,after Qinghai Lake.Boyang Lake plays a huge role in regulating the water level of the Yangtze River,conserving water sources,improving the local climate and maintaining the ecological balance of the surrounding areas

title: Nanshan Park
content: Visit planning hint: The total land area of the park is 69.12 hectares,of which 47.71 hectares are built in the west side of the mountain,7.55 hectares are built in the center square of the mountain,cultural and leisure square, civic service center, cultural exhibition center and music fountain

title: Stone Bell Hill , Hukou City
content: Visit planning hint: Stone Bell Hill, known as "China's first mountain of ancient strange sounds", is located in Jiujiang City, Jiangxi Province, Hukou County, the old city,the Yangtze River and Poyang Lake intersection.Stone Bell Hill 61.8 meters above sea level, relative height of about 40 meters,an area of 0.2 square kilometers.It is named after the mountains, rocks, water and stone fight each other, striking the sound of a bell ( Stone Bell Hill , Hukou City

title: China Kaifeng Chrysanthemum Cultural Festival
content: Planning hint: The chrysanthemum is the city flower of Kaifeng, and 1,200 varieties are planted there China Kaifeng Chrysanthemum Cultural Festival

title: Yellow River Yellow River ( besides taxis
content: Planning hint: Yellow River Yellow River ( besides taxis, there is a city bus which leaves from near the Northern entrance to Iron Pagoda park (Bus 6) )

title: Diyilou Restaurant
content: Food planning hint: A famous place to get the Kaifeng specialty, baozi, in best quality These baozi contain soup, so be careful when eating them

title: Haiyou Hotel (Kaifeng Xiao Songcheng Branch) ( 海友酒店（开封小宋城店） )
content: Best used as a stay area because Haiyou Hotel (Kaifeng Xiao Songcheng Branch) ( 海友酒店（开封小宋城店） ), Intersection of Yishan Street and Jin'an Road, Longting District

title: Jin Xue Hotel
content: Representative stay option: This old hotel is no-frills, no English speaking staff A few doors south of the PSB on ZhongShan Lu

title: Zuitaibei , Drum Tower Square . Soft music and dance. Warning
content: Planning hint: Zuitaibei , Drum Tower Square Warning: controlled by Hongmen

title: Baogong Memorial Temple ( 包公祠 )
content: Visit planning hint: Baogong Memorial Temple ( 包公祠 ), No.1 Xiangyang Road, Gulou District ( on the shore of Baogong Lake, buses 1 and 20 ) Temple built to honor Lord Bao

title: Iron Pagoda ( 铁塔 )
content: Visit planning hint: It is still in good condition and can be climbed using the internal stairs for CNY 30 (not for the claustrophobic, no viewing platform, just a dead end at the top, but several windows along the way and interesting bricks to look at) There is a Buddhist temple located near the pagoda and a small lake

title: Kaifengfujian Street ( Kaifeng Tourist Theme Park )
content: Visit planning hint: Set on the edge of Baogong Lake this new construction is supposed to be a recreation of old Kaifeng and is of little interest unless you are into hourly parades of people dressed up like Song dynasty officials Kaifengfujian Street ( Kaifeng Tourist Theme Park )

title: Po Pagoda ( 繁塔, pó tǎ ), 30 Po Ta West Road, 禹王台区繁塔西街30号
content: Visit planning hint: Standing nine storeys tall until the Ming dynasty, this stocky three-storey hexagonal pagoda dates to 974, and is covered in large tiles featuring Buddhist figures Po Pagoda ( 繁塔, pó tǎ ), 30 Po Ta West Road, 禹王台区繁塔西街30号

title: The city wall
content: Visit planning hint: Of most interest are the North gate and Little South gate on either end of Jiefeng Road that resemble the arched gates in Xi'an Surrounding the city is the old city walls punctuated at various points with gates

title: Yanqing Taoist Temple ( 延庆观 )
content: Visit planning hint: A small temple containing a two-story pagoda with a beautiful blue glazed tile balcony and painted carvings on the front gate Yanqing Taoist Temple ( 延庆观 ), No.53 Guanqian Street, Gulou District ( Northwest of Kaifeng Mansion )

title: Dinosaur Valley
content: Planning hint: This is a national park displaying more than 70 full dinosaur skeleton fossils found in the area, scattered over the mountains about 75 km away from Kunming Regular buses go from Kunming's West bust terminal

title: Earth Forest
content: Planning hint: Earth Forest, as a representative landscape in the county, comprises Xinhua, Bangguo, Wanbao and Tiger Leaping Beach, covering an area of 50 km² The Earth Forest, the Stone Forest in Kunming and the Colorful Sand Forest in Luliang are called "the Three Forests in Yunnan"

title: Stone Forest ( 石林; Shílín )
content: Planning hint: Stone Forest ( 石林; Shílín ), 70 km southeast of Kunming, about 2 hours by bus from Kunming East Bus station This is a UNESCO listed site of remarkable karst geography

title: Sunshine Golf Club ( 昆明阳光高尔夫俱乐部 )
content: Planning hint: Sunshine Golf Club ( 昆明阳光高尔夫俱乐部 ), 6km Kunming-Qujing Highway, Panlong District (盘龙区昆曲高速公路6公里处) ( the nearest bus stop is a few hundred metres southwest of the golf club at the Xilunanjun Housing Estate (溪麓南郡小区), which is served by bus no Alternatively catch a taxi from the station; the distance from the station to the golf club is about 4 km )

title: Yunnan Art Theater ( 云南艺术剧院 )
content: Planning hint: Yunnan Art Theater ( 云南艺术剧院 ) Dongfeng West Road, Wuhua District (五华区东风西路132-134号; Wǔhuáqū Dōngfēngxīlù) ( about 300 metres northwest of Wuyi Road Station on Metro Line 3; bus routes 5, 10, 26, 52, 66, 82, 84, 98, 116, 124 and k13 )

title: Qujing Pickled Chives Flower
content: Food planning hint: Qujing Pickled Chives Flower was first produced in the Guanxu Year of the Qing Dynasty Main ingredients include chives flower, salt, wine, chili, and brown sugar

title: Red Re-fried Beans
content: Food planning hint: Red Re-fried Beans are a local favorite, consisting (as the name implies) of a red bean re-fried, often in some mixture of flour and powdered chicken broth and meat tenderizer A succulent addition to any traditional meal

title: Smoked Smelly Bean Curd
content: Food planning hint: If you have chance to be at the night snack market in Kunming, remember to experience it yourself Smoked Smelly Bean Curd is one of the popular snacks found in the night snack market in Kunming

title: Sweet Pickled Kaiyuan Chinese Onion
content: Food planning hint: Sweet Pickled Kaiyuan Chinese Onion Kaiyuan is a place in the south Yunnan and it is famous for its delicious sweet pickled Chinese onion It is made of the Chinese onion, salt, chili, brown sugar, wine

title: Sweet Tonghai Peapowder Candy
content: Food planning hint: Sweet Tonghai Peapowder Candy is a famous traditional snack The ingredients of the sweet are quality white sugar, rice cerealose, and roasted pea powder (broad bean or pea)

title: The Eight Treasures of Yunnan
content: Food planning hint: It consists of one hard-skin cake, a ham-stuffed moon part, two crispy white parts stuffed with puree and two crispy parts stuffed with sesame, peanuts, mushroom and rutabaga pickle The Eight Treasures of Yunnan Of all the well-known Yunnan cakes, the Eight Treasures of Yunnan comes first

title: s.Muse ( diagonally across from mask )
content: Planning hint: They have the best location in the whole district s.Muse ( diagonally across from mask )

title: Kunming City Museum ( 昆明市博物馆; Kūnmíngshì Bówùguǎn )
content: Visit planning hint: Kunming City Museum ( 昆明市博物馆; Kūnmíngshì Bówùguǎn ), 93 Tuo East Road, Guandu District (官渡区拓东路93号; Guāndùqū Tuòdōnglù) ( about 1 km east of Tangzixiang Station on Metro Line 2 and about 870 metres south of Tuodong Stadium Station on Metro Line 3 A simple museum whose main attraction is a central pillar taken from an old temple (now destroyed) and other relics from the Dian Kingdom (a tribute state of the Western Song dynasty)

title: Kunming Flying Tigers Memorial ( 昆明飞虎队纪念馆 )
content: Visit planning hint: Kunming Flying Tigers Memorial ( 昆明飞虎队纪念馆 ), 458 Beijing Road, Panlong District (盘龙区北京路458号) ( about 200 m south of Dongfeng Square Station at the intersection of metro lines 2 and 3, directly opposite Chahua Park ) The Flying Tigers were fighter pilots - officially called the American Volunteer Group - who fought the Japanese in China through much of World War II, both before and after the US entered the war

title: Victory over Japan Memorial Hall ( 抗战胜利纪念堂
content: Visit planning hint: Victory over Japan Memorial Hall ( 抗战胜利纪念堂, 抗战胜利堂, Anti-Japanese War Memorial Hall ), 49 Ruixi Road, Wuhua District (五华区云瑞西路49号) ( about 400 meters north of Wuyi Road Metro Station on Line 3 ) Completed in 1947, this was one of the first war memorials to be commissioned in China following the end of the Second World War

title: Yunnan Art Museum ( 云南美术馆 )
content: Visit planning hint: Yunnan Art Museum ( 云南美术馆 ), 118 Wuyi Road, Wuhua District (五华区五一路118号) ( near Exit A of the Wuyi Road Station on Metro Line 3 ) Occupies the building where the Yunnan Provincial Museum (listed below) used to be

title: Yunnan Nationalities Museum ( 云南民族博物馆; Yunnan Minzu Bowuguan )
content: Visit planning hint: Yunnan Nationalities Museum ( 云南民族博物馆; Yunnan Minzu Bowuguan ), 1503 Dianchi Road, Xishan District (西山区滇池路1503号) ( on the north shore of Dianchi Lake; the nearest bus stop is Yunnan Nationalities Village (云南民族村), which is served by bus routes 24, 44, 73, 94, 135, 165, 184, 233, a1, a9 )

title: Yunnan Provincial Museum ( 云南省博物馆; Yúnnánshěng Bówùguǎn )
content: Visit planning hint: Yunnan Provincial Museum ( 云南省博物馆; Yúnnánshěng Bówùguǎn ), 6393 Guangfu Road, Guandu District (官渡区广福路6393号) ( about 2 km southwest of Xingyao Road Station on Metro Line 1; catch bus no z84 from the station if you don't want to walk ) general enquiries) exhibition enquiries)

title: Walk across the Zhongshan Bridge for the night lights
content: Planning hint: Walk across the Zhongshan Bridge for the night lights, people and the immense Yellow river

title: UBC Coffee House ( Shangdao Kafei Ting ), Zhongshan Road ( Opposite Shengli Binguan )
content: Food planning hint: UBC Coffee House ( Shangdao Kafei Ting ), Zhongshan Road ( Opposite Shengli Binguan ) For when you need a Western food break that's consistent wherever you are

title: Jinjiang Sun Hotel ( 锦江阳光酒店 )
content: Best used as a stay area because Jinjiang Sun Hotel ( 锦江阳光酒店 ), 589 Donggang West Road, Chengguan District It has 236 guestrooms, meeting venues, business centre, restaurants, sauna and health club

title: Lanshan Hotel ( Lanshan Binguan ) ( Opposite the train station )
content: Representative stay option: Lanshan Hotel ( Lanshan Binguan ) ( Opposite the train station ) Pleasant enough rooms at decent

title: Five-Spring Mountain ( Wuquanshan Gongyuan )
content: Visit planning hint: (五泉山) A jumble of a poor amusement park and some renovated temples Five-Spring Mountain ( Wuquanshan Gongyuan )

title: Gansu Sanmu Bicycle Museum ( 甘肃三木自行车博物馆 )
content: Visit planning hint: Gansu Sanmu Bicycle Museum ( 甘肃三木自行车博物馆 ), 1 Nanbinhe East Road, Chengguan District (城关区南滨河东路1号) ( take bus no A privately owned museum with a large collection of old bicycles from all over the world

title: Sculptures of the Mother River ( 黄河母亲像 )
content: Visit planning hint: Gansu sculpture by the famous sculptor He E creation, 6 meters long, 2.2 meters wide, 2.6 meters tall, weighing 40 tons, from "mother" and a "baby" of composition Sculptures of the Mother River ( 黄河母亲像 ), Lanzhou City Qilihe District South Binhe middle Road(兰州市七里河区南滨河中路)

title: Waterwheel Garden , Nanbinhe Dong Lu
