content: Visit planning hint: (水车博览园) Small park along the Yellow River housing impressive traditional waterwheels, originally used to irrigate farmland around Lanzhou Waterwheel Garden , Nanbinhe Dong Lu

title: Xiaoxihu Park ( 小西湖公园 )
content: Visit planning hint: A small park, supposedly to be a (poor) replica of the Xihu (West Lake) in Hangzhou Metro Line 1 Xiaoxihu Stn

title: Laoxiaoding ( 老霄顶 )
content: Planning hint: Laoxiaoding ( 老霄顶 ), Shizhong District (市中区) ( about 200 metres southwest of the intersection of Dingdong Street (叮咚街) and Haitang Road (海棠路); from Moruo Square take the road heading north to its end and then along the winding uphill path The park gate will be to your right; the nearest bus stop is the Gas Company (煤气公司) bus stop, which is served by bus routes 6, 8, 10 and 13 )

title: Shumai
content: Food planning hint: Shumai (烧麦) Shumai (烧麦)- a snack with rice and meat wrapped in a thin layer of skin

title: atmospheric old photographs
content: Planning hint: An atmospheric teahouse set within a cluster of old buildings and decorated with old photographs of Leshan and the Grand Buddha 杨家老宅茶馆 ( yángjiā lǎozhái cháguǎn ) - 52 gǔlóu jiē (鼓CNY 街52号)

title: Leshan Giant Buddha Museum ( 乐山大佛博物馆
content: Visit planning hint: Leshan Giant Buddha Museum ( 乐山大佛博物馆, 乐山博物馆 Leshan Museum ), 2345 Lingyun Road, Shizhong District (市中区凌云路2435号) ( take bus no 1 Bridge East Station (岷江一桥东站); the museum is about 2 km north of the Leshan Giant Buddha Scenic Area )

title: Meinü Peak National Forest Park ( 美女峰国家森林公园
content: Visit planning hint: Meinü Peak National Forest Park ( 美女峰国家森林公园, Beauty Peak National Forest Park ), Shawan District (沙湾区) ( take a bus to Shawan from either the Central Bus Station or Lianyun Bus Station, then transfer to bus no Other notable features of the park include Shawan Stone Forest (沙湾石林), a geological formation somewhat similar to the stone forest at Shilin and Lancanggou (澜仓沟), a valley filled with Alsophila spinulosa trees

title: Old City Walls ( 古城墙, 嘉州古城墙 Jiazhou Old City Walls )
content: Visit planning hint: Leshan's old city walls were built during the Northern Zhou Dynasty and rebuilt during the Ming and Qing dynasties 'Iron Bull Gate' ), 148 Binhe Road, 滨河路148号 ( on the river bank in front of the Leshan City Government building )

title: Oriental Buddha Park ( 东方佛都 )
content: Visit planning hint: Oriental Buddha Park ( 东方佛都 ), 362 Lingyun Road, Shizhong District (市中区凌云路362号) ( a short distance south of the Giant Buddha; you will find signs pointing toward the park after you leave the vicinity of the Buddha )

title: Qianwei County Confucian Temple ( 犍为县文庙
content: Visit planning hint: Qianwei County Confucian Temple ( 犍为县文庙, 犍为县文庙博物馆 Qianwei County Confucian Temple Museum ), 297 South Street, Yujin Town, Qianwei County (犍为县玉津镇南街297号) ( take a bus to Qianwei County from Leshan's Central Bus Station; it should take less than an hour to get there; the temple is just a few hundred metres east of the Qianwei County Central Bus Station ) This temple, which is on China's national heritage list, was founded during the Northern Song Dynasty and rebuilt during the Ming Dynasty

title: Wuyou Temple ( 乌尤寺 )
content: Visit planning hint: Wuyou Temple ( 乌尤寺 ), Shizhong District (市中区) ( on a small island southwest of the Leshan Giant Buddha and the Oriental Buddha Park; the island is accessible on foot via a walk bridge ) 1 Apr-7 Oct: 07:30-18:30; 8 Oct-31 Mar: 08:00-17:30

title: Pedicab
content: District movement hint: Pedicab Leshan has many pedicabs that are cheap and convenient for short journeys

title: Blind Massage
content: Planning hint: Blind Massage , #59 Beijing Middle Road, 3rd floor ( at Medical Massage Clinic Lhasa, directly across from the Kichu Hotel ) A vocational project of Braille Without Borders

title: Langma Opera
content: Planning hint: literally "royal music", a traditional Tibetan singing and dancing show

title: Princess Wencheng Live Action Drama ( 《文成公主》实景剧 )
content: Planning hint: Princess Wencheng Live Action Drama ( 《文成公主》实景剧 ), Princess Wencheng Live Action Drama Theatre, Tibetan Culture & Tourism Creativity Park, Cijuelin Village, Chengguan District (城关区慈觉林村中国西藏文化旅游创意园文成公主实景剧场) ( Bus no A large-scale musical based on the life of Princess Wencheng

title: Lhasa Kitchen
content: Food planning hint: Lhasa Kitchen is popular among tourists due to its extensive menu and central location

title: Mayke Ame
content: Food planning hint: Sitting at this second-floor restaurant gives you an amazing view, especially at sunset, of the part of the Barkhor Street which is full of pilgrams moving in clockwise direction Mayke Ame , (Maji A'mi) on the corner of the Barkhor Street, is a popular enchanting bar/restaurant popular with backpackers

title: New Mandala Restaurant
content: Food planning hint: New Mandala Restaurant with roof top Garden, located in front of Jokhang Temple, phone Indian, Nepali, Tibetan and some Western dishes

title: Oxygen
content: Food planning hint: Oxygen in the Four Points Sheraton on Lin Kuo East is a good choice for those homesick after weeks of Chinese food

title: Snowland Restaurant
content: Food planning hint: Snowland Restaurant Tenjieling Road #4, near Jokhang Square, phone Large menu features a mix of Western, Napali, Indian and Tibetan food Good service, good food, very popular

title: Tengyelink Cafe
content: Food planning hint: Tengyelink Cafe has great yak steak, the best food in Lhasa, and a great atmosphere Cheap breakfast options are available

title: Shambhala Palace Hotel
content: Representative stay option: Even though it's close to Jokhang Temple, finding the hotel may require contacting the staff since it's not very easy to locate Very decorated interior with stone and wood and Tibetan curios

title: Gang La Mei Duo
content: Planning hint: Gang La Mei Duo Canvas and watercolor paintings in Tibetan theme hanging all around the wall for sale

title: Low House Music Bar
content: Planning hint: Low House Music Bar features music of India, Nepal and Tibetan traditional music Located in the house of the family of the 11th Dalai Lama

title: Drepung Monastery
content: Visit planning hint: Founded in 1416 by a disciple of Tsong Khapa, was the biggest and richest monastery in Tibet and its lamas helped to train each new young Dalai Lama At its height, Drepung had over 10,000 monks, and governed 700 subsidiary monasteries and owned vast estates

title: Ganden Monastery
content: Visit planning hint: The main halls in the temple are the Main Assembly Hall (or Coqen Hall), Zhacangs, Khangtsens and Myicuns Located on Wangbur Mountain, 47 km (29 miles) from Lhasa City

title: Norbulingka Summer Palace
content: Visit planning hint: It is about 1 km south of the Potala Palace - the Seventh Dalai Lama constructed the first summer palace in 1755 and each successive ruler added his own buildings The complex contains a small zoo, botanical gardens, and a mansion from the 14th Dalai Lhama built in 1956~8

title: The Yak Museum of Tibet ( 西藏牦牛博物馆 )
content: Visit planning hint: The Yak Museum of Tibet ( 西藏牦牛博物馆 ), 6 Chagu Avenue, Liuwu New Area, Doilungdêqên District 堆龙德庆区柳梧新区察古大道6号 ( take bus no A museum about yaks and their importance to Tibetan culture

title: Tibet Museum ( 西藏博物馆 )
content: Visit planning hint: Tibet Museum ( 西藏博物馆 ), 19 Luobu Linka Rd, Chengguan District (城关区罗布林卡路19号) ( bus routes 2, 8, 13 and 24 ) The museum presents a very Chinese view of the "Peaceful Liberation" of Tibet, but the museum is worth a visit

title: Tibet Museum of Natural Science ( 西藏自然科学博物馆 )
content: Visit planning hint: Tibet Museum of Natural Science ( 西藏自然科学博物馆 ), 9 Zangda East Road, Chengguan District (城关区藏大东路9号) ( opposite Tibet University's Najin Campus; bus routes 8 and 34 ) The museum is of course primarily devoted to the natural history of Tibet

title: "Pilgrim buses"
content: District movement hint: "Pilgrim buses" are available in front of Jokhang Temple or at the parking lot near the temple, departing at 06:00-07:00 for destinations outside Lhasa, such as Tsurphu Gompa, Ganden Gompa, Nyemo (Dazi), Phenpo Lhundrub (Linzhou), Meldro Gungkar (Mozhugongka), Chushul (Qushui), Taktse (Dazi), Gongkar (Gongga), and other nearby areas Since you have to have a travel guide with you anyway as a non-Chinese tourist, you can ask them to enquire about this, since it is a more interesting way to travel than always in a private Land Cruiser

title: Bicycle
content: District movement hint: Bicycle hire is available from some hotels or cycle shops and it's a good way to explore if you have half a day free on your tour schedule The best tactic is to stick close to a local cyclist or cycle rickshaw when negotiating busy junctions

title: Minibuses
content: District movement hint: Most of these are also on public bus lines Minibuses operate to areas such as Norbulingka, Sera Monastery, Drepung Monastery, and other nearby sites

title: Biking
content: Planning hint: Ali Baba's will give you a handmade map of smaller surrounding towns that capture the quaint styles of Lijiang without the heavy tourism and the tacky souvenir shops There are at least three towns, ranging from converted hippy communes to remote farming villages

title: Cloud Fir Meadow ( Yunshanping )
content: Planning hint: From the reception centre which is next to Impression Lijiang on the Lijiang-Daju road a fleet of buses transports visitors to a cable car Both bus transfer and cable car costs a total of CNY 110 for a return trip

title: Dry Sea Meadow ( Ganhaizi )
content: Planning hint: The closest chair lift up the mountain to Lijiang It transports visitors to a large meadow located at 3050 m

title: Float styrofoam boats
content: Planning hint: Late in the evening after groups have had significant amounts of alcohol you can see many floating candles sailing down the waterways Along the main streams are girls selling candles that float on delicate flower-shaped styrofoam boats

title: Go hiking to local Naxi villages
content: Planning hint: Get out of Lijiang and discover the real place, by hiking in the Lijiang valley or in the hills to temples, lakes, villages and scenic lookouts Agencies like Lijiang Guides can arrange trips to remote villages, as well as Tiger Leaping Gorge, Lugu Lake and Baoshan stone village

title: Baba
content: Food planning hint: Baba a flat wheatbread available; a savory version sometimes served with chili sauce and a sweeter version that tastes honey-flavored

title: Country Sky
content: Food planning hint: Country Sky , Hongye Street, Shuhe Ancient Village ( Just outside of Lijiang ) Serves lunch and dinner and offers vegetarian and traditional dishes at fair

title: N's Kitchen
content: Food planning hint: N's Kitchen , 2/F, 17 Jishan Alley, Xinyi St ( Find your way to a small square in the old town some people call the grass selling square The entrance is by the southern entrance to the square, across from Susan's Naxi )

title: Naxi style fried white cheese
content: Food planning hint: Naxi style fried white cheese A soft white cheese cut into slices then fried in a non-greasy batter Served with sugar sprinkled on top and very delicious (only seen in restaurants)

title: Qiuyuege Restaurant , 32 Cunwen Sect, Xinhua St
content: Food planning hint: Qiuyuege Restaurant , 32 Cunwen Sect, Xinhua St Free live music and free Internet and WiFi

title: Yak's milk yogurt
content: Food planning hint: Yak's milk yogurt Has a bit of a different flavor than cow's milk yogurt, but very good Commonly served with honey, muesli, and/or fruit

title: After Sunday Guest House ( In ancient Shuhe Village outside of town
content: Representative stay option: After Sunday Guest House ( In ancient Shuhe Village outside of town, just follow Hongye road past the little pond and you will see it on your left ) Quiet and the people who run it are friendly

title: Be With Me Inn ( in ancient Shuhe Village outside of town
content: Representative stay option: Be With Me Inn ( in ancient Shuhe Village outside of town, on a side lane off a street with no name that is referred to as the bar street and meanders along one of the main streams that crisscross the town, it is 5-minute walk from Laosifang Street (the old square) ) The owner is a young woman who speaks little English, but is extra accommodating and provides a wonderful service

title: Guanfang Hotel
content: Representative stay option: Although not in the old town (it's in the new city), you can get a taxi ride from this hotel to the old town's entrance for a reasonable fee (less than CNY 10) The hotel ground area is very big and you have to walk quite a distance from the hotel lobby to your assigned bungalow (containing a number of rooms)

title: New Senlong Hotel , Minzhu Road, Lijiang Old Town
content: Representative stay option: Amenities include 214 deluxe guestrooms, The Mushroom King restaurant, KTV, spa, and roof garden to name a few Four-star traditional Naxi palace-style hotel that is adjacent to Ancient Town

title: Old Cattle Hotel ( from the bus station take the road opposite
content: Representative stay option: Old Cattle Hotel ( from the bus station take the road opposite, turn left up a stone-paved road beside a stone stream, take a left at the top, and you will be in the old town, the hotel will be on the left ) A bit cold in the rooms in winter, but have lots of bed covers

title: Story Inn , 166 Bayi Xia Section, Qiyi St
content: Representative stay option: Very helpful staff, quiet, area, free Wi-Fi in the room, simple breakfast (included in the rate) in the courtyard Rooms equipped with TV, kettle and in-built radiotor heater and heating blankets

title: LMC - Lijiang Millionaire's Club
content: Planning hint: LMC - Lijiang Millionaire's Club , Bai Sui Qiao ( From old town square, either down Qi Yi Street and first left to Bai Sui Qiao, or go along Wu Yi street to the Big Stone Bridge, and go downstream to next stone bridge, Bai Sui Qiao Has free Wi-Fi, live music every night, film nights on Tuesdays, local and imported beers, wines from all over the world, as well as pizza, pasta and Indian meals

title: Stone the Crows
content: Planning hint: Stone the Crows , 134-2 Wenzhi Alley, Wuyi St, Lijiang old town ( half way along the shortcut between Wuyi st and Wen Hua Alley ) Popular with both foreign tourists and locals, this is a great place to escape the busy main streets and guarantees absolutely no karaoke

title: Black Dragon Pool ( 黑龙潭; Hēilóngtán )
content: Visit planning hint: Walk north along the canals from the waterwheels just to the north of the old town It is about 10 minutes walk up-river

title: Dongba Cultural Museum ( 东巴文化博物馆 ) ( Right outside the North entran
content: Visit planning hint: Dongba Cultural Museum ( 东巴文化博物馆 ) ( Right outside the North entrance of Black Dragon Pool ) A small museum featuring the Dongba religion and culture

title: Lashihai Lake Wetland Park ( 拉市海湿地公园
content: Visit planning hint: Lashihai Lake Wetland Park ( 拉市海湿地公园, Lashihai Wetland Park, Lashi Lake Wetland Park ) ( On the south side of Lashihai Lake You can also go horse-riding around the lake

title: Old Tea Horse Road Museum ( 茶马古道博物馆 )
content: Visit planning hint: The museum is housed in a former Buddhist temple, which was historically known as the Dajue Temple (大觉宫) and dates back to the late Ming Dynasty So besides the exhibitions on the Old Tea Horse Road, one can also view some old Buddhist murals

title: Shuhe Old Town ( 束河古镇 )
content: Visit planning hint: Shuhe Old Town ( 束河古镇 ), Shuhe Road, Gucheng District (古城区束河路) ( About 8km north of Lijiang OId Town Better than Lijiang if you want a place less commercialized; a horse ride in the town is an attraction

title: Zhiyun Monastery ( 指云寺
content: Visit planning hint: Zhiyun Monastery ( 指云寺, 指云禅寺 ), Hainan Village, Lashi Township, Yulong Naxi Autonomous County (玉龙纳西族自治县拉市乡海南村) ( Near Lashihai Lake Unlike many other sights in Lijiang, the monastery has so far resisted commercialisation and sees relatively few tourists

title: Luoyang Marriott Hotel , 288 Kaiyuan Avenue, Luolong District
content: Best used as a stay area because Luoyang Marriott Hotel , 288 Kaiyuan Avenue, Luolong District Opened in mid-2024, this standard Marriott hotel features a 26th-floor lounge overlooking Kaiyuan Lake for an additional fee

title: Luoyangmingyuan Youth Hostel
content: Representative stay option: Luoyangmingyuan Youth Hostel , 20 Jiefang North Road ( about 5 minutes walk from the railway station ) Clean rooms with air conditioning and breakfast included

title: Nanyuan Express Hotel ( 洛阳南苑快捷酒店 Luòyáng Nányuàn Kuàijiéjiǔdiàn )
content: Best used as a stay area because Nanyuan Express Hotel ( 洛阳南苑快捷酒店 Luòyáng Nányuàn Kuàijiéjiǔdiàn ), South end of Nanchang Road, Jianxi District (涧西区南昌路南段231号 Jiànxīqū Nánchānglùnánduàn) Listed rates for doubles from CNY 198, discounted from CNY 130, including breakfast

title: Duke of Zhou Temple Museum ( 洛阳周公庙博物馆 )
content: Visit planning hint: Duke of Zhou Temple Museum ( 洛阳周公庙博物馆 ), 21 Dingding South Road, Laocheng District (老城区定鼎南路21号) ( about 100 meters north of the intersection of Dingding South Road and Kaixuan Road; take bus no A memorial temple dedicated to the Duke of Zhou, a famous statesmen and aristocrat who acted as the regent of the Zhou Dynasty from 1042 BC to 1035 BC

title: Eighth Route Army Luoyang Office Museum ( 八路军驻洛办事处纪念馆 )
content: Visit planning hint: Between 1938 and 1942, the mansion served as the Luoyang office of the Eighth Route Army, a Communist controlled group army that was created from the Red Army when the Communists and the Nationalists formed the Second United Front against Japan Eighth Route Army Luoyang Office Museum ( 八路军驻洛办事处纪念馆 ), 222 Jiudu East Road, Laocheng District (老城区九都东路222号) ( bus nos

title: Guanlin Temple ( 关林庙 )
content: Visit planning hint: Guanlin Temple ( 关林庙 ), 2 Guanlin South Road, Luolong District (洛龙区关林南路2号) ( bus 81 from the train station stops near here (at the intersection of Longmen Ave and Guanlin Rd) and then continues on to the Longmen Grottoes; there is also a bus stop just outside the temple, which is served by bus nos The temple is built over the mausoleum which houses the general god's head, and contains several halls dedicated to the deified man

title: Longmen Grottoes ( 龙门石窟 Lóngmén Shíkū )
content: Visit planning hint: Longmen Grottoes ( 龙门石窟 Lóngmén Shíkū ), 12 kilometers south of Luoyang ( on the banks of Yi River ) One of the finest Buddhist rock sculptural sites in China and a UNESCO World Heritage Site

title: Luoyang Ancient Art Museum ( 洛阳古代艺术博物馆
content: Visit planning hint: Luoyang Ancient Art Museum ( 洛阳古代艺术博物馆, previously known as the Luoyang Ancient Tombs Museum 洛阳古墓博物馆 ), 45 Airport Road, Laocheng District (老城区机场路45号) ( 3 km east of the airport parking lot; take a bus to the airport, then walk or catch a taxi from there ) Fascinating museum with reconstructed and unearthed tombs from the Western Han dynasty to the Northern Song Dynasty (

title: Luoyang Folk Museum ( 洛阳民俗博物馆 )
content: Visit planning hint: Luoyang Folk Museum ( 洛阳民俗博物馆 ), 433 Xin Street, Laocheng District (老城区新街433号) ( the nearest bus stop is the Xin Street & Jiudu East Road Intersection (新街九都东路口), which is served by bus nos 3, 16, 22, 42, 57, 86, 90, d3 and v8 )

title: RiverWalk ( between #2 and #3 bridges )
content: Planning hint: During the summer there are numerous beer gardens and outdoor teahouses, and year-round there are permanent tea and coffee houses bordering the walk on the first floor of apartment and condo skyscrapers Early in the morning you will see groups of Tai Chi followers rhythmically going through their paces and exercises, or perhaps catch a band or flag corps practicing in adjacent Iron Ox Square

title: Grandma's Kitchen
content: Food planning hint: A range of different cuts of steaks available (priced under CNY 100) and a variety of pastas (less than CNY 50) Grandma's Kitchen , 8 Tie Niu Road ( near the fountain in Tie Nui square )

title: Guokui ( Chinese-style fried dumpling )
content: Food planning hint: In the middle of the pot Guokui there is a "dragon's eye" like pot Guokui head, the dragon's eye out, out, the whole pot Guokui layer by layer spinning without breaking, the pot Guokui layer by layer are crispy; Mixed pot Guokui: its speciality is bubbling, the pot Guokui bubbles up to the old high; Crispy pot Guokui: famous for its fragrance, with a variety of fillings, pot Guokui with a red mark on the pot Guokui, oily; and there is also sesame pot Guokui, Glutinous Rice Pot Kui, Cured Meat or Marinated Meat Sandwich Pot Kui, and Pot Kui with various flavours and meat fillings, up to more than 20 varieties Guokui ( Chinese-style fried dumpling ), In any street you can see a shop selling pots and pans

title: Old House (Liao Fangzi) ( across the river in the shadow of Fule Mtn
content: Food planning hint: Favorites include the beef & bamboo and the beef with fruit, in addition to more traditional local dishes Not much English spoken here, so bring a local friend along to help out

title: RiverWalk Beer Gardens
content: Planning hint: Cold, inexpensive beer and delicious street food and appetizers are available as both large and small groups of friends gather to enjoy the good life Throughout the summer and early fall there are numerous outdoor beer gardens lining the riverwalk adjacent to Iron Ox Square

title: SPR Coffee , On Iron Ox Square (Tien Niu Guangchang) ( near Yong Tuo Yang Luo complex
content: Planning hint: SPR Coffee , On Iron Ox Square (Tien Niu Guangchang) ( near Yong Tuo Yang Luo complex Excellent coffee house with a limited but tasty menu

title: Wu Ba Ba (588) Dumpling House
content: Planning hint: Simple setting and no-frills service, but you can't beat the dumplings or the A wide variety of the best jiaozi, or dumplings, in Mianyang

title: Jiuhuang Mountain Scenic Area ( 九皇山景区 )
content: Visit planning hint: Covering about 25 square kilometers, the area includes hunting grounds, caves, cableways, hot springs, resorts, and folk culture parks, combining natural landscapes with cultural elements Jiuhuang Mountain Scenic Area ( 九皇山景区 ), Beichuan Qiang Autonomous County ( Yongcheng Village )

title: Tie Niu Square ( Iron Ox Square，铁牛广场 ), Tie Niu Road
content: Visit planning hint: There are locals selling antiques and small household goods around the back of the square Tie Niu Square ( Iron Ox Square，铁牛广场 ), Tie Niu Road

title: 绵阳跃进路工业历史街区 ( Yuejin Road Industrial History Block )
content: Visit planning hint: A well-preserved street that tells the story of Mianyang's development as a "Science and Technology City." The architecture from the 1950s-1980s, old factories turned into cafes, and informative plaques offer a nostalgic glimpse into China's industrial past 绵阳跃进路工业历史街区 ( Yuejin Road Industrial History Block ), Yuejin Road, Fucheng District
tags: 绵阳跃进路工业历史街区

title: Century egg wonton
content: Food planning hint: Century egg wonton is made of century egg and fresh pork, and then mixed with spices to make wonton stuffing Wonton soup includes dried shrimps and laver, so that the soup bottom and century egg wonton can be better integrated

title: Crock soup
content: Food planning hint: "Lu's Spring and Autumn · Benwei" recorded the true meaning of simmering soup: "Where the essence of taste, water is the most beginning, five flavors and three materials, nine boiling nine changes, then become to taste", thousands of years of historical records and precipitation, make it unique Today's pot soup is famous in Nanchang area of Jiangxi Province.Edible effect: supplement nutrition, strengthen the body tonifying deficiency, puzzle refreshing

title: Nanchang poaching
content: Food planning hint: Poaching is a common cooking method, but in Nanchang, unique seasonings from Jiangxi are used, resulting in a spicy taste The most unique among them is the ingredient called footboard (jiao'ban)

title: Bar Newz Heng Mao, Star-walk, DingGong Rd
content: Planning hint: A friendly western style bar serving all the usual beers and some imported beers and larger, cocktails by the dozen and real western bar snacks, the ones you are missing while your here in China Bar Newz Heng Mao, Star-walk, DingGong Rd

title: Bossa Nova Garden
content: Planning hint: Bossa Nova Garden , 69 Feihong Lu, Honggutan (west of river) 南昌市红谷滩新区飞虹路69号（博泰江滨1号CNY ( in Honggutan (west of Gan river), a few streets south of Bayi Bridge ) Just watch out for the "falling" glass bottles from the apartment building above

title: CD 1925 , Fuzhou Road
content: Planning hint: Interesting bar that has four different rooms laid out like a labyrinth If you are drunk it makes for a terribly confusing night

title: Robot Head ( near Bayi Lake )
content: Planning hint: Interesting bar/club with several floors and clubbing rooms Robot Head ( near Bayi Lake )

title: Jiangxi Provincial Museum ( 江西省博物馆 )
content: Visit planning hint: Jiangxi Provincial Museum ( 江西省博物馆 ), 2 Xinzhou Road, Donghu District (东湖区新洲路2号) ( Metro Line 1, Tengwang Pavilion Station, Exit 2 ) A new home for the museum is being constructed on Ganjiang Avenue North (赣江北大道)

title: Nanchang Sunac Park ( 南昌融创乐园 ), No
content: Visit planning hint: January 1-September 28: Monday to Friday 10:00-18:00; 29 September-31 December: Monday to Sunday 09:30-21:30 Nanchang Sunac Park ( 南昌融创乐园 ), No

title: River Edge Light Show ( along the Gan River )
content: Visit planning hint: Go check out the show from Honggutan Side at the Fountain (walk along the water south from BaYi bridge) Only possible by fiat authority in a place like China, the light-show is created by every sky-scraper along the Gan river being outfitted with LEDs, and they are all centrally synchronized

title: The Star of Nanchang ( 南昌之星 )
content: Visit planning hint: Formerly the world's tallest Ferris wheel (they still say it is), with a height of 160 m The Star of Nanchang ( 南昌之星 )

title: Jiangsu Centre for the Performing Arts (JCPA) ( 江苏大剧院 )
content: Planning hint: Jiangsu Centre for the Performing Arts (JCPA) ( 江苏大剧院 ), 181 Mengdu Avenue, Jianye District (建邺区梦都大街181号) ( about 1 km northwest of Olympic Stadium Station on Metro Line 10; bus no 166 terminates at a bus stop near the east gate )

title: Jiangsu Province Kunqu Theatre ( 江苏省昆剧院 ), No
content: Planning hint: 2 Chaotian Palace, Qinhuai District (秦淮区朝天宫2号) ( about 840 m west of Zhangfuyuan Station on Metro Line 1 and about 920 m south of Shanghai Road Station on Metro Line 2; bus routes 43, 302 and 306 ) This highly-regarded theater company in Nanjing will give you a chance to see Kunqu Opera, a traditional Chinese art form, firsthand

title: Royal Tangshan Hotel
content: Planning hint: Royal Tangshan Hotel - Hot Spring & Spa ( 汤山御庭臻品酒店 ), 8 Quanyun Road, Tangshan Subdistrict, Jiangning District (江宁区汤山街道泉韵路8号) ( express buses to Tangshan depart from Nanjing South Railway Station With easy access from Huning Highway that provides accessible public or private transportation, Tangshan is the perfect place to enjoy the relaxing pleasures offered by the natural hot springs

title: A Simple Diet
content: Food planning hint: If you can't read Chinese and you're a bit picky on what you eat, there's an excellent restaurant called A Simple Diet , located just off Hunan Road (next to McDonald's) Here they have taken the Japanese innovation of recreating the menu items in plastic so that you can simply point and order

title: BBQ joint
content: Food planning hint: These smokey little restaurants offer spicy meat kebabs (usually beef or lamb) along with BBQ'd vegetables, bread, fish and even sticky-rice balls and also serve beer starting at about CNY 4 per bottle Look for 真火烧烤 on baidu maps for a cheap and authentic Chinese BBQ experience, or 丽哲韩式烧烤 in the alley across from the gas station near the east gate of Nanjing Normal University for a more upscale Korean version

title: If you want to self-cater of just stock up on snacks/drinks then Nanjing has ple
content: Food planning hint: The main supermarkets in the central area are Times Extra (on Zhongyang Lu close to Xinmofan Lu subway station), Lotus (near Zhongyangmen Bus Station), Walmart (on the 2nd floor of Wanda Plaza Mall in Xinjiekou) and Carrefour (on Zhongshan Dong Lu) If you want to self-cater of just stock up on snacks/drinks then Nanjing has plenty of supermarkets and convenience stores

title: If you want to self-cater of just stock up on snacks/drinks then Nanjing has plenty of sup
content: Food planning hint: The main supermarkets in the central area are Times Extra (on Zhongyang Lu close to Xinmofan Lu subway station), Lotus (near Zhongyangmen Bus Station), Walmart (on the 2nd floor of Wanda Plaza Mall in Xinjiekou) and Carrefour (on Zhongshan Dong Lu) If you want to self-cater of just stock up on snacks/drinks then Nanjing has plenty of supermarkets and convenience stores

title: Les 5 Sens ( 乐尚法国餐厅 )
content: Food planning hint: French restaurant with a French chef and a cosy atmosphere, providing traditional and family homemade French dishes Les 5 Sens ( 乐尚法国餐厅 ), 52-1 Hankou Lu ( near Shanghai road )

title: Street food is safe, cheap, and tasty
content: Food planning hint: In the Nanjing University Gulou Campus area, three great spots are on the intersection of Ninghai Road and Hankou Xi Road (宁海路和汉口西路) near the east gate of Nanjing Normal University, at the south gate of Nanjing University on Guangzhou Road (南京大学鼓CNY 校区广州路校门), and on Hankou road (汉口路) between the two gates of Nanjing University Just walk around the streets after 22:00 and you'll inevitably find some barbecue, wonton, fried noodles, or fried rice

title: Subway
content: Food planning hint: You can find inexpensive, Western-style sandwiches at the popular American sub shop Subway , which has four stores in Nanjing; two in the Carrefour stores, one in the Golden Wheel shopping mall, and one in the popular Da Yang department store The Walmart (wa-er-ma) in Xinjiekou has an extensive grocery and live foods market on the basement level

title: noodle (miantiao), wonton (hundun), and pot sticker (jiaozi) shops
content: Food planning hint: Qingdao Lu, a secondary street running northbound before the intersection of Shanghai Lu and Guangzhou Lu has a few excellent miantiao shops, including a Hui restaurant (Hui are a Chinese ethnic group that practices Islam), which serves only mutton and beef Nanjing has dozens of small noodle (miantiao), wonton (hundun), and pot sticker (jiaozi) shops on many of its streets

title: Holiday Inn @Aqua City ( 水游城
content: Representative stay option: Holiday Inn @Aqua City ( 水游城, Shuǐ yóu chéng ), No.1 Jiangkang Road at Zhonghua Road ( corner of Jiangkang road and Zhonghua Road, near Sanshanjie subway station on line 1 ) Great quality Holiday Inn hotel adjacent to Aqua City shopping center

title: International Conference Hotel Nanjing ( 南京国际会议大酒店 )
content: Representative stay option: International Conference Hotel Nanjing ( 南京国际会议大酒店 ), 2 Sifangcheng Zhongshanling Claimed 4-star with views of Purple Mountain

title: Nanjing Danfeng International Hotel ( 丹凤国际青年旅館 )
content: Representative stay option: Nanjing Danfeng International Hotel ( 丹凤国际青年旅館 ), 59-1 Yushi Street, North Floor 6 (三十路鱼市街站旁的华诚超市六CNY ) Small dorm rooms (3 people/room) from about CNY 50, larger single & double rooms from about CNY 160

title: Nanjing Fuzimiao International Youth Hostel ( 南京夫子庙国际青年旅社 )
content: Best used as a stay area because Nanjing Fuzimiao International Youth Hostel ( 南京夫子庙国际青年旅社 ), 68 Pingjiangfu Rd, Qinhuai District (秦淮区平江府路68号) A very good location right next to the most popular tourist street in Nanjing and is in the middle of the city

title: White Palace Hotel ( 南京白宫大酒店 (Baigong Dajiudian) )
content: Representative stay option: White Palace Hotel ( 南京白宫大酒店 (Baigong Dajiudian) ), 1 Longpan Road (Longpan Lu) Xuanwu Near Nanjing Railway Station

title: Bassment Bar ( On the southeast side of 鼓CNY 区广州路140号随园大厦 on th
content: Planning hint: Bassment Bar ( On the southeast side of 鼓CNY 区广州路140号随园大厦 on the northeast corner of Shanghai Road and Guangzhou Road Live music almost every night and a good atmosphere, very spacious

title: Ellen's bar ( around intersection of 笼子巷 and 啤亭巷
content: Planning hint: Ellen's bar ( around intersection of 笼子巷 and 啤亭巷, one block west of 太平北路 ) Although there's no dance floor there's many people dancing between tables and in any

title: Ellen's bar ( intersection of Shanghai Lu and Guangzhou Lu )
content: Planning hint: It is a western-style restaurant during the day and transitions into a bar around 20:00 every night A whiskey and Coke "bucket" is CNY 25, and for many people contains enough alcohol to last the night

title: Art Museum of Nanjing University of the Arts (AMNUA) ( 南京
content: Visit planning hint: Art Museum of Nanjing University of the Arts (AMNUA) ( 南京艺术学院美术馆 ), 15 North Huju Road, Gulou District (鼓CNY 区虎踞北路15号) ( 700 m north of Caochangmen Station on Metro Line 4 ) The Art Museum of Nanjing University of the Arts is a contemporary exhibition space that integrates artistic display with academic research

title: Art Museum of Nanjing University of the Arts (AMNUA) ( 南京艺术学院美术馆 )
content: Visit planning hint: Art Museum of Nanjing University of the Arts (AMNUA) ( 南京艺术学院美术馆 ), 15 North Huju Road, Gulou District (鼓CNY 区虎踞北路15号) ( 700 m north of Caochangmen Station on Metro Line 4 ) The Art Museum of Nanjing University of the Arts is a contemporary exhibition space that integrates artistic display with academic research

title: Hongshan Forest Zoo ( 红山森林动物园 )
content: Visit planning hint: Hongshan Forest Zoo ( 红山森林动物园 ), 168 Heyan Road, Xuanwu District (玄武区和燕路168号) ( Hongshan Zoo Station, Metro Line 1 ) CNY 40 (adults), CNY 20 (students and children over 1.4 metres in height)

title: Jiangsu Art Museum (New Branch) ( 江苏省美术馆新馆 )
content: Visit planning hint: Jiangsu Art Museum (New Branch) ( 江苏省美术馆新馆 ), 333 Changjiang Road, Xuanwu District (玄武区长江路333号) ( about 450 m east of Daxinggong Station at the intersection of metro lines 2 and 3 ) customer service) exhibition enquiries) 09:00-17:00, no entry after 16:30, closed on Mondays

title: Jiangsu Art Museum (Old Branch) ( 江苏省美术馆老馆 )
content: Visit planning hint: Jiangsu Art Museum (Old Branch) ( 江苏省美术馆老馆 ), 266 Changjiang Road, Xuanwu District (玄武区长江路266号) ( about 200 m north-northwest of Daxinggong Station at the intersection of metro lines 2 and 3 ) customer service) exhibition enquiries) 09:00-17:00, no entry after 16:30, closed on Mondays

title: Qinhuai River ( 秦淮河 )
content: Visit planning hint: The river used to be called Huai River, and it is said that the river was channeled to the city of Nanjing during the reign of Emperor Qin Shi Huang, so it was named Qinhuai River from then on Taking the painted boats to cruise on the Qinhuai River, visitors can not only admire the sights along the river but can also experience the traditional culture of Nanjing

title: Xuanwu Lake Park ( 玄武湖公园 )
content: Visit planning hint: Xuanwu Lake Park ( 玄武湖公园 ), 1 Xuanwu Lane, Xuanwu District (玄武区玄武巷1号) ( The park's main entrance is a short distance east of Xuanwumen Station on Metro Line 1 ) Has three islands in the middle all linked by causeways, complete with an amusement park for kids, a small zoo, and lots of great views of the city and Purple Mountain

title: Yuhuatai Scenic Area ( 雨花台风景名胜区 )
content: Visit planning hint: The park contains a number of different sights, the best known of which is perhaps the Yuhuatai Matyrs' Cemetery (雨花台烈士陵园), which contains the remains of soldiers who fought in the Red Army during the Chinese Civil War Yuhuatai Scenic Area ( 雨花台风景名胜区 ), 215 Yuhua Road, Yuhuatai District (雨花台区雨花路215号) ( to get the east gate, take bus no

title: Line 1 runs from Maigaoqiao in the north to the China Pharmaceutical University
content: Transfer hub hint: There are 3 interchanges: to Line 2 at Xinjiekou stations in the city centre, to Line 10 at Andemen Station, and to Line S1 at Nanjing South Railway Station Line 1 runs from Maigaoqiao in the north to the China Pharmaceutical University (CPU) in the south, via Nanjing Railway Station and Nanjing South Railway Station

title: Line 10 runs from Andemen
content: Transfer hub hint: Line 10 runs from Andemen, via the Olympic New Town area around the Olympic Sports Centre, crossing the Yangtze River to the west, terminating the Yushanlu station in Pukou area There are interchanges to Line 2 at Yuantong stationt, and to Line 1 at Andemen stations

title: Line 2 runs from the Olympic New Town area in the west and follows Hanzhong Lu a
content: Transfer hub hint: There are interchanges to Line 1 at Xinjiekou stations in the city centre, and to Line 10 at Yuantong station Line 2 runs from the Olympic New Town area in the west and follows Hanzhong Lu and Zhongshan Donglu to the east, terminating nearby the Purple Mountain scenic area

title: Line 2 runs from the Olympic New Town area in the west and follows Hanzhong Lu and Zhongsh
content: Transfer hub hint: There are interchanges to Line 1 at Xinjiekou stations in the city centre, and to Line 10 at Yuantong station Line 2 runs from the Olympic New Town area in the west and follows Hanzhong Lu and Zhongshan Donglu to the east, terminating nearby the Purple Mountain scenic area

title: Little Fat Sheep ( Xiaofeiyang ), Dongege Rd and Henyang Rd
content: Food planning hint: Little Fat Sheep ( Xiaofeiyang ), Dongege Rd and Henyang Rd Chain serving traditional hotpot, with lamb the meat of choice

title: Old Chengdu , Youai Rd ( just off Dongge Rd in the south )
content: Food planning hint: Old Chengdu , Youai Rd ( just off Dongge Rd in the south )

title: Other mid-range places a short walk from Nanning Main Railway Station are Phoenix Hotel
content: Representative stay option: Other mid-range places a short walk from Nanning Main Railway Station are Phoenix Hotel, Vake, and Vienna You'll see them from the station precinct

title: Guangxi Art Museum ( 广西美术馆 )
content: Visit planning hint: Guangxi Art Museum ( 广西美术馆 ), 22 Qiuyue Road, Wuxiang New District (五象新区秋月路22号) ( Bus route 99 from Qiuyue Pingle Cross (秋月平乐路口) bus stop, which is just a few hundred metres south of exit C of Qingge Lu (庆歌路) 3 Metro Station ) 09ː30-16ː30, no entry after 16ː00, closed on Mondays (public holidays excepted)

title: Guangxi Natural Resources Museum and Archives ( 广西自然资源档案博物馆 )
content: Visit planning hint: The museum has eight major exhibition halls: the Earth Hall, Palaeontology Hall, Mineral Resources Hall, Geological Environment Hall, Land Resources Hall, Marine Resources Hall, Geodetic Surveying Hall, and Jewellery and Gemstone Hall Guangxi Natural Resources Museum and Archives ( 广西自然资源档案博物馆 ), 2 Zhongma Road, Qingxiu District (青秀区中马路2号) ( across from the North Gate of Qingxiu Mountain )

title: Guangxi Planning Exhibition Hall ( 广西规划馆 )
content: Visit planning hint: Guangxi Planning Exhibition Hall ( 广西规划馆 ), 8 Songxiang Road, Liangqing District (良庆区宋厢路8号) ( take bus no 15 from Jiangnan Coach Station Metro Station on Metro Line 2, bus no

title: Guangxi Science and Technology Museum ( 广西科技馆 )
content: Visit planning hint: Guangxi Science and Technology Museum ( 广西科技馆 ), 20 Minzu Avenue, Qingxiu District (青秀区民族大道20号) ( Xinminlu Station, Metro Line 1 ) enquiries) The museum cinema charges CNY 20 per head

title: Nanning Museum ( 南宁博物馆 )
content: Visit planning hint: Nanning Museum ( 南宁博物馆 ), 15 Longdi Road, Liangqing District (良庆区龙堤路15号) ( Bus routes 107 and 117; you can catch bus 107 from Dashatian Square, which is near the Dashatian Station on Metro Line 2 ) 09ː00-16ː30, no entry after 16ː00, closed on Mondays

title: Natural History Museum of Guangxi ( 广西自然博物馆 )
content: Visit planning hint: Natural History Museum of Guangxi ( 广西自然博物馆 ), Nanning People's Park, 1-1 Renmin Road East, Xingning District (兴宁区人民东路1-1号南宁人民公园内) ( on the east side of Nanning People's Park, which is about 1.5 km east of the Nanning Railway Station ) 09ː00-16ː30, closed on Mondays (public holidays excepted)

title: 5 runs southwest to northeast
content: District movement hint: 5 runs southwest to northeast, from Guokai Avenue (国凯大道) to Jinqiao Coach Station (金桥客运站)

title: Boat Trip
content: Planning hint: You can hire an e-boat for a few hundred yuan and it is worthwhile doing it in the evening when the lights come on and the fountains go splashing around 19:00 Boat Trip Along the Hao He river is a treat in the evening

title: Angels Bar
content: Planning hint: Angels Bar , on the corner of Nanda Jie and Haonan Lu, a few doors east from the Youfei Hotel located inside the MingDu Plaza Bring your laptop and a friend cause Angels also offers free WiFi internet connection, pool table, beer pong, foosball, and satellite tv

title: Camino
content: Planning hint: Clean and cheap bar with friendly staff and wide collection of music, most of which has been donated by visiting expats Camino , south of the Victoria Hotel on Chengshan Lu

title: Captains Bar and Grill
content: Planning hint: It has great lunch specials, happy hour every night, and free WiFi internet access Captains Bar and Grill , QingNian Lu, near the SanTeh Hotel

title: Chef Richard Bar and Grill Café
content: Planning hint: Chef Richard Bar and Grill Café , Haonan Lu, a few doors west from the Youfei Hotel Serves Western food, and offers free WiFi network connection

title: Nantong Shipyard has a row of about twenty bars! Most are aimed at seamen stopping in the
content: Planning hint: Most are aimed at seamen stopping in the port, which makes them a little sleazy, though they have character and can be good fun Nantong Shipyard has a row of about twenty bars!

title: Scotland Bar
content: Planning hint: Scotland Bar just a few doors down from Camino this place has a warm and friendly atmosphere and fantastic staff and regulars

title: Cao Gong Zhu Memorial Temple
content: Visit planning hint: The Cao Gong Zhu Memorial Temple commemorates a local hero who defended the city against Japanese pirates in 1557

title: China Audit Museum ( 中国审计博物馆 )
content: Visit planning hint: China Audit Museum ( 中国审计博物馆 ) A museum that looks at accounting and auditing

title: Nantong Forest Safari Park ( 南通森林野生动物园 )
content: Visit planning hint: Nantong Forest Safari Park ( 南通森林野生动物园 ), No.299, Tong Liu Road, Chongchuan District ( Bus 108, 605 direct to Nantong Forest Safari Park )

title: Nantong Medical College
content: Visit planning hint: Nantong Medical College was founded in the first decade of 20th century Visit the college at evening; you may see hustle and bustle

title: Nantong Overseas Chinese Museum ( 南通华侨博物馆 )
content: Visit planning hint: Nantong Overseas Chinese Museum ( 南通华侨博物馆 ), 19 Haonan Road, Chongchuan District (崇川区濠南路19号) ( part of the Nantong Museum complex ) MULTIPLE The only Overseas Chinese museum in the Yangtze River Delta region

title: Nantong Textile Museum ( 南通纺织博物馆 )
content: Visit planning hint: Opened in 1985 as a tribute to the city's long association with the weaving industries, the museum was the first of its kind in China and boast six exhibition halls as well as courtyards and gardens Nantong Textile Museum ( 南通纺织博物馆 )

title: Moon Lake ( 月湖, Yuèhú )
content: Planning hint: It's a lively area - at some times of day the park is full of residents dancing or doing tai chi A crescent-shaped lake surrounded by a park with traditional plazas and pagodas

title: Ningbo Delson Green World Golf Club
content: Planning hint: 18-hole golf course with 6 artificial lakes, par 72, 7200 yards Ningbo Delson Green World Golf Club

title: Ningbo Five Dragon Pool ( 五龙潭 )
content: Planning hint: A taxi service is available for those that are not interested in hiking to the top, but want to see the mountain ranges in a convenient setting This park has a small waterfall, several hundred year old temple, and scenic hiking trails alongside the mountains

title: Sun Lake ( 日湖公园 ) ( Nijiayan station, metro line 2 )
content: Planning hint: The yang to Moon Lake's yin, this newer park has a large lake, ponds, fountains, forest, playgrounds, and plazas Sun Lake ( 日湖公园 ) ( Nijiayan station, metro line 2 )

title: Zhaobaoshan ( 招宝山 )
content: Planning hint: A large forested hill where the Yong River empties into the ocean, it has several rebuilt temples, a 57.6m-tall pagoda you can climb since the elevator seems to be broken, Sanskrit inscriptions on exposed rock, a grotto, and remnants of multiple small defensive walls Zhaobaoshan ( 招宝山 ), 10 Zhaobaoshan Road, Zhenhai District (镇海区招宝山路10号) ( About 1.2 km away from Zhaobaoshan station, metro line 2 ; take Bus 27 or 396 from the metro station )

title: ZheDong Grand Canyon ( 浙东大峡谷 )
content: Planning hint: Huge sweeping views of lush green countryside, water runs through the canyon as you follow a rough and ready trail ZheDong Grand Canyon ( 浙东大峡谷 ) China Ninghai County Baixi Village, Chakou Town

title: Banana Leaf Curry House ( 老外滩中马路69号 ), Zhongma Lu 69 Hao, Lao Waitan
content: Food planning hint: The English-speaking staff gladly advises on their offerings and are more than happy tosurprise you with a selection of their meals Banana Leaf Curry House ( 老外滩中马路69号 ), Zhongma Lu 69 Hao, Lao Waitan

title: Da Bossi Ristorante , 139 Zhongma Lu, Lao Waitan 老外滩中马路139号
content: Food planning hint: Da Bossi Ristorante , 139 Zhongma Lu, Lao Waitan 老外滩中马路139号 A very fine and fancy Italian

title: O'Reilly's
content: Food planning hint: Steaks, burgers, appetizers, all day breakfast, and low priced sub sandwiches (CNY 25/6 inch; yen;35/12 inch) Beer selection is good, and although the imported beers are a bit pricey, before 20:00 most draft beers are buy one get one free, and after 20:00 buy two get one free

title: Picanha Brazilian BBQ ( 比卡亚巴西烧烤 )
content: Food planning hint: Picanha Brazilian BBQ ( 比卡亚巴西烧烤 ), No.1-4 Lane 230 Jiefang South Road, 2nd Floor of Century Plaza (宁波市解放南路230弄1-4号大梁街口世纪广场二CNY ) Pretty good Brazilian BBQ, buffet style

title: Pizza Pino
content: Food planning hint: The only place in Ningbo with a wood-fired oven but ruins the pizza by not using buffalo mozzarella Pizza Pino , 1041B, Zone C, Heyi Avenue Shopping Center, 66 Heyi Lu 和义路66号和义大道购物中心C区1041B

title: n Ganesha Indian Restaurant ( 葛尼沙印度餐厅 )
content: Food planning hint: n Ganesha Indian Restaurant ( 葛尼沙印度餐厅 ), 336 Zhenming Road, Haishu District ( 海曙区镇明路336号镇明小区 ) Delicious, authentic Indian cuisine

title: Nanyuan Hotel , 2 Lingqiao Rd, Haishu District
content: Best used as a stay area because Nanyuan Hotel , 2 Lingqiao Rd, Haishu District Some of its amenities include Health Club (spa, sauna, steam bath, heated pool, and exercise gym), outdoor tennis court, and barber shop and beauty salon

title: Ningbo Hotel , Ma Yuan Rd 251
content: Representative stay option: Though it is a rather old hotel, it was renovated in 2005 Ningbo Hotel , Ma Yuan Rd 251

title: Ningbo Kylie Hotel
content: Best used as a stay area because Ningbo Kylie Hotel , Jicao Jie 76 Hao ( downtown Jiangdong District near Sheraton )

title: Ningbo Lizhai International Youth Hotel , 77 Gongqing Rd ( near Moon Lake )
content: Representative stay option: Ningbo Lizhai International Youth Hotel , 77 Gongqing Rd ( near Moon Lake ) 4 bed dorms CNY 45, singles CNY 80-120

title: Barfly , Tian Yi Sq, No
content: Planning hint: The young and beautiful with stacks of cash flock to this bar 7 gate, 11C area, 3F 宁 波天一广场7号 门11C区3CNY

title: Bass Clef Bar , 168 Zhongma Lu, Lao Waitan 老外滩中马路168号
content: Planning hint: One of the better bars in Lao Waitan, a small intimate bar that is well lit with a mini stage for live music Bass Clef Bar , 168 Zhongma Lu, Lao Waitan 老外滩中马路168号

title: Harley Bar
content: Planning hint: Has a great feeling about the place, pool table, decent food, live music, clean American style bar Harley Bar , 18 Ma Yuan Rd ( just a bit further out of the center of town )

title: The Garden , Lao Waitan ( just next to the river )
content: Planning hint: A great place when the weather is not too hot and not too cold, outdoor seating next to the river with super cheap drinks and student music makes this the choice place for students and those on an extreme budget The Garden , Lao Waitan ( just next to the river )

title: The Office
content: Planning hint: " The Office ", in Lao Waitan Where all the foreigners go nowadays

title: Z Rocks , 43-47 Zhongma Lu, Lao Waitan 老外滩中马路43-47号
content: Planning hint: Getting a drink is not easy as the bar staff do not speak one word of English, terrible Chinese band tries their best, often empty Z Rocks , 43-47 Zhongma Lu, Lao Waitan 老外滩中马路43-47号

title: Baoguo Temple ( 保国寺 ) ( Bus Route
content: Visit planning hint: Baoguo Temple ( 保国寺 ) ( Bus Route: 332 from metro line 2 Nijiayuan Station (30-40 minutes, every 10-40 minutes 06:20-19:00) ) Baoguo Temple is seated on the mountainside of Lingshan Mountain, about 15 km (9 mi) away from downtown

title: Drum Tower ( 鼓CNY ) ( Metro
content: Visit planning hint: A symbol of Ningbo and an entrance to a pedestrian shopping district, this tower is a mix of architectural styles Drum Tower ( 鼓CNY ) ( Metro: lines 1 and 2 Gulou )

title: Fufu Shi ( 伏跗室 ), 鼓CNY 街道孝闻街91号 ( Near metro line 1 Ximenkou station )
content: Visit planning hint: Another old house that gets 5-10 visitors per day, this one displays a literature collection Fufu Shi ( 伏跗室 ), 鼓CNY 街道孝闻街91号 ( Near metro line 1 Ximenkou station )

title: Ningbo Banking Guild Hall ( 钱业会馆 ) ( Metro line 1 Dongmenkou )
content: Visit planning hint: Closed down when the banks were closed in 1949, it now houses an impressive coin museum CNY 10 Former guild hall for banking and foreign exchange, which was important in Ningbo due to significant foreign trade

title: Qing'an Guild Hall and Anlan Guild Hall ( 庆安会馆
content: Visit planning hint: Dating to 1191, demolished several times including in 1949 and the 1960s, and rebuilt they now also serve as a museum covering shipbuilding in Ningbo dating back to the Neolithic period, and have been listed as part of the Grand Canal UNESCO World Cultural Heritage site Guild halls for the formerly-adjacent shipyard, including a temple for Matu, the goddess who protects sailors

title: Line 1 Line 2 Line 3
content: District movement hint: Lines 4 with 25 stations opened in 2020, and 5 with 22 stations opened in 2021 Line 1 with 29 stations opened in early 2014

title: Motor bikes
content: District movement hint: Motor bikes: Although Downtown Ningbo does not permit motorbikes a bike can be rented outside of downtown and can make an enjoyable way of reaching the outer districts

title: Yanyi Authentic Minnan Cuisine (1971 Creative Park Branch) ( 院意地道闽南菜（1971文创园店）
content: Food planning hint: It offers traditional Minnan dishes, including Ginger Duck, Black Bean Tofu, Crispy Taro Mash, and Seaweed Rice, all popular with diners Located in the 1971 Creative Park, the restaurant blends authentic flavors with a unique setting inspired by Putian's traditional architecture

title: Hanting Hotel ( 汉庭酒店 )
content: Representative stay option: As a well-known budget hotel chain, Hanting provides economical accommodation with all essential amenities

title: Home-like Hotel ( 如家酒店 )
content: Representative stay option: Affiliated with a popular hotel chain, it offers clean and minimalist rooms with basic amenities Home-like Hotel ( 如家酒店 )

title: Meizhou Island Guesthouses
content: Representative stay option: Meizhou Island Guesthouses Meizhou Island, the birthplace of Mazu, features many guesthouses with sea views and a chance to immerse in local culture Staying on the island allows convenient access to the Mazu Temple and a peaceful island lifestyle

title: Nanjiri Island Fishing Homestays
content: Representative stay option: Visitors can stay with local fishermen, enjoy fresh seafood feasts, and participate in fishing activities, providing a unique island culture experience Nanjiri Island Fishing Homestays Nanjiri Island is known for its seafood

title: Southern Shaolin Monastery ( 莆田南少林寺 )
content: Visit planning hint: A reconstructed Buddhist temple built on the remains of an old Tang Dynasty temple, claimed to be connected to the Shaolin Monastery in Henan Province which is one of China's most famous centers of martial arts 201 from Putian Railway Station, get off at Xitianwei Circle (西天尾圆圈), then catch the special shuttle bus that goes to the temple )

title: Beach #1 ( 第一海水浴场; Dìyī Hǎishuǐ Yùchǎng )
content: Planning hint: Beach #1 ( 第一海水浴场; Dìyī Hǎishuǐ Yùchǎng ), Nanhai Rd (南海路) ( CNY 15-20 in taxi from the center; numerous buses stop near bus stop Haishui Yuchang (海水浴场; Hǎishuǐ Yùchǎng) ) Clean and full of amusement for children but often crowded

title: Beach #2 ( 第二海水浴场; Dìèr Hǎishuǐ Yùchǎng )
content: Planning hint: Beach #2 ( 第二海水浴场; Dìèr Hǎishuǐ Yùchǎng ), Shanhaiguan Rd (山海关路; Shānhǎiguān Lù) ( CNY 10-15 in taxi from the center; numerous buses stop at Wusheng Guan a bit N of the beach )

title: Beach #3 (City Beach) ( 第三海水浴场; Dìsān Hǎishuǐ Yùchǎng )
content: Planning hint: Has a "plastic island" so you can swim far away and have a rest before coming back (but it is sometimes exhausting to swim in the waves) Beach #3 (City Beach) ( 第三海水浴场; Dìsān Hǎishuǐ Yùchǎng )

title: Beach #6 (Muscle Beach)
content: Planning hint: CNY 5 basic shower and changing facilities

title: Old Stone Man Beach ( 石老人海水浴场; Shìlǎorén Yùchǎng )
content: Planning hint: Old Stone Man Beach ( 石老人海水浴场; Shìlǎorén Yùchǎng ), Donghai E Rd and Haikou Rd (东海东路 - 海口路) ( Bus 125 or 321 ) One of the best beaches within easy striking distance of the city

title: Silver Beach ( 银沙滩 )
content: Planning hint: Qingdao Silver Beach is located on the southwest side of the provincial-level Phoenix Island Tourist Resort in Qingdao Economic and Technological Development Zone It is a sister beach to the National 4A Scenic Area Golden Beach, with a total length of over 2000 meters and a crescent shaped shape

title: Bifeng Tang ( 港记避风塘; Gǎngjì Bìfēngtáng )
content: Food planning hint: Bifeng Tang ( 港记避风塘; Gǎngjì Bìfēngtáng ), 158 Minjiang Rd (闽江路24号) Hong Kong dim sum and seafood

title: Laoshan Pao Hotpot Restaurant ( 老山炮活鱼锅; Lǎoshānpàohuóyúguō )
content: Food planning hint: The brand specializes in Chongqing-style hot pot, and its pot base and dipping sauce flavors are generally considered authentic Laoshan Pao Hotpot Restaurant ( 老山炮活鱼锅; Lǎoshānpàohuóyúguō ), 20 Yunxiao Rd ( 云宵路20号 )

title: Old Hong Kong Restaurant ( 香港老饭店; Xiānggǎnglǎo Fàndiàn )
content: Food planning hint: Better than average dim sum, clean upmarket atmosphere and decent service Old Hong Kong Restaurant ( 香港老饭店; Xiānggǎnglǎo Fàndiàn ), 42 Hong Kong Middle Rd ( below New York Club in the Hirun Hotel on Hong Kong Middle Rd )

title: Tanyutou Hotpot Restaurant ( 谭鱼头火锅; Tányútóuhuǒguō )
content: Food planning hint: The brand features "spicy fish head" as its signature pot base, with a spicy and fresh soup base, making it one of the classic representatives of Sichuan-style hot pot CNY 50 Tanyutou Hotpot Restaurant ( 谭鱼头火锅; Tányútóuhuǒguō ), 14 Minjiang Rd (闽江路14号)

title: Yunxiao Road ( 云霄路 )
content: Food planning hint: Yunxiao Road is recognized as Qingdao's restaurant street Here you'll find lots of choices for seafood and other Chinese dishes

title: Aegean Sea Boutique Hotel ( 青岛爱情海精品酒店; Qīngdǎo Àiqínghǎijīngpǐn Jiǔdiàn
content: Best used as a stay area because Aegean Sea Boutique Hotel ( 青岛爱情海精品酒店; Qīngdǎo Àiqínghǎijīngpǐn Jiǔdiàn ), 212 Yan'an Third Rd, Shinan District (市南区延安三路212号; Shìnánqū Yán'ānsānlù) Listed rates for doubles from CNY 858, discounted from CNY 219

title: Aegean Sea Boutique Hotel ( 青岛爱情海精品酒店; Qīngdǎo Àiqínghǎijīngpǐn Jiǔdiàn )
content: Best used as a stay area because Aegean Sea Boutique Hotel ( 青岛爱情海精品酒店; Qīngdǎo Àiqínghǎijīngpǐn Jiǔdiàn ), 212 Yan'an Third Rd, Shinan District (市南区延安三路212号; Shìnánqū Yán'ānsānlù) Listed rates for doubles from CNY 858, discounted from CNY 219

title: Qingdao Kaiyue International Youth Hostel ( 青岛凯悦国际青年旅舍 ), No
content: Representative stay option: Quiet but large and very nice hostel in the old town near the train station and the Catholic church Qingdao Kaiyue International Youth Hostel ( 青岛凯悦国际青年旅舍 ), No

title: Sea View Garden Hotel , 2 Zhanghua Rd
content: Representative stay option: Sea View Garden Hotel , 2 Zhanghua Rd Offers excellent ocean side view, spa, tennis, KTV, bar, and close to shopping centres

title: Sifang Hotel ( 青岛四方大酒店; Qīngdǎo Sìfāng Dàjiǔdiàn )
content: Best used as a stay area because Sifang Hotel ( 青岛四方大酒店; Qīngdǎo Sìfāng Dàjiǔdiàn ), 1 Wenzhou Rd, Sifang District (四方区温州路1号; Sìfāngqū Wēnzhōulù) Listed rates for doubles from CNY 360, discounted from CNY 158

title: TOP YiHe International Serviced Apartments , 10 Xianggang Middle Rd
content: Representative stay option: Free daily Western style breakfast, free local calls, free broadband internet with 42" plasma HDTV screen and cable TV, business center, conference rooms, 10-minute walk to all major shopping centers and restaurants Comparable to most 4-star hotels in Qingdao at a much cheaper rate, has an excellent staff, Bird's Eye View of the Olympic Marina & May 4th Square

title: Charlie's Bar
content: Planning hint: Very similar to Freeman, but not as big and a slightly weaker selection.The interior decoration of the shop is in a classic British style, featuring a wooden bar, leather seats, and warm yellow lighting For instance, Tsingtao Beer is only priced at 10 yuan per bottle, offering great value for money CNY 20 and up

title: Club New York ( 纽约俱乐部 )
content: Planning hint: CNY 40-50, although foreigners planning a lengthy stay are nearly always offered a free VIP card for permanent half Club New York ( 纽约俱乐部 ), 41 Hong Kong Middle Rd 2F ( go further W from SOS past Fuzhou Rd )

title: Feelings Club ( 菲林酒吧 )
content: Planning hint: Feelings Club ( 菲林酒吧 ), 83-85 Hong Kong Middle Rd ( across the road from Xinjiazhuang bus stop ) A large dance club that is often the most popular among Chinese, music there is strictly techno

title: Freeman ( 自由人 )
content: Planning hint: Laid-back western style bar, with plenty of different kinds of booze available and good service.The bar typically attracts customers with its relatively quiet atmosphere, specialty cocktails, craft beers, or specific music styles (such as jazz, blues), which sets it apart from the loud and boisterous atmosphere of large nightclubs CNY 20 and up Freeman ( 自由人 ), 163 Jiangxi Rd ( Jiangxi Rd near Hong Kong Middle Rd )

title: Le Bang ( 乐邦 ) ( on Chengyi 1 Rd N of Hong Kong Rd
content: Planning hint: Le Bang ( 乐邦 ) ( on Chengyi 1 Rd N of Hong Kong Rd, but its official address is 2 Zhangzhou 2 Rd Gate B, it's on the side street next to SOS ) On Friday and Saturday nights there is an all you can drink CNY 50 happy hour from 22:00-23:00

title: SOS ( 苏荷酒吧，SOHO BAR )
content: Planning hint: Renowned for its expansive dance floor, renowned DJs, themed parties, and lively on-site atmosphere.Formerly a part of the Shanghai Babyface chain Name has changed but still the same Chinese techno-loving, glowstick-handling and dice-rolling crowd, but often not as busy

title: Badaguan ( 八大关 ) ( in the east of Huiquan )
content: Visit planning hint: Eight passes and eight landmarks; Eight different looks and eight different customs; Eight scenic spots, eight artistic conception, one end leads to the distant frontier fortress, while the other side is connected to a nearby mirage in the sea Badaguan is a scenic area that best embodies the characteristics of Qingdao's "red tiles, green trees, blue sea, and blue sky"

title: Baihuayuan Gardens ( 百花苑; Bǎihuāyuàn )
content: Visit planning hint: For many years it was the cemetery for foreigners, but the cemetery was destroyed during the Cultural Revolution Baihuayuan Gardens ( 百花苑; Bǎihuāyuàn ), 55 Yan'an First Rd (延安一路55号; Yán'ān Yīlù)

title: Little Qingdao Island ( 小青岛公园 )
content: Visit planning hint: Visitors may also tour the botanical gardens and enjoy the views of Qingdao The island was used for military purposes for many years, and it features a lighthouse built by the Germans in the 1900s

title: Little Qingdao Island ( 小青岛公园 ), 2 Qingyu Rd
content: Visit planning hint: Visitors may also tour the botanical gardens and enjoy the views of Qingdao The island was used for military purposes for many years, and it features a lighthouse built by the Germans in the 1900s

title: Luxun Park ( 鲁迅公园 ), 1 QinYu Rd
content: Visit planning hint: There is an oriental gate leading to a statue of Luxun, a famous Chinese writer A 2-km-long beachside park, between Xiao Qingdao Park and Bathing Beach

title: Polar Ocean World ( 青岛极地海洋世界 )
content: Visit planning hint: An aquarium focusing on polar animals, including polar bears and penguins It has a well known Beluga whale and dolphin show, as well as a daily large seal exhibition

title: Qingdao Textile Valley ( 青岛纺织谷 )
content: Visit planning hint: It features graffiti-covered walls, contemporary art installations, and spacious lofts, making it a paradise for urban exploration and photography Once a major textile mill, this vast industrial complex has been transformed into a creative art district

title: Xiaoyushan Park ( literally
content: Visit planning hint: It has great hilltop views of Qingdao especially during sunrise Xiaoyushan Park ( literally, Little Fish Hill ), 24 Fushan Access Rd

title: Xinhaoshan Park ( Signal Hill Park )
content: Visit planning hint: Visitors will also see the Heart to Heart Bridge, where local couples place a heart-shaped padlock on the bridge to ensure that their relationship will last forever It has lovely landscape and features a revolving tea shop offering a 360-degree panorama of Qingdao

title: Zhan Qiao ( 栈桥; Zhànqiáo )
content: Visit planning hint: The famous pier Zhan Qiao is the iconic symbol of Qingdao The pier is lined with vendors selling all manner of things, as well as beggars and opportunities for very small-time gambling

title: Thirteen Invitations Bistro ( 十三邀小酒馆 Shísān Yāo Xiǎojiǔguǎn ), No
content: Planning hint: 13-105, 9th District, Tinghai Holiday Living Area, Binhai New Avenue, Tuanlin Township, Changli County ( 团林乡滨海新大道听海假日生活区九区13-105号) Thirteen Invitations Bistro ( 十三邀小酒馆 Shísān Yāo Xiǎojiǔguǎn ), No

title: naive ( 理想国(阿那亚店) )
content: Planning hint: naive ( 理想国(阿那亚店) ), 101, Building 14, Phase 6, Anaya Cultural and Creative District, Binhai New Avenue (滨海新大道阿那亚文创街区6期14栋101)

title: Laodao Ocean Park ( Laodao Ocean park )
content: Visit planning hint: Meanwhile, if you are interested in the natural culture, you will have a chance to view the performance full of exoticism The polar region exhibition hall takes you to the romantic world of ice and snow, and hope you will have a good time with the cute polar bear and penguin

title: Qinhuangdao Wildlife Park ( 秦皇岛野生动物园 )
content: Visit planning hint: Visitors can take a sightseeing car to enter the stocking area, or walk to visit the bird area and herbivore area Located near Beidaihe Scenic Area, covering an area of about 5,000 acres, it is a large-scale wild free-range zoo

title: Shanhaiguan Fortifications
content: Visit planning hint: The walls of the old city of Qinhuangdao can essentially be considered part of the Great Wall: the whole city was built as a wall fortification to guard the pass between the mountains and the sea The east, south and north sides of the fortification are surrounded by a moat 3 m deep and 5 m wide

title: Shanhaiguan Pass，First Pass under Heaven ( 山海关，天下第一关 ) ( East of the Drum T
content: Visit planning hint: The area between the sea and the mountains at Qinhuangdao is called the "First Pass under Heaven", being the place where the Ming dynasty Great Wall began Shanhaiguan Pass，First Pass under Heaven ( 山海关，天下第一关 ) ( East of the Drum Tower in the center of the old town )

title: Lantern Festival
content: Planning hint: The Chinese New Year begins on the first day of the first lunar month; Lantern Festival on the 15th of that month brings the celebration to a close Lantern Festival is celebrated all over China, but it is a fairly minor event in some places and a rather big deal in others

title: Lan zhou hand-pulled noodles ( 兰州拉面 ), on Hu xin street (湖心街) opposite Mr
content: Food planning hint: Lan zhou hand-pulled noodles ( 兰州拉面 ), on Hu xin street (湖心街) opposite Mr

title: Mr. Chiu's Chiu Chau beef brisket noodles ( 啊潮牛栏面 )
content: Food planning hint: ( heading north on Tian an road (田安北路), turn left on Hu xin jie (湖心街); it'll be on your right ) Delicious slow-cooked cubes of beef served in a mild Chinese curry sauce

title: The Mandarin Hotel ( 悦华酒店 )
content: Food planning hint: Large lunch (CNY 160) and dinner (CNY 270) buffet with both eastern and western dishes The Mandarin Hotel ( 悦华酒店 )

title: Yuan pan ( 元番日本料理 ), on Quan xiu road (泉秀路)
content: Food planning hint: Yuan pan ( 元番日本料理 ), on Quan xiu road (泉秀路) Japanese sushi with buffet

title: 淳百味 Chun Bai Wei , On the corner of 新华南路 (Xinhua nan lu) and 新门街 (Xinmen jie) . 09:00
content: Food planning hint: 淳百味 Chun Bai Wei , On the corner of 新华南路 (Xinhua nan lu) and 新门街 (Xinmen jie) Breakfast available until 10:00, dumplings (bao zi, jiao zi), soya bean milk, dough sticks etc

title: Overseas Chinese Hotel
content: Representative stay option: Overseas Chinese Hotel , Baiyun Road ( across the street from the Culture Park and backing on the Confucius Temple ) A business hotel with a good range of services in a central location

title: Quanzhou Hotel ( two blocks west along the street just north of the Overseas Chinese Hotel
content: Representative stay option: Quanzhou Hotel ( two blocks west along the street just north of the Overseas Chinese Hotel ) Excellent but expensive weekend brunch

title: Chongfu Temple
content: Visit planning hint: Chongfu Temple , Chongfu Road ( northeast of the city center, near where Dong Road turns into Donghu Road ) A beautiful if small active Buddhist Temple

title: Fujian-Taiwan Kinship Museum ( 中国闽台缘博物馆 )
content: Visit planning hint: Fujian-Taiwan Kinship Museum ( 中国闽台缘博物馆 ), 212 Beiqing Road East, Fengze District ( in a park north of the West Lake, just east of Quanzhou Museum ) As of March 2024, the museum is closed for renovations

title: Lishan Tombs ( near what was the east gate of the old walled city )
content: Visit planning hint: Tradition has it that Muhhamad himself sent four of his personal disciples and they arrived in the late 7th century Lishan Tombs ( near what was the east gate of the old walled city )

title: Qingjing Mosque ( 清净寺 ), Tumen Street
content: Visit planning hint: It is over 1,000 years old, and was rebuilt in 2009 so the dome is now restored after a 200-year absence The only surviving mosque of the many that used to exist

title: Quanzhou Museum ( 泉州博物馆 ) ( in a park north of the West Lake (Xi Hu)
content: Visit planning hint: Quanzhou Museum ( 泉州博物馆 ) ( in a park north of the West Lake (Xi Hu) ) Don't miss a small "stele forest" behind the museum

title: warrior temple
content: Visit planning hint: Guan-Yue Temple ( Tonghuai Temple of Guan Yu and Yue Fei (通淮关岳庙) ), Tumen Jie 196 (鲤城区涂门街196号) ( just east of the mosque ) Guan Yu and Yue Fei were generals, and this is a warrior temple , one of many dedicated to them in various parts of China

title: Beauty Crown Theater ( 美丽之冠大剧院 )
content: Planning hint: Beauty Crown Theater ( 美丽之冠大剧院 ), Xinfeng Street, Jiyang District (吉阳区新风街) ( the nearest bus stop is the Hospital of Traditional Chinese Medicine (中医院), which is served by bus nos At the site of a self-declared 7-star hotel, the Beauty Crown Hotel (aka Beauty Crown Grand Tree Hotel)

title: Red Detachment of Women Performance Park ( 红色娘子军演艺公园 )

content: Planning hint: Chinese owners brought German brewmasters over from Europe, had them set up the brewery, and then kicked them out (thinking they could run the place without them) You can see all the big canisters and pipes where the beer is brewed and served to you

content: Planning hint: A beautiful sunset bar with usually very tasty cocktails, however it's very expensive at the Mandarin Oriental Resort

content: Visit planning hint: Take the cable car to the top for a panoramic view of the city, but be careful not to take pictures of the military base Phoenix Hill ( 凤凰岭 Fenghuangling, 凤凰岭海誓山盟景区 Fenghuangling Haishishanmeng Scenic Area ), 300 Longling Road, Jiyang District (吉阳区龙陵路300号) ( bus nos

content: Visit planning hint: The beach is often too overrun by tourists for visitors to be able to appreciate its natural beauty, but has been famously alluded to by various ancient Chinese writers and in modern Chinese pop culture Tianya Haijiao ( 天涯海角; Tianya Haijiao - Edges of the heaven, corners of the sea ) ( 30 minutes from Sanya by bus nos 16, 25, 26, 30, 57 (

title: Jing'an Park
content: Planning hint: Jing'an Park , across the street from the temple and metro station (lines 2 and 7 )

content: Planning hint: Lu Xun Park in Hongkou is named for a famous writer It has kids' rides and a lake with boats for rent

title: Nanjing Road
content: Planning hint: Nanjing Road , starting from the Bund (Nanjing Road East metro station, line 2 or 10 ) and heading west toward People's Park, Jing'an Temple and perhaps beyond

title: People's Park
content: Planning hint: People's Park , very central and with a major metro interchange below it (lines 1 , 2 and 8 )

title: Yangzhou Fandian
content: Food planning hint: crab meat pork meatballs), found in various Yangzhou- and Zhenjiang-style restaurants, such as the Yangzhou Fandian located near Nanjing Road xièfěn shīzitóu (蟹粉狮子头; lit

title: cí fàn (粢饭)
content: Food planning hint: Glutinous rice and Japonica rice mixed and steamed, then used to wrap up a yóu tiáo

title: dàpái mián (大排面, lit
content: Food planning hint: The pork chop is soft and tasty, and the savory soup makes it a filling meal big chop noodle), a hearty noodle soup with a large braised pork chop

title: hóng shāo ròu (红烧肉, lit
content: Food planning hint: red-cooked pork), a traditional dish throughout Southern China with the added flair of anise and sweetness provided by the chefs of Shanghai

title: táng cù pái gǔ (糖醋排骨, lit
content: Food planning hint: sugar and vinegar pork ribs), a common Shanghai appetizer that features the typical sweet-sour flavor balance of local dishes táng cù pái gǔ (糖醋排骨, lit

title: xiǎo húntùn (小馄饨, lit
content: Food planning hint: small wontons), a light Shanghai staple with thin wrappers and fresh pork filling It is usually served in clear soup, with a delicate and refreshing taste

title: zhá zhū pái (炸猪排, lit
content: Food planning hint: fried pork chop), a beloved snack made of breaded pork chop deep-fried until golden It is crispy outside and tender inside, often served with Worcestershire sauce

title: 1933 Shanghai
content: Visit planning hint: 1933 Shanghai is in a former abattoir; it has a theatre, shops, cafés and studios

title: Huaihai Road
content: Visit planning hint: Huaihai Road is an upmarket shopping street which many Shanghai people prefer over Nanjing Road

title: M50 art district
content: Visit planning hint: M50 art district is Shanghai's main center for contemporary Chinese art, with dozens of studios and galleries It is in a former factory in Putuo District

title: Nanjing Road East
content: Visit planning hint: Nanjing Road East in Huangpu District extends from the Bund to People's Park, and most of it is a very busy pedestrians-only strip

title: Nanjing Road West Jing'an Temple
content: Visit planning hint: A landmark beyond the park is Jing'an Temple , a beautiful ancient building with a metro station named after it Nanjing Road West is the continuation into Jing'an District

title: Old City Yuyuan Gardens
content: Visit planning hint: The Old City (老城厢; Lao Chengxiang, also known as 南市, Nanshi) is the original Chinese city going back about 1000 years, now a major tourist area The center of that area is Yuyuan Gardens

title: Xujiahui
content: Visit planning hint: Xujiahui , the center of Xuhui District, with a metro interchange (lines 1 , 9 and 11 ), major roads, huge malls including many electronics stores, and high-end residential and office buildings

title: Line 2
content: Arrival advice: To the east, it runs through downtown Pudong and terminates at Pudong Airport Its western end goes to Hongqiao Airport and beyond

title: Line 3
content: District movement hint: In the south it ends at Shanghai South Railway Station; in the north it goes to Shanghai Railway Station and beyond, through Hongkou and into Baoshan Runs in an arc around the west side of downtown, next to Line 4 for much of the route

title: Line 4
content: District movement hint: Runs on a circular route around central Shanghai, mostly on the Puxi side, but it also goes into Pudong For approximately the western third of the route it runs next to Line 3

title: Line 7
content: District movement hint: Runs from Jiading in the north, goes to Jing'An Temple and through the French Concession, then east into Pudong

title: Savor Chaoshan tea culture
content: Planning hint: The Chaoshan region is also known for its tea culture You can taste local teas and learn about Chaoshan's tea traditions

title: Hotel Internationale restaurant , Jinsha Donglu near intersection with Dongxia Nanlu
content: Food planning hint: On the 4th floor of International Hotel, this Chinese restaurant serves good dim sum and Hong Kong style dishes Hotel Internationale restaurant , Jinsha Donglu near intersection with Dongxia Nanlu

title: Chinese brand budget hotel including Hanting, HomeInns, etc
content: Representative stay option: Chinese brand budget hotel including Hanting, HomeInns, etc are available in most area in Shantou, rate is generally less than CNY 200 per night

title: Shantou International Hotel
content: Representative stay option: The hotel is rated four stars, has 30 years history and refurbished & reopened in 2016 Shantou International Hotel , Jinsha Road, West of Shantou City Center

title: The hotel directly opposite the bus station is of acceptable standard
content: Representative stay option: The hotel directly opposite the bus station is of acceptable standard Rooms are clean and have TV, air conditioning and bathtub

title: Yi Jia Hotel
content: Representative stay option: Yi Jia Hotel, on Changjiang street 17 (汕头宜家酒店 长江路17) Really difficult to spot since it's on the 14th floor but this hotel is quite nice for the Rooms are large and well designed

title: Dahao Ancient Town ( 达濠古城 )
content: Visit planning hint: Dahao Ancient Town ( 达濠古城 ), Yonghao Street, Haojiang District (濠江区永濠街) ( the nearest bus stop is the Xincheng Commercial Hotel (鑫程商务酒店) bus stop, which is served by bus no A rather small but beautiful town, enclosed by a thin ancient wall

title: Pagoda Mountain ( 塔山风景区
content: Visit planning hint: Pagoda Mountain ( 塔山风景区, Tashan Scenic Area ), Tashan Temple Avenue, Lianshang Town, Chenghai District (澄海区莲上镇塔山寺道) ( take bus nos Not to be confused with a similarly named place at the Queshi Scenic Area

title: Queshi Scenic Area ( 礐石风景区
content: Visit planning hint: Queshi Scenic Area ( 礐石风景区, 礐石风景名胜区 ), 4 Queshi Haipang Road, Haojiang District (濠江区礐石海旁路4号) ( catch a ferry from the ferry terminal near People's Square; alternatively, catch bus nos A large hilly park on the south bank of the Rong River, just opposite the city centre

title: Shantou Founding Museum ( 汕头开埠文化陈列馆 Shantou Kaibu Wenhua Chenlieuan
content: Visit planning hint: Shantou Founding Museum ( 汕头开埠文化陈列馆 Shantou Kaibu Wenhua Chenlieuan ), 1 Yongping Road, Jinping District (金平区永平路1号) ( in the original central part of Shantou, across from the renovated post office; bus routes 1, 2, 3, 5, 10, 11, 13, 14, 22a, 23, 25, 35, 36, 37 and 59 ) This museum is devoted to the establishment of Swatow (Shantou) as a treaty port in the 19th century, and its subsequent history and daily life

title: Shantou Museum ( 汕头博物馆 Shantou Bowuguan )
content: Visit planning hint: Shantou Museum ( 汕头博物馆 Shantou Bowuguan ), Yuemei Road, Jinping District (金平区月眉路) ( in a large building near the western side of Zhongshan Park; take bus no There are exhibits on Buddhist figurines and sculptures, paintings and calligraphy, ceramic wares, and relics recovered from a Ming Dynasty commercial vessel that was discovered in 2007 just a little way southeast of Shantou

title: Stone Fort Park ( 石炮台公园
content: Visit planning hint: You may be able to smell some interesting strains of mold inside, admire the moat and bridges, or go rollerskating in the middle of the fort (with Chinese techno music of course) Stone Fort Park ( 石炮台公园, Shipaotai Park ), 20 Haibin Road, Jinping District (金平区海滨路20号) ( bus routes 19, 46, 103, 105, and k1 )

title: Scan code payment
content: Transfer hub hint: Scan code payment: Support WeChat mini program "Ride Code" or Alipay "Travel" function

title: Shantou Pass Bus Card
content: District movement hint: Shantou Pass Bus Card: Can be purchased and recharged at major convenience stores

title: Kuaiji's Mountain ( 会稽山 ), Dayuling
content: Planning hint: It is the burial site of Yu the Great, an ancient hero of China's flood control efforts, with the Mausoleum of Yu situated at the mountain's base, making it a must-visit for history enthusiasts Kuaiji Mountain, located in the southeastern part of Shaoxing, is renowned for its rich history and picturesque natural scenery

title: Lanting Calligraphy Art Center ( 兰亭书法艺术中心 )
content: Planning hint: Visitors can admire classic calligraphy works, learn about its history, and enjoy the hands-on experience of creating their own calligraphy The Lanting Calligraphy Art Center is a cultural venue dedicated to preserving and promoting Chinese calligraphy

title: Aguo Restaurant ( 阿国饭店 )
content: Food planning hint: This is a restaurant specializing in authentic Zhejiang cuisine Aguo Restaurant ( 阿国饭店 ), 15-1-5Hushan N Rd, Yuecheng District

content: Food planning hint: This is a restaurant that focuses on traditional Shaoxing local specialties Ji He Wu Peng Chuan Yan (Lu Xun Store) ( 几荷乌篷船宴（鲁迅店） ), 47 Luxun Middle Rd, 47, Yuecheng District

title: Shang Ding Xian Special Noodles ( 尚鼎鲜特色面 )
content: Food planning hint: This is a restaurant specializing in unique noodle dishes and is known for offering a variety of fresh, flavorful noodle options, made with carefully selected ingredients Shang Ding Xian Special Noodles ( 尚鼎鲜特色面 ), Yuecheng District, 62

title: Xianghui Lou ( 湘会CNY (鲁迅西路店) )
content: Food planning hint: The restaurant is especially suitable for guests who enjoy spicy food, with generous portion sizes and quick service It is a restaurant specializing in authentic Hunan cuisine

title: Xunbaoji ( 寻宝记绍兴状元店 )
content: Food planning hint: Xunbaoji ( 寻宝记绍兴状元店 ), 127 Fushan St，Yuecheng District
