content: Food planning hint: This is a casual restaurant that specializes in traditional Chinese breakfast items, particularly sesame flatbreads (烧饼) and deep-fried dough sticks (油条) Zhengshifu Clay Oven Rolls Fried Bread Stick ( 郑师傅烧饼油条 ), Jinghu Rd, Yuecheng District

title: Free Coffee improv bar ( 自由咖啡improv bar )
content: Planning hint: A combination of a bar and a café, featuring various styles of live music performances held irregularly Free Coffee improv bar ( 自由咖啡improv bar ), 287 Jiefang S Rd, Yuecheng District

title: Fushan Day & Night Store ( 福山日夜商店 )
content: Planning hint: A small bar hidden on Huanshan Road, with a relaxed atmosphere and beautiful decor Fushan Day & Night Store ( 福山日夜商店 ), 235 Hengjie St, Yuecheng District

title: Shaoxing wine Shaoxing wine
content: Planning hint: Shaoxing wine Shaoxing wine is a variety of Chinese Huangjiu ("yellow wine") made by fermenting glutinous rice, water, and wheat-based yeast Better quality Shaoxing wine can be drunk as a beverage and in place of rice at the beginning of a meal

title: Useless ( 無用useless )
content: Planning hint: It has both indoor and outdoor areas, where you can enjoy quiet conversations or live music performed by a band Useless ( 無用useless ), 150 Pianmen St, Yuecheng District

title: Zhengdian ( 整点酒吧 )
content: Planning hint: Perfect for those who enjoy a quiet atmosphere, with a friendly and welcoming owner Zhengdian ( 整点酒吧 ), 695 Jiefang S Rd, Yuecheng District

title: craftbeer ( 入海精酿酒馆craftbeer(宽庭店) )
content: Planning hint: Guests can relax in the courtyard, sipping drinks and enjoying the breeze craftbeer ( 入海精酿酒馆craftbeer(宽庭店) )

title: Shaoxing Museum ( 绍兴博物馆 )
content: Visit planning hint: The museum's modern exhibitions and interactive displays provide visitors with an engaging way to explore the unique charm of this historic city The Shaoxing Museum, located in the city center, is a comprehensive museum showcasing the rich history and local culture of Shaoxing

title: Shen's Garden
content: Visit planning hint: The Shaoxing Yellow Wine Museum showcases the brewing history and cultural traditions of Shaoxing yellow wine Chinese Yellow Wine Museum ( 绍兴黄酒博物馆 )

title: Shen's Garden ( 沈园 )
content: Visit planning hint: A historic garden known for its Song Dynasty style and the famous love story of Lu You and Tang Wan With its picturesque bridges, flowing streams, and lush greenery, the garden exudes classical charm, making it a nice spot to experience Southern Song culture and a romantic atmosphere

title: The Orchid Pavilion ( 兰亭/Lanting )
content: Visit planning hint: According to legend, he once worked here to plant orchids; he set up a pavilion, hence the name Lanting The site was built in the 27th year of Ming Jiajing (AD 1548) when the county was rebuilt by Shen Qi

title: Shenyang Huangsi Temple Fair , No
content: Planning hint: Founded in 1636 (the first year of Chongde in the Qing Dynasty), it is a large-scale and early Lama temple in Shenyang In Shenyang, as long as the temple fair is mentioned, the first reaction of most Shenyang people is Huangsi Temple Fair

title: BaoFaYuan 宝发园
content: Food planning hint: BaoFaYuan 宝发园 , No.1 Tianyuan, Xiaoshizi Street, Dadong District, Shenyang 沈阳市大东区小什字街天源巷1号 ( Dong Zhong Jie Metro Line 1 A exit, across the street ) While locals might not remember the name "BaFaYuan", everyone knows "Four Outstanding" given the name was giving by Zhang Xueliang

title: Cafe Lido ( Sheraton Shenyang Lido Hotel ), Qingnian St
content: Food planning hint: Special on Friday's Seafood Night, small Serving Australian beef, mashed potatoes Irish style, Guinness meat pies, fresh fish, salads and the tastiest pastries in town

title: La Bellevue
content: Food planning hint: For bigger budget there is also a fine dining French restaurant, "La Bellevue"

title: Eletel ( 沈阳璟星大酒店 )
content: Representative stay option: The location is on a main shopping street within walking distance of several attractions such as the Imperial Palace The rooms are designed in an ultra modern style that some will like and others will hate

title: Somerset Heping Shenyang
content: Best used as a stay area because Each apartment is equipped with broadband internet access, a private IDD with voicemail facility and business support services Somerset Heping Shenyang , No 80 Taiyuan North Street, Heping district

title: Black Sheep ( hei yang xi can ting )
content: Planning hint: Black Sheep ( hei yang xi can ting ), Sanjing Jie and Shisanwei Lu ( across the street from Party 98 ) Very popular with expats

title: Club 97 ( 97号会所 )
content: Planning hint: Club 97 ( 97号会所 ), No 97 Zhongshan Lu, 100 m W of Zhongshan Sq and its Mao statue (中山路97号，中山广场西100米) A shiny, trendy club with an outdoor patio frequented by expats, mostly Russian ones

title: Party 俱乐部
content: Planning hint: Party 俱乐部 - 98 jù lè bù ), Xita St (西塔街), in Korea town Noisy Chinese music, close to the 24/24h barbecue restaurants

title: Pure Colours ( 米亚本色 mi ya ben si ), 6-328 Fengtian Street (奉天街)
content: Planning hint: They have an informal special for foreigners: buy one get two (for longdrinks only) Pure Colours ( 米亚本色 mi ya ben si ), 6-328 Fengtian Street (奉天街)

title: Sophie's World Bar ( 苏菲的世界酒吧 ), Er Jing St, Bawei Rd (二经街 八伟路
content: Planning hint: The oldest foreigner bar in town is like an institution for both expats and locals Sophie's World Bar ( 苏菲的世界酒吧 ), Er Jing St, Bawei Rd (二经街 八伟路

title: Sunny's Night Club
content: Planning hint: A popular spot for foreigners but staff and service are low quality

title: China Museum of Industry ( 中国工业博物馆
content: Visit planning hint: Formerly known as the China Foundry Museum 中国铸造博物馆 and previously as the Shenyang Foundry Museum 沈阳铸造博物馆 ), 14 Weigong North Street, Tiexi District (铁西区卫工北街14号) ( near Olympic Stadium; bus routes 147, 175, 176, 277, 300 and 176 stop near the museum The museum is built on the site of an old foundry, which has been largely preserved in its original state

title: Former Site of Shenyang Military Tribunal for the Trial of Japanese
content: Visit planning hint: Former Site of Shenyang Military Tribunal for the Trial of Japanese War Criminals ( 中国审判日本战犯法庭旧址陈列馆 ), 77 Heilongjiang Street, Huanggu District (皇姑区黑龙江街77号) ( about 960 meters southeast of Zhongyiyaodaxue Station on lines 2 and 10 of the Shenyang Metro; bus nos 106, 280, 281, 290 and 292 stop just outside the museum )

title: Liaoning Provincial Museum ( 辽宁省博物馆 )
content: Visit planning hint: Liaoning Provincial Museum ( 辽宁省博物馆 ), 157 Zhihui San Street, Hunnan District (浑南区智慧三街157号) ( The nearest bus stop is 'Zhihui Si Street & Quanyun San Road' (智慧四街全运三路), which is served by bus routes 100, 108, 130, 198 (north circle), 198 (west circle) and v112 A high-quality museum featuring Liaoning history from the stone age to the Qing dynasty, with many relics of China's past found in the area (3rd floor)

title: Paleontological Museum of Liaoning ( 辽宁古生物博物馆 )
content: Visit planning hint: Paleontological Museum of Liaoning ( 辽宁古生物博物馆 ), Shenyang Normal University, 253 Huanghe North Street, Huanggu District (皇姑区黄河北大街253号沈阳师范大学院内) ( Shenyang Normal University Station, Metro Line 2 ) Claims to be the largest paleontological museum in China

title: Shenyang Railway Museum ( 沈阳铁路陈列馆 )
content: Visit planning hint: Shenyang Railway Museum ( 沈阳铁路陈列馆 ), 8 Shandan Street, Sujiatun District (苏家屯区山丹街8号) ( the nearest bus stop with bus services to the downtown area is the Keji Pharmaceuticals (可济药业) bus stop, which is served by bus nos Housing 15 historical locomotives and 3 duplicated historical locomotives

title: Shenyang World War II Allied Prisoners Camp Site Museum ( 二战盟军战俘集中营
content: Visit planning hint: Shenyang World War II Allied Prisoners Camp Site Museum ( 二战盟军战俘集中营旧址陈列馆 ), 3-30 Ditan Street, Dadong District (大东区地坛街30-3号) ( Close to Pangjiangjie Station on Metro Line 1 ) The site is now a museum

title: Futian
content: Transfer hub hint: 2/8 (Shekou Line) - East-west from Chiwan to Liantang, best for ferry connections and Shekou Sea World Through operation with Line 8, meaning that passengers do not need to transfer at Liantang

title: Shenzhen North
content: Transfer hub hint: 6 North-south and east-west between Futian and the northwestern suburbs, calling at the major transport hub Shenzhen North railway station There is a short branch of Line 6 (operated individually as "Line 6 Branch"), north-south running from Guangming at northwestern Shenzhen to the Sun-Yat-sen and the Shenzhen Polytechnic universities

title: Shenzhen North East
content: Transfer hub hint: 5 (Huanzhong Line) - East-west through Shenzhen's northern suburbs from Chiwan to Huangbeiling, calling at the major transport hubs Shenzhen North and East railway stations

title: cannot Shenzhen
content: Transfer hub hint: 1 (Luobao Line) - East-west from Luohu (HK Border / Shenzhen Railway Station) to Shenzhen Airport East (you cannot get into the airport in this station: announcements will remind travellers that they must change Line 11 ) Luohu Station is connected to Shenzhen railway station and Lo Wu Station of Hong Kong MTR through Luohu Checkpoint in Shenzhen and Lo Wu Control Point in Hong Kong

title: Huiwen Hotel ( 汇文大酒店; Huìwén Dàjiǔdiàn) )
content: Representative stay option: Huiwen Hotel ( 汇文大酒店; Huìwén Dàjiǔdiàn) ), 6 Zhanqian St (站前街; Zhànqiánjiē) ( opposite the railway station ) Four-star hotel with rooms with desk and kettle

title: Hebei Museum ( 河北博物院 )
content: Visit planning hint: This is a must-see and contains expositions from two major discoveries: the tomb of King of Zhongshan (中山王) from the late 4th century BCE, and the royal tombs of prince and princess of the Han principality of Zhongshan (Mancheng 满城 Han tombs) from the late 2nd century BCE 09:00-18:00, last entrance 17:30, closed on Mondays

title: People's Square and Chang'an Park ( 人民广场、长安公园 )
content: Visit planning hint: Shijiazhuang Museum is at the western side An underground mall is near the southern entrance (with a giant white statue of Mao Zedong)

title: Shijiazhuang Museum ( 石家庄市博物馆 )
content: Visit planning hint: Shijiazhuang Museum ( 石家庄市博物馆 ) 09:00-17:00, closed on Mondays

title: Zhaozhou Bridge ( 赵州桥 )
content: Visit planning hint: Zhaozhou Bridge ( 赵州桥 ), Zhao County (赵县; Zhàoxiàn) ( bus from the southern Nanjiao Station (南焦客运站; Nánjiāo Kèyùnzhàn; which can be riched by bus 35 from the Central Railway Station) to Zhao County or, better, to Ningjin County (宁晋县; Níngjìnxiàn), get off the bus at the junction from which it is 1 km walk ) Adjacent small museum with a collection of stone carvings, steles and statues from the vicinity of Zhou County

title: Siping City Jiping Hotel ( 四平市吉平宾馆; Sìpíngshìjípíngbīnguǎn )
content: Representative stay option: Siping City Jiping Hotel ( 四平市吉平宾馆; Sìpíngshìjípíngbīnguǎn ), 104 Xinhua Avenue (新华大街104号; Xīnhuádàjiē ( On the east of the city government site and next to Nanhu Park ) The only four star hotel in town

title: Cycle
content: Planning hint: Suzhou is relatively flat, and once past the ring-road, traffic is light and easy-going enough to enable a pleasant ride about town Jinji Lake, Dushu Lake and a few outlying temples are within casual cycling distance

title: Explore Guanqian Street ( 观前街 )
content: Planning hint: The street is a rather uninspiring shopping street, however the back streets off it harbor many small shops selling local crafts and some interesting restaurants serving local cuisine Explore Guanqian Street ( 观前街 )

title: Suzhou Amusement Land ( Metro 1
content: Planning hint: Suzhou Amusement Land ( Metro 1, Suzhou Amusement Land stop ) Amusement park in the SND west of downtown

title: Suzhou Amusement Land ( Metro 1, Suzhou Amusement Land stop )
content: Planning hint: Suzhou Amusement Land ( Metro 1, Suzhou Amusement Land stop ) Amusement park in the SND west of downtown

title: Weekend cycle rides
content: Planning hint: Two local cycle shops - Specialized Bicycles and Trek Cycles; see below for contact information - organise one or two day rides to nearby attractions such as Lake Tai (30 km one way), Yangcheng Lake (40 km around the lake), Tongli (20 km one way) and Zhouzhuang (40 km one way) Joining the tour is free, although you have to bring your own bike or rent a bike from the store for a deposit and small charge

title: Yangshan Hot Springs
content: Planning hint: By public transportation, take Metro Line 1 to a western station, then take a bus - consult Google Maps for details It's in the outskirts to the west of the city, a 30-minute taxi ride away

title: Yangshan Hot Springs . A hotel resort with hot spring facilities
content: Planning hint: By public transportation, take Metro Line 1 to a western station, then take a bus - consult Google Maps for details It's in the outskirts to the west of the city, a 30-minute taxi ride away

title: Da Mario ( Global 188 Building in SIP )
content: Food planning hint: There really is a Mario, and he really is Italian The pasta dish "Rosetta Della Mamma" is an original

title: Harbin Dumplings , Shizi Jie
content: Food planning hint: The dumplings are much cheaper than the better-known Yang Yang Dumplings, and just as good Harbin Dumplings , Shizi Jie

title: Let's Rock Hong Kong Restaurant ( Hǎo Yuè ), 403 Shi Quan St
content: Food planning hint: Good dim sum- these folks make a serious Barbecued Pork Bun (Cha Shao Bao) Let's Rock Hong Kong Restaurant ( Hǎo Yuè ), 403 Shi Quan St

title: Nanjing Duck Noodle , 95 GongXiang
content: Food planning hint: Traditional duck noodle where the more you pay, the more body parts you get Some of the non-duck part dishes are worth a bite too

title: Sicily , Guanqian Lu ( near Renmin Rd and Ganjing Rd )
content: Food planning hint: Sicily , Guanqian Lu ( near Renmin Rd and Ganjing Rd ) Very good Italian food at near Chinese

title: Xi Sheng Yuan
content: Food planning hint: Xi Sheng Yuan , 43, Fenghuang Jie ( on the west side of the street, approx halfway along - wooden facade, next to a spicy meat snack shop ) This place is more widely known for its Xiao Long Bao (on sale to eat in or take away) in the steamed baskets to the right of the entrance

content: Best used as a stay area because 888 East Ganjiang Rd, Pingjiang District In the Guanqian Commercial Area, 3 km from railway station

title: Mingtown-Suzhou Youth Hostel , No.28 Pingjiang Rd
content: Representative stay option: Weirdly enough, their lounge (Mingtown cafe) is not inside nor adjacent to the hostel - you'd have to go out and walk 10 meters to go to the lounge If you want to bike around the city, book with another hostel.Hot water available only between 7-10AM, and 7-10PM

title: Suzhou Blue Gate Youth Hostel ,
content: Best used as a stay area because Suzhou Blue Gate Youth Hostel , NO.259 Fenghuang Street, Gusu DistrictSuzhou, Jiangsu From CNY 3050

title: Suzhou Nanlin Hotel , No
content: Best used as a stay area because 20 Gunxiufang, Shiquan St, Canglang District Suzhou Nanlin Hotel , No

title: Suzhou Watertown Youth Hostel
content: Representative stay option: Centrally located in a traditional Suzhou block-house with all the modern conveniences, including free Internet access & WiFi, DVDs, bicycle renting (CNY 25/15 full/half day) Suzhou Watertown Youth Hostel , 27 Dashitou Ln 大石头巷27号 ( 1 block from Renmin Rd )

title: Blue Marlin , 168 Xinghai St, Wuzhong
content: Planning hint: A chain of upmarket restaurant/bars with locations in several cities, with Western food, live music and a largely expat crowd Sky Sports on multiple TV screens, comfortable seating and good Wi-Fi

title: Ligongdi (李公堤)
content: Planning hint: Li Gong Di area has plenty of night clubs, bars and one expat-friendly club Pravda (could easily be the only one with a dance floor)

title: Pulp Fiction Bar ( 纸浆小说吧 ), Li Gong Di bar street
content: Planning hint: This Australian bar is a great place to meet Westerners and English-speaking Chinese, shoot some American pool and play a game of darts Pulp Fiction Bar ( 纸浆小说吧 ), Li Gong Di bar street

title: SoloCafe
content: Planning hint: SoloCafe , ShiQuan St ( cross the bridge over the canal across the street from the Suzhou Hotel and it is next to the north side of the bridge on your left ) Good coffee and food with a Lotus theme running right through to the shape of the milk in a mocha

title: The Minghantang Cafe , Santang St
content: Planning hint: In an old traditional house that is more than 400 years old The Minghantang Cafe , Santang St

title: Zapata's , Rainbowalk, Jinji Lake
content: Planning hint: Western DJ plays happy tunes from last 4 decades and free tequila pouring on the bar every night Zapata's , Rainbowalk, Jinji Lake

Visit planning hint: Part of the garden is the Nanmu Hall with a collection of furniture made of nanmu, a wood that is fairly common in China and prized because it looks good and resists both humidity and decay Built in the Ming Dynasty, but many parts of it were rebuilt in the Qing Dynasty

title: Lion Grove Garden ( Lion Forest Garden
content: Visit planning hint: Lion Grove Garden ( Lion Forest Garden, Shi Zi Lin 狮子林 ) ( just off Lindun Rd, near the Humble Administrator's Garden ) Has an incredible collection of pitted, eroded rocks that were greatly appreciated by classical Chinese scholars

content: Visit planning hint: The Garden of Cultivation ( YiPu Garden ) ( in the northwest corner of the old city, inside the encircling canal; ask local shopkeepers for help since it is in an ancient block with small alleys/streets ) Make sure to go all the way towards the back inside the garden to see the best part

content: Visit planning hint: The Garden of the Master of the Nets ( Wang Shi Yuan 网师园 ) ( down a small alley off of Fenghuang Rd, just south of Shiquan Jie ) The enclosed complex of house and garden is one of the smallest, most beautiful, and most perfectly proportioned in Suzhou

content: Visit planning hint: The Surging Wave Pavilion ( Canglang Pavilion, Canglang Ting 沧浪亭 ) ( just off Renmin Rd on the S side of the old town, near the Confucian Temple ) This garden is best viewed from within its many pavilions, with windows framing different views

content: Visit planning hint: Longquan Temple ( 龙泉寺 Lóngquánsì; also known as Taishan Temple ) ( 23 km from the city )

content: Food planning hint: Bodun (博盾) , 42 Heping Rd N ( 5 min S of People's Sq ) Delicious and cheap Uyghur staples

title: Dumpling House ( from Rendezvous on 960 Yan'an Rd
content: Food planning hint: They serve a form of fried, then steamed dumplings that are very popular with the local crowd, accompanied by a hot bowl of butter milk tea For an authentic local experience, just around the corner from the Rendezvous cafe, try here

title: Edo No Sakura , 65 Guangming Rd ( On 1F of brightly colored high rise near Hongshan Park )
content: Food planning hint: Edo No Sakura , 65 Guangming Rd ( On 1F of brightly colored high rise near Hongshan Park ) For those intrigued by the prospect of eating sushi in the city furthest from an ocean

title: Rendezvous
content: Food planning hint: Rendezvous , 960 Yan'an Rd ( right by the Silk Road Hotel, on the 16, 63,106 and 912 bus routes ) Also offers an excellent breakfast menu on the weekends, and their wraps are quite delicious

content: Food planning hint: The Texas Cafe ( 德州咖啡屋 ), Nanmen Mashixiaoqu ( near Nanmen down the grapevine covered alley across from the south entrance to the computer market ) The place is decorated with a lot of Texas memorabilia and it's somewhat of an Tex-Mex oasis there in Xinjiang

title: Baolu International Youth Hostel

title: Confucian Temple , Qianjin Lu

title: People's Park ( 人民公园 )
content: Visit planning hint: Busy at all times of day but particularly in the early mornings and evenings, with people making music, singing, dancing, playing games, exercising, doing tai chi, practicing calligraphy, in fact pretty much any recreational activity 8, 44, 58, 308, 903 or 912 and get off at the West Park (西公园) bus stop, which is just outside the park's south gate )

title: People's Square ( 人民广场 )
content: Visit planning hint: A big square in the middle of town with an army monument in the middle

title: Red Mountain Park ( Hongshan Park
content: Visit planning hint: This pleasant park has, among other things, a Ferris wheel, a Buddhist temple and great views over the city Red Mountain Park ( Hongshan Park, 红山公园 ), 40 Bei Yi Lane, Hongshan Road, Shuimogou District (水磨沟区红山路北一巷40号) ( Bus routes 7, 14, 17, 52, 68, 157, 301, 311, 537, 907, 910, 917, brt1, brt2, brt4, and brt71 )

content: Visit planning hint: Xinjiang Uyghur Autonomous Region Museum ( 新疆维吾尔自治区博物馆 ), 581 Xibei Road, Shayibake District (沙依巴克区西北路581号) ( Bus routes 7, 51, 68, 303, 305, 311, 518, 532, 906, 910, 912, 5201 and brt4 ) If you start your trip around Xinjiang, the museum gives you a very good introduction about the history and minorities

title: Grape Beach ( 葡萄滩海水浴场 )
content: Planning hint: The beach here is very large, and because of the villages around it, few people come to play Grape Beach is a beach without any artificial carving

title: Weihai International Bathing Beach ( 国际海水浴场 )

title: Xi Xia Kou
content: Planning hint: Xi Xia Kou, approx 40 km east of Weihai, a beautiful Zoo and lands end "Chengshantou"

title: There is a Western/Chinese breakfast buffet at the Golden Bay Hotel on the NE end of the I
content: Food planning hint: There is a Western/Chinese breakfast buffet at the Golden Bay Hotel on the NE end of the International beach for about USD10 They'll expect a room number, but will seat visitors

title: the local major grocers usually have a small international selection where one may find Do
content: Food planning hint: the local major grocers usually have a small international selection where one may find Dove chocolates, pasta and sauces, and pantry staples that have a long shelf life If you look hard, some stores even carry New Zealand butter or French Brie and aged English cheddar cheese and a decent selection of biscuits/crackers

title: Burris International Hotel ( 铂丽斯国际大酒店 )
content: Representative stay option: The hotel offers free toiletries, 24-hour room service, a free gym as well as laundry services and parking Burris International Hotel ( 铂丽斯国际大酒店 )

title: Moon Coffee Bar.
content: Planning hint: It is a coffee bar on the beach with a view of the sea and sunset It is a good choice when the weather is nice

title: The Walnut Alley Music Tavern.
content: Planning hint: The Xiaozi mood music bar around Han Le Fang has food, such as roast chicken, mapo tofu and so on The Walnut Alley Music Tavern

title: Weihai Fruit Sweets ( 威海花果小甜 ), Lotte Century City 2-16
content: Planning hint: Located in the Hanlefang business district of Weihai, it focuses on fig-themed drinks and products, and is well-liked by local residents and tourists Many customers praise the fig drink for its natural freshness and moderate sweetness, especially in summer, making it a great product for cooling off

title: Cat Head Mountain ( 猫山头 )
content: Visit planning hint: Cat Head Mountain, about 0.2 kilometers long, an area of about 0.02 square kilometers, the highest point of 45.7 meters above sea level.It is named after a cat shaped like a cat Cat Head Mountain ( 猫山头 )

title: First World War Chinese Laborers Memorial ( 一战华工纪念馆 )
content: Visit planning hint: Opened in July 2020, this new memorial is dedicated to the tens of thousands of Chinese workers who were employed as labourers by French and British forces in Europe during the First World War The memorial is administered by the Weihai Museum

title: The Dream Sea ( 那香海 )
content: Visit planning hint: The Dream Sea ( 那香海 ), 6699 Huanhai Road, Rongcheng City, ( 山东省威海市荣成市环海大道6699号 )

content: Visit planning hint: 1.From Rongcheng or Weihai by car along the road to the east, you can reach the top of the mountain Xixiakou zoo ( 西霞口动物园 ), Xixiakou Village, Chengshan Town, Yuxia Road, Rongcheng ( 裕霞路成山镇西霞口村 )

title: Learn Chinese
content: Planning hint: As a very Chinese city it is difficult to find English speakers outside of universities, colleges and certain bars For this reason, Wenzhou is perfect for the home learner to practice their Putonghua out on the street

title: Pool Halls
content: Planning hint: There are many pool halls dotted around Wenzhou, ranging from free to CNY 30/hour

title: Taxi rides
content: Planning hint: Taxis are cheap enough that you can just get driven around for an hour or so and not be out too many dough

title: Wenzhou Amusement Park ( 温州乐园 ), No
content: Planning hint: CNY 130 (adults and children over 1.5 metres in height), CNY 70 (Men over 60 years old, women over 55 years old, children between 1.2 and 1.5 metres in height and disabled people) Financed and constructed by Sino-US joint venture company and designed by an American designer

title: Do&Me
content: Food planning hint: Another Chinese-style fried chicken fast-food restaurant, many of them dot the city

title: Lao Beijing ( 老北京; Lǎo Běijīng; lit
content: Food planning hint: Old Beijing ), North end of Wendilu (温迪路北向 Wēndílùběixiàng) ( 30 meters from Chezhan Street (车站大道 Chēzhàndàdào) ) A great place offering some northern Chinese classics

title: Pizza Hut
content: Food planning hint: There are three Pizza Huts, one on Renmin Lu (人民路), one on Wuma Street (五马街) and another in the European City shopping district (欧洲城)

title: Starbucks
content: Food planning hint: One of the few places that you can purchase decaf coffee beans 2nd floor good place to use your laptop or to meet friends

title: Super Bee Pizza
content: Food planning hint: The Wenzhou answer to the Western pizza chains, Super Bee Pizza has a wide menu although some choices are a little pricey They offer just decent pizza and not the kind of thing that satisfies a seasoned food lover

title: Dynasty Hotel ( 王朝大酒店; Wángcháo Dàjiǔdiàn )
content: Representative stay option: Dynasty Hotel ( 王朝大酒店; Wángcháo Dàjiǔdiàn ), 2 Minhang Road (民航路2号; Mínhánglù) Extensive conferencing facilities, but not highly regarded rooms

title: Ex Palme d'Or Hotel , No
content: Best used as a stay area because Ex Palme d'Or Hotel offers 110 elegant rooms, which are good for two guests, all have a private shower, satellite TV, mini-bar, IDD phone, and free Internet access 23 Minhang Road, Lucheng District

title: Rest Chain Motel ( 锐思特汽车连锁旅店 (温州西山店); Ruìsītèqì Chēliánsuǒlǚdiàn (Wēnzhōu Xīshāndiàn) )
content: Best used as a stay area because Rest Chain Motel ( 锐思特汽车连锁旅店 (温州西山店); Ruìsītèqì Chēliánsuǒlǚdiàn (Wēnzhōu Xīshāndiàn) ) Xishandong Road, Ouhai District (瓯海区西山东路190-198号; Ōuhǎiqū Xīshāndōnglù) The cheapest rooms are quite small

title: Shunsheng Star Hotel ( 温州顺生之星酒店; Wēnzhōu Shùnshēngzhīxīng Jiǔdiàn )
content: Best used as a stay area because Shunsheng Star Hotel ( 温州顺生之星酒店; Wēnzhōu Shùnshēngzhīxīng Jiǔdiàn ), 34 Lucheng Road, Lucheng District (鹿城区鹿城路34号; Lùchéngqū Lùchénglù) Listed rates for doubles from CNY 380

title: Wenzhou Dynasty Hotel , No
content: Best used as a stay area because 2 Min Hang Road, Ouhai District Also specializes in traditional Ou cuisine), and recreation center (features a sauna, massage center, KTV, disco, mahjong, snooker room, table tennis, gym, tennis court)

title: 1682 , 117 Shuomen Street (朔门街117号; Shuòménjiē) ( Between Eric's No.3 and Hello K.T
content: Planning hint: 1682 , 117 Shuomen Street (朔门街117号; Shuòménjiē) ( Between Eric's No.3 and Hello K.T This bar/club is sometimes very popular for its lounge layout, a little

title: 419 Bar , 66 Shuomen Street (朔门街66号; Shuòménjiē) ( Between Eric's No.3 and Hello K.T
content: Planning hint: Quiet tea house and bar that also plays host to a popular English Corner (Thursday nights 7PM), even if foreigners are rare in attending 419 Bar , 66 Shuomen Street (朔门街66号; Shuòménjiē) ( Between Eric's No.3 and Hello K.T

title: Blue Shell
content: Planning hint: Blue Shell , 13 North Lane, Wendi Road (温迪路北巷13号; Wēndílù Běixiàng) ( off Wendi Road, nearby EF English School ) The longtime foreign owner of Blue Shell has sold this bar to a local lady

title: Bund 18 ( 外滩十八号; Wàitānshíbāhào ), 111 Wangjiang East Road (望江东路111号; Wàngjiāngdōnglù)
content: Planning hint: Bund 18 ( 外滩十八号; Wàitānshíbāhào ), 111 Wangjiang East Road (望江东路111号; Wàngjiāngdōnglù) It offers free alcohol to foreigners who know the right people

title: L.V.
content: Planning hint: A mug of beer will cost you CNY 25, so not too pricey, and there's plenty of people to dance with 198 Shuanglong Road (双龙路198号) ( on the same crossroads as Eric's No

title: Stephanos
content: Planning hint: Italian bar in the place of New Age Lounge, great

title: East Gate Street ( 东门街; Dōngménjiē )
content: Visit planning hint: 71, 102, 108 or b112, get off at the East Gate Building (东门大厦), then walk one block north ) East Gate Street ( 东门街; Dōngménjiē ), Lucheng District (鹿城区) ( northeast of Wuma Street (五马街), closer to the river; take bus no

title: Epoch Art Museum ( 温州年代美术馆 )
content: Visit planning hint: Epoch Art Museum ( 温州年代美术馆 ), Building 4, Bailuzhou Park, Lucheng District (鹿城区白鹿洲公园4号CNY ) ( Take bus no You will find the museum on the east side of the park

title: Oubei ( 瓯北; ōuběi )
content: Visit planning hint: Close to the dock there are some nice temples at the bottom and top of a hill Oubei ( 瓯北; ōuběi ), Yongjia County (永嘉县) ( you can take a boat across the river from 2 different docks, both east of the one to Jiangxin island, costing CNY 1.5 each way )

title: Wenzhou Museum ( 温州博物馆 )
content: Visit planning hint: Wenzhou Museum ( 温州博物馆 ), 491 Shifu Road, Lucheng District (鹿城区市府路491) ( Bus routes 8, 31 and 89 ) enquiries) bookings) Tu-Su 09ː00-17ː00, no entry after 16ː00

title: Wuma Street ( 五马街; Wǔmǎjiē )
content: Visit planning hint: From there, walk north for about 80 meters to find the entrance to the pedestrian street on your right ) Wuma Street is Wenzhou's most popular pedestrian street, known for its vibrant atmosphere and local specialties

title: Alipay
content: Transfer hub hint: Alipay: Wuhan buses accept the "Wuhan Electronic Bus Card" QR code for boarding, deducting the Alipay users enjoy an 80% discount but cannot access transfer discounts

title: WeChat
content: District movement hint: WeChat: Certain routes, especially suburban ones, require WeChat Electronic Bus Cards for QR code payments

title: Wuhan Customs House Wharf ( 武汉关码头 )
content: Transfer hub hint: Wuhan Customs House Wharf ( 武汉关码头 ), 14 Yanjiang Avenue Riverside, Jianghan District, Hankou (汉口江汉区沿江大道江滩14号) ( about 900 metres southeast of Jianghan Road Metro Station on Lines 2 and 6; near the Hankou Customs House Museum

title: Zhonghua Road Wharf ( 中华路码头 )
content: Transfer hub hint: Zhonghua Road Wharf ( 中华路码头 ), 78 Linjiang Avenue Riverside, Wuchang District (武昌区临江大道江滩78号) ( about 1.5 km northwest of the Yellow Crane Tower about 2 km west of Xiaodongmen Metro Station on Line 7 )

title: Canal Bund Art Museum ( 运河外滩美术馆 )
content: Planning hint: Canal Bund Art Museum ( 运河外滩美术馆 ), No.11, Hubin Road, Binhu District ( self-drive or taxi )

title: Huishan Ancient Town
content: Planning hint: There's a paid parking lot inside, which is about CNY 10 to 15 each time, and you can enjoy the flowers inside: there are azaleas, begonias, and green cherry blossoms Huishan Ancient Town - Yuchangyuan ( 惠山古镇·寄畅园 ), No

title: Wuxi Hot Snow Miracle ( 无锡热雪奇迹 ), 2/F, Rongchuangmao, No
content: Planning hint: The snow facility consists of one beginner's trail, two intermediate trails, and five magic carpets 66, Rongchuang Culture & Tourism City, Binhu District ( self-drive or taxi )

title: Wuxi Sunac Land ( 无锡融创乐园 )
content: Planning hint: Wuxi Sunac Land ( 无锡融创乐园 ), 150 meters south of the intersection of Yuanxi Road and Wuzhu Road, Binhu District ( self-drive or taxi ) The internal roller coaster is 1,278 meters long, with the fastest speed of 118 km/h

title: Wuxi Sunac Sea World ( 无锡融创海世界 )
content: Planning hint: The second phase of the project will add more than 60 species, involving more than 39 subjects such as conical tooth sharks, bearded sharks, squids, stone crabs, bullnose rays, conger eels, etc., and the overall introduction of 1,500 marine species Wuxi Sunac Sea World ( 无锡融创海世界 ), Ground Floor, Rongchuangmao, 150 meters south of the intersection of Yuanxi Road and Wuzhu Road, Binhu District ( self-drive or taxi )

title: Wuxi Zoo ( 无锡动物园 )
content: Planning hint: It is a landmark zoo, suitable for playing with small children, with internal sightseeing buses and full facilities Wuxi Zoo ( 无锡动物园 ), No.99 Qianrong Road, Binhu District ( self-drive or taxi )

title: Camphor Bistro ( 香樟餐酒馆 )
content: Food planning hint: Camphor Bistro ( 香樟餐酒馆 ), 88 Jingshi Road, Binhu District, 1st Floor ( Starting from Wuxi Railway Station, take Metro Line 3 towards Sumiao Next, transfer to Metro Line 4 and ride for eight stops until you reach Dajuyuan Station

title: Lao Niu Wo Li ( 老牛窝里 ), No
content: Food planning hint: A long-established restaurant specializing in Wuxi cuisine, known for its sweet flavors 8, Nanxia Tang Cultural and Creative Park, 213 Nanxia Tang ( r taking Metro Line 1 towards Nanchan Temple Station, it's a 1.7-kilometer walk to reach destination )

title: Saizeriya
content: Food planning hint: Saizeriya , a Japanese chain of Italian restaurants where a decently-sized plate of pasta can be had for less than CNY 20 and all-you-can-drink soft drinks available for an additional CNY 7 Find it in two locations: Zhongshan Road No.328 in T12 Shopping Center and Guangrui Road No.399 in Lifespace

title: Sanfengqiao ( 三凤桥肉庄 sānfèngqiáo ròuzhuāng )
content: Food planning hint: Sanfengqiao ( 三凤桥肉庄 sānfèngqiáo ròuzhuāng ), 240 Zhongshan Rd, Chong'an District One of the most famous purveyors of Wuxi-style braised spare ribs

title: Wagyu Steak House ( 和牛屋 )
content: Food planning hint: Wagyu Steak House ( 和牛屋 ), 7 Houyang Lane, Liangxi District ( Starting from Wuxi Railway Station, take bus number 712 towards Ganlu Parking Lot A Western restaurant primarily focused on steaks

title: Xiuyuan Su-style Hotpot (Wuxi First Branch) ( 绣园苏式火锅(无锡首店) )
content: Food planning hint: Xiuyuan Su-style Hotpot (Wuxi First Branch) ( 绣园苏式火锅(无锡首店) ), 3 Hua Yuan Lane, Nanxia Tang, Qingming Bridge Subdistrict, Liangxi District ( by taking Metro Line 1 in the direction of Nanfang Quan for 6 stops, arrive at Qingming Bridge A popular hotpot restaurant among young people in Wuxi, known for its signature handcrafted tomato broth

title: Wuxi Jin Jiang Grand Hotel , 218 Zhongshan Road, Chong'an District
content: Best used as a stay area because Wuxi Jin Jiang Grand Hotel , 218 Zhongshan Road, Chong'an District A 4-star hotel that features a revolving restaurant located on the 28th floor which affords guests a stunning panoramic view of the city

title: Blue Bar Cafe , 53
content: Planning hint: Western-owned and -managed bar/restaurant in the center of town Blue Bar Cafe , 53 - 1 Chongning lu

title: Ducal Coffee & Food
content: Planning hint: Ducal Coffee & Food , 135 Nanxia Tang Street, Liangxi District A small pub serving cocktails and light meals

title: Now Og One Club , No
content: Planning hint: 12-3, Yongle East Road, Nanxia Tang ( accessible by walking from Nan Chan Si Station on Metro Line 1 ) A club-style bar and drinks available in the evening with live entertainment

title: The Imperial family no.1 ( 蝗家一号 )
content: Planning hint: The Imperial family no.1 ( 蝗家一号 ), 无锡市东梁溪路9号一CNY ( on bar street with lot of other bars ) This is a big noisy club

title: Nianhua Bay ( 拈花湾 )
content: Visit planning hint: Nianhua Bay ( 拈花湾 ), 68 Huan Shan Xi Road, Binhu District ( take the Le You Line 2 for five stops to reach Nianhua Bay Station ) Nianhua Bay is a themed town scenic area with Zen as its main theme, located to the west of the Ling Shan Scenic Area

title: The Grand Canal is 1800 km long and travels from Beijing to Hangzhou
content: Visit planning hint: The Grand Canal is 1800 km long and travels from Beijing to Hangzhou It is not really for sightseeing but it is there

title: Wuxi Museum ( 无锡博物院 )
content: Visit planning hint: Wuxi Museum ( 无锡博物院 ), 100 Zhongshu Road, Liangxi District (梁溪区钟书路100号) ( take a metro train to Qingmingqiao Station on Line 1 or take bus no Tu-Su 09:00-17:00, no entry after 16:00, closed on Mondays

title: Action Sports
content: Planning hint: Talk to a travel agent such as the one at the bridge between resort and park to do all sorts of paragliding and similar action sports Touts will offer you this randomly too which is not so recommended

title: Tea eggs
content: Food planning hint: Nice cheap snack found anywhere in China but particularly good at Wuyi Mountain if good tea is used These are eggs hardboiled in tea with a little hole to let the taste fill the egg white

title: Dragon Resort
content: Representative stay option: The staff is very friendly and the quality of the hotel is good A great breakfast is included

title: Wuyi Mountain Water
content: Planning hint: Bottled water from the mountain (you could fill your bottles in the little rivers inside the park area for probably the same water) Do not drink the water from the larger rivers

title: Ancient Cliff Dwellings ( 武夷古崖居遗构 )
content: Visit planning hint: Ancient wooden buildings built into an inaccessible crack in the cliff, once accessed via a pulley system Ancient Cliff Dwellings ( 武夷古崖居遗构 )

title: Eagle Beak Rock
content: Visit planning hint: A nicely-shaped rock but you can only walk past it within the valleys and no climbing is possible Halfway between Water Curtain Cave and Da Hong Pao Valley

title: Jade Beauty Peak ( 玉女峰 )
content: Visit planning hint: You can walk there from Tiger Roaring Rock or Ray of Sky You see this from the rafting and from a rocky beach at the side of the river

title: Spiral Cave ( 螺丝洞 )
content: Visit planning hint: A rock is carved from the bottom which is an amazing structure Go there for a photo if you are already nearby anyway

title: Tiger Roaring Rock ( 虎啸岩 )
content: Visit planning hint: Great view over the surrounding rocky area, but the peak is closed off There are still really nice places to see and the path continues to the Ray of Sky cave to the south or to Jade Beauty Peak to the north

title: Water Curtain Cave ( 水帘洞 )
content: Visit planning hint: You can walk a small loop and end up back at the main path to continue to the tea valleys (towards Da Hong Pao and Tianxin Yongle Temple) or just return to the bus station Reachable from its bus stop by walking 20-30 min on a road to the base and then 5-10 min up to the waterfall

title: Bike the City Walls
content: Planning hint: Bicycles can be rented on each of the four main gates for 180 minutes, CNY 45 per person (=CNY 90 for a tandem), and it may to be returned to any of the other stations (however, be sure to verify this before starting your ride or if they are still Because the City Wall's top-floor is very bumpy in nature, most people give up in midway because they can't bear the uncomfortable riding experience

title: Stroll round the Drum and Bell Tower area after dark
content: Planning hint: Stroll round the Drum and Bell Tower area after dark, when they're brilliantly illuminated

title: Walk the City Walls
content: Planning hint: The area outside of the "Gate" is full of big shopping malls that are popular among the locals, marked with the iconic glass-curtain walled buildings Walk along the city walls and see the South Gate (南门 Nánmén , literally translated as "The Southern Gate"), which is illuminated at night

title: Biáng biáng miàn
content: Food planning hint: Biáng biáng miàn (𰻝𰻝面) is a local provincial specialty noodle dish that is extremely good Although this kind of noodles has created a brand of the same name (trademarked), under which several such restaurants are run across the whole city, not every one serves the noodles that taste like the original

title: Green Molly Restaurant & Pub ( 绿茉莉 ) ( 200 m north of Ginwa Shopping Center on the interse
content: Food planning hint: Green Molly Restaurant & Pub ( 绿茉莉 ) ( 200 m north of Ginwa Shopping Center on the intersection of Gaoxin Road and Keji Road (西安市高新区高科大厦副CNY 一层 (世纪金花商场后门向北200米路东)) ) Downstairs, the first and only real pub in Xi'an has a wide selection of beverages ranging from imported beers to wine and delicious cocktails

title: Li Ming's Dumpling House ( 李明饺子馆 )
content: Food planning hint: A tiny, family-run spot known only to locals, serving exceptional guotie (potstickers) and baozi (steamed buns) with secret-recipe fillings Li Ming's Dumpling House ( 李明饺子馆 ), Off the main tourist streets in the Beilin District

title: Ròu jiā mó Yú Lǎo Dà
content: Food planning hint: A recommendation of such an "authentic" restaurant would be Yú Lǎo Dà (literally translated as "Mr.Yu's") located in the Wuxing Street, just across the Roman Catholic church This is a local tradition and should be very easy to locate

title: Small World Cafe ( Jiànguómén 建国门 )
content: Food planning hint: Small World Cafe ( Jiànguómén 建国门 ), Huancheng Nanlu Dongduan 90# ( outside Jian Guo Gate (建国门外) ) Known by the older generations as "the oldest western restaurant in Xi'an", which opened in the early 70s

title: Street food
content: Food planning hint: Street food (mostly sold after sunset, or some near night clubs/bars after 23:00) presents a variety of local/regional dishes, ranging from noodle soups, dumplings, hot pot, and so on by tens of little food vendors on street side, each with a red lamp There are a few roads running perpendicular to the Muslim Quarter road that have a larger variety of streetside food (at cheaper

title: Xiǎo lóng bāozi
content: Food planning hint: Look for its big brother "Da baozi" only available first thing in the mornings, like a steamed Cornish pastie, but very nice Xiǎo lóng bāozi (小笼包子) are basket-steamed dumplings (one basket CNY 3), common as a midnight snack

title: Yángròu Pàomó
content: Food planning hint: Yángròu Pàomó (羊肉泡馍) is one of the signature dishes of the area, it consists of a piece of thick, chewy bread and a kettle of lamb soup The diner shreds the bread with his hands and places the shreds in a bowl, the soup is then poured over the shreds (along with meat, maybe some noodles or scallion, etc.) The trick is to shred the bread into pieces that are "as small as possible", like the size of your pinky fingernail

title: Bob's Guesthouse
content: Representative stay option: Bob's Guesthouse , 85 Huan Cheng Bei Lu Rd ( just outside the city walls, a short walk from the train station ) Doubles with en-suite bathroom for CNY 100; dorms from CNY 25 (summer 2006)

title: Grand Mercure on Renmin Square ( 西安豪华美居人民大厦 )
content: Representative stay option: A heritage hotel of 202 rooms, 21 suites, first opened in 1957 and reflects the Sino Russian style of architecture Grand Mercure on Renmin Square ( 西安豪华美居人民大厦 ), 319 Dongxin St ( in the grounds of Renmin Square
tags: 西安豪华美居人民大厦

title: Han Tang Inn Youth Hostel
content: Representative stay option: Rates range from CNY 30-160; doubles with en suite bathroom costs CNY 120/night (as of June 2010; booked on hostelworld.com) The hostel includes a bar on the 4th floor with TV, pool table, movies and 3 guitars

title: Warriors International Youth Hostel
content: Representative stay option: Warriors International Youth Hostel , No.98 Bei Ma Dao Xiang ( across the street from the West Wall, North from the main West Gate and South of the Lama Temple ) Staff are young, friendly, have a good grip on English

title: Xi'an Shuyuan International Youth Hostel
content: Representative stay option: There is an excellent pub under the hostel, and a very nice coffee house Xi'an Shuyuan International Youth Hostel , Xi Nanmen

title: duolamaer gallery international youth hostel
content: Representative stay option: Duolamaer is a painting-themed hostel providing a vibrant accommodation for independent travelers who require basic but clean living facilities duolamaer gallery international youth hostel , 7 Shuncheng Avenue, Zhuque Gate ( 10 m from South Gate )

title: De Fu Lou Cafe & Bar ( De Fu Lou Paulaner Bar ), De Fu Xiang Street
content: Planning hint: De Fu Lou Cafe & Bar ( De Fu Lou Paulaner Bar ), De Fu Xiang Street In Bar Street (De Fu Xiang), one of the first bars ever to

title: Havana Bar , Renmin Square ( in Sofitel Hotel )
content: Planning hint: It's not your average Buena Vista Social Club, though: they play loud music in between band performances and the band plays a wide array of pop and salsa This location is more of a club than an actual Latin bar

title: Park Qin ( basement Qin bar )
content: Planning hint: Park Qin ( basement Qin bar ), A-2 Shuncheng West Alley (inside the South City Gate), Beilin District, Xi'an ( go to South Gate; walk along inside wall about 20 m; go into hostel and down stairs into basement ) An underground basement bar (underneath Xi'an Shuyuan International Youth Hostel )

title: Shaanxi Art Museum ( 陕西美术馆 )
content: Visit planning hint: Shaanxi Art Museum ( 陕西美术馆 ), 587 East Avenue, Xincheng District (新城区东大街587号) ( Zhonglou Metro Station (Line 2); about 400 meters east of the Bell Tower ) Development Department) Exhibitions Department) Curator's Office) The Shaanxi Art Museum is the smaller of the two museums and mainly displays paintings and calligraphy

title: Shaanxi History Museum ( 陕西历史博物馆; Shǎnxī Lìshǐbówùguǎn )
content: Visit planning hint: Shaanxi History Museum ( 陕西历史博物馆; Shǎnxī Lìshǐbówùguǎn ), 91 Xiaozhai East Road, Yanta District (雁塔区小寨东路91号) ( Xiaozhai subway stop (Lines 2 & 3); 800 m northwest of Big Wild Goose Pagoda ) Although some guidebooks call it "one of the best museums in China", its old fashioned pots-and-arrowheads-behind-glass format may appeal mainly to enthusiasts

title: Shaanxi Nature Museum ( 陕西自然博物馆 )
content: Visit planning hint: Shaanxi Nature Museum ( 陕西自然博物馆 ), 88 Chang'an South Road, Yanta District (雁塔区长安南路88号) ( Exit B, Huizhan Zhongxin Metro Station, Line 2 ) The museum has exhibitions on nature, science and technology

title: Shaanxi Province Art Museum ( 陕西美术博物馆 )
content: Visit planning hint: Shaanxi Province Art Museum ( 陕西美术博物馆 ), 14 Chang'an North Road, Beilin District (碑林区长安北路14号) ( Tiyuchang Metro Station, Line 2 ) Not be confused with the Shaanxi Art Museum (listed above)

title: Shaanxi Science & Technology Museum ( 陕西科学技术馆
content: Visit planning hint: Shaanxi Science & Technology Museum ( 陕西科学技术馆, 陕西科技馆 ), 252 Dongxin Street, Xincheng District (新城区东新街252号) ( near the Xincheng Square (新城广场) bus stop, which is served by bus nos 16, 32, 46, 102, 182, 251, 286, 309, 601, 603, 702 and Tourist Bus 7; about 805 meters northwest of Dachashi Metro Station on Line 4 and about 876 meters east of Zhonglou Metro Station on Line 2 )

title: Xi'an Art Museum ( 西安美术馆 )
content: Visit planning hint: Xi'an Art Museum ( 西安美术馆 ), Zhenguan Culture Square, Great Tang All Day Mall, Qujiang New District (曲江新区大唐不夜城贞观文化广场) ( about 840 m northwest of Datang Furongyuan Metro Station on Line 4 ) Displays a wide range of artworks from both Chinese and foreign artists

title: Xi'an Jiaotong University Museum ( 西安交通大学博物馆 )
content: Visit planning hint: Xi'an Jiaotong University Museum ( 西安交通大学博物馆 ), 28 Xianing West Road, Beilin District (碑林区咸宁西路28号) ( about 500 m east of Taiyi Metro Station on Line 5; in the soutwest corner of the campus ) Maintains a collection of around 5000 historical and cultural artefacts

title: Xi'an Museum ( 西安博物院 )
content: Visit planning hint: The Xi'an Museum isn't as large or as famous as the Shaanxi History Museum, but has a decent collection of over 110,000 artefacts, of which around 2000 are normally on display Xi'an Museum ( 西安博物院 ), 72 Youyi West Road, Beilin District (碑林区友谊西路72号) ( Nanshaomen Metro Station, Lines 2 & 3; in the same area as the Little Wild Goose Pagoda; )

title: Line 2 runs north-south
content: District movement hint: It connects the North Railway Station, the City Library (your starting point for visiting the Hanyangling mausoleum), the Bell Tower, and Xiaozhai near the Shaanxi history museum Line 2 runs north-south, intersects with Line 1 at Beidajie to the North of the bell tower

title: Line 2 runs north-south, intersects with Line 1 at Beidajie to the North of the bell tower
content: District movement hint: It connects the North Railway Station, the City Library (your starting point for visiting the Hanyangling mausoleum), the Bell Tower, and Xiaozhai near the Shaanxi history museum Line 2 runs north-south, intersects with Line 1 at Beidajie to the North of the bell tower

title: Line 3 runs southwest-northeast
content: District movement hint: Line 3 runs southwest-northeast, intersecting with Line 1 at Tonghuamen, and Line 2 at Xiaozhai It serves the Big Wild Goose Pagoda (Dayanta station)

title: Line 9 serves the northeastern suburbs and the terracotta warriors
content: District movement hint: Line 9 serves the northeastern suburbs and the terracotta warriors Can be reached at the end of line 1 or 6

title: Oyster omelette
content: Food planning hint: Oyster omelette (海蛎煎 hǎilìjiān in Mandarin, 蚵仔煎 ô-á-chian in Minnan) - Small oysters, eggs, sweet potato starch and garlic shoots fried together If you've visited Taiwan before, don't be fooled by the name, as the Xiamen version of the dish is quite different from the Taiwanese version

title: Sea worm jelly
content: Food planning hint: Sea worm jelly (土笋冻 tǔsǔndòng ) - Surely Xiamen's most infamous dish, it's just what it says on the tin: marine worms served in aspic with a little soy sauce and chilli to wash it down The worms are basically tasteless but the texture is distinctly chewy

title: Shacha noodles
content: Food planning hint: Shacha noodles (沙茶面 shāchá miàn ) - Likely the most famous dish in Xiamen, the Minnan reading sa-te mi hints at their origin: the peanutty broth originates from the Malay satay

title: China International Garden and Flower Exposition
content: District movement hint: It was in Xiamen in 2007, and a large Water Garden Expo Park was built to host it (details at Jimei#See ); presumably it will return there sometime The annual China International Garden and Flower Exposition takes place in a different city each year

title: China Xiamen Machinery and Electronics Exhibition Straits Fair
content: Transfer hub hint: The China Xiamen Machinery and Electronics Exhibition (CXMEE), also called the Straits Fair since it is run as a joint venture with a Taiwan organisation, is downtown (on Hubin Bei Lu) in the Spring

title: Ride Hailing Apps
content: Arrival advice: It is recommended to download and set up the app before arrival, and payments can be made through common mobile payment methods In rural areas, ride availability may be more limited so you can book ahead for expect longer wait times

title: Xiamen Metro
content: District movement hint: Line 1 runs north to south mostly connecting the Xiamen North railway station with downtown, while Line 2 mostly runs east to west, connecting the northeast of the island through downtown, and ending in Haicang on the mainland Line 3 connects Xiamen railway station with points north and east including Xiang'an

title: KFC ( 肯德基 ), Near the Wangfujing Shopping Mall, Xi Dajie
content: Food planning hint: There are a few KFCs in the city, but this is by far the most centrally located KFC ( 肯德基 ), Near the Wangfujing Shopping Mall, Xi Dajie

title: XiNanGuanJie Market , XinNanGuanJie ( Just outside Dongguan Mosque )
content: Food planning hint: You can get tea, street food, fruits, bread, and other Muslim (Hui) delicacies here XiNanGuanJie Market , XinNanGuanJie ( Just outside Dongguan Mosque )

content: Best used as a stay area because Home Inn (Xining Central Square) ( 如家快捷酒店 (西宁中心广场店); Rújiākuàijiéjiǔdiàn (Xīníngzhōngxīnguǎngchǎngdiàn) ), Near west building of Ximen Gym, Chengzhong District (城中区西门体育馆西附CNY ; Chéngzhōngqū Xīméntǐyùguǎnxīfùlóu)

title: Mercure Hotel ( 以勒美居酒店 ) Road
content: Representative stay option: Mercure Hotel ( 以勒美居酒店 ) Road Comfortable rooms, centrally located

title: Qinghai Hotel ( 青海宾馆 ), No.158 Huanghe Road
content: Representative stay option: Qinghai Hotel ( 青海宾馆 ), No.158 Huanghe Road Rooms are spacious and clean

title: Qinghai Shuili Hotel ( 青海省水利宾馆; Qīnghǎishěng Shuǐlì Bīnguǎn )
content: Best used as a stay area because Qinghai Shuili Hotel ( 青海省水利宾馆; Qīnghǎishěng Shuǐlì Bīnguǎn ), 18-8 Kunlun Road, Chengxi District (城西区昆仑路18-8号; Chéngxīqū Kūnlúnlù Listed rates for doubles from CNY 168, discounted from CNY 128, no breakfast

title: Green House Cafe , Xiadu Avenue, Near Yangshan Villas
content: Planning hint: Relaxed atmosphere, good Wi-Fi, and, some say, the best coffee in the city Green House Cafe , Xiadu Avenue, Near Yangshan Villas

title: No. 88 Bar ( 88号酒吧 )
content: Planning hint: 88 Bar ( 88号酒吧 ), 7-1 Road, Across from the TCM Hospital ( 七一路中医院斜对面 ) Crowded on the weekends, but a bigger crowd at Soho

title: Qilin Bay Bar Strip ( Qilin Wan ), Intersection of Kunlun West and Huanghe Road
content: Planning hint: They cannot be seen from down the road, but just below the bridge you should see a number of cars parked, with steps down into the park Qilin Bay Bar Strip ( Qilin Wan ), Intersection of Kunlun West and Huanghe Road

title: Soho ( 苏荷酒吧 ), 116 Nanguan Street ( West Side of Xining Stadium )
content: Planning hint: Soho is Xining's most popular nightclub, usually busy past 2AM most nights Soho is a nightclub franchise in China, but this one apparently is an "unofficial club."

title: Laoye Mountain ( 老爷山 )
content: Visit planning hint: Laoye Mountain ( 老爷山 ), Xiangyang Road South, Qiaotou Town, Datong County (大通县桥头镇向阳路南) ( Buses to Datong County depart from the Xinning Road Bus Station The park entrance is less than a kilometre from the Datong County Bus Station )

title: Qinghai Provincial Museum ( 青海省博物馆 )
content: Visit planning hint: Qinghai Provincial Museum ( 青海省博物馆 ), 58 Xiguan Street, Chengxi District (城西区西关大街58号) ( the nearest bus stop is Xining Square South (新宁广场南), which is served by bus routes 12, 18, 22, 29, 35, 38, 41, 102 and 506 The museum entrance is on the West side of the building

title: Qinghai Science and Technology Museum ( 青海省科学技术馆 )

title: Qinghai-Tibet Plateau Natural History Museum ( 青藏高原自然博物馆 )

title: Britain Bar
content: Planning hint: A British-themed bar, one of several Western-styled venues in central Xuzhou

title: Guishan Han Dynasty Tombs ( 龟山汉墓 ), No
content: Visit planning hint: These tombs contain the remains of Liu Zhu, the sixth ruler of the ancient principality of Chu, and his wife 3 Xiangwang Road North, Gulou District (鼓CNY 区襄王北路3号) ( take bus no

title: Huaihai Campaign Memorial Museum ( 淮海战役纪念馆 )
content: Visit planning hint: Huaihai Campaign Memorial Museum ( 淮海战役纪念馆 ), 2 Jiefang Road South, Quanshan District (泉山区解放南路2号) ( take bus nos A museum about the Huaihai Campaign, a major military campaign during the Chinese Civil War

title: Mausoleum of the Chu Prince ( 楚王陵 )
content: Visit planning hint: Mausoleum of the Chu Prince ( 楚王陵 ), 1 Bingmayong Road, Yunlong District (云龙区兵马俑路1号) ( take bus nos Believed to be the final resting place of Liu Wu, the third prince of the ancient principality of Chu

title: Xuzhou Aquarium ( 徐州水族展览馆 )
content: Visit planning hint: Xuzhou Aquarium ( 徐州水族展览馆 ), Huxin Island, Yunlong Lake, Quanshan District (徐州市泉山区云龙湖湖心岛) ( on an island in the middle of Yunlong Lake; the nearest bus stops are on the north side of the lake and include Jinfu Jiayuan 金府家园, Sports Centre 体育中心, and Fangnan Xiaoqu West Gate 纺南小区西门 ) It contains hundreds of different aquatic species from all around the world

title: Xuzhou Botanical Gardens ( 徐州植物园 )
content: Visit planning hint: It covers an area of around 400,000 square metres and includes hundreds of different species of plants and trees, as well as some manmade streams and waterfalls Xuzhou Botanical Gardens ( 徐州植物园 ), 3 Pingshan Road, Gulou District (鼓CNY 区平山路3号) ( catch bus nos

title: Yunlong Lake ( 云龙湖 )
content: Visit planning hint: Large scenic lake in the city's southwest

title: Birdwatching
content: Planning hint: The coast of Yancheng Prefecture has been listed as a natural world heritage site under the name "Migratory Bird Sanctuaries along the Coast of Yellow Sea-Bohai Gulf of China" Birdwatching Yancheng is renowned for its birdwatching opportunities, especially at the Yancheng National Rare Birds Nature Reserve

title: Coastal wetlands
content: Planning hint: Guided eco-tours are available, offering a chance to explore these unique environments and learn about local conservation efforts Coastal wetlands The coastal wetlands of Yancheng are some of the most ecologically diverse areas in China

title: Cycling and hiking
content: Planning hint: Cycling and hiking Yancheng's coastal parks and reserves offer excellent opportunities for cycling and hiking Dongtai Huanghai Forest Park and the nature reserves provide scenic trails for nature lovers

title: Dafeng Crab
content: Food planning hint: Dafeng Crab: Yancheng's coastal location makes it a great place for seafood The crabs from the Dafeng area are particularly prized for their sweet, delicate flavor

title: Saltwater Duck
content: Food planning hint: Saltwater Duck: A local specialty, this dish is prepared by marinating duck in a saltwater brine before roasting, resulting in tender, flavorful meat It is a must-try for visitors to Yancheng

title: Seafood Hotpot
content: Food planning hint: Seafood Hotpot: A popular dish in Yancheng, seafood hotpot features a rich broth filled with local seafood, vegetables, and spices It's perfect for a hearty meal, especially during the cooler months

title: Steamed Fish
content: Food planning hint: One popular preparation is steaming the fish with ginger and scallions, allowing the natural flavors of the fish to shine Steamed Fish: Freshwater and saltwater fish are commonly served in Yancheng

title: Budget hotels
content: Representative stay option: Budget hotels: For budget-conscious travelers, there are numerous affordable options, such as 7 Days Inn and Hanting Hotel, offering clean and convenient rooms

title: Eco-lodges
content: Representative stay option: Eco-lodges: Some eco-lodges near Yancheng's nature reserves offer a more immersive experience, allowing visitors to stay close to the natural landscapes and wildlife they've come to explore

title: Luxury hotels
content: Representative stay option: Luxury hotels: Yancheng has several high-end hotels, such as the Yancheng Marriott Hotel and DoubleTree by Hilton, which offer modern amenities and comfortable accommodations in central locations

title: Mid-range hotels
content: Representative stay option: Mid-range hotels: Options like the Holiday Inn Yancheng and Jinling Hotel provide affordable yet comfortable stays, with easy access to local attractions and dining options

title: Herbal Teas
content: Planning hint: Herbal Teas: Yancheng locals enjoy a variety of herbal teas, often made with local ingredients like chrysanthemum and goji berries These teas are refreshing and are believed to have health benefits

title: Rice Wine
content: Planning hint: Rice Wine: Try locally made rice wine, a traditional Chinese alcoholic beverage that is slightly sweet and often served warm It is especially popular during festive occasions

title: Yellow Sea Salt Beer
content: Planning hint: Yellow Sea Salt Beer: Some local breweries have started producing craft beers that incorporate sea salt from the nearby Yellow Sea, offering a unique twist on traditional brews

title: Salt production sites
content: Visit planning hint: Salt production sites Learn about the city's history of salt production by visiting local museums and historical sites You can also observe traditional salt-making techniques that have been passed down through generations

title: Hanlinyuan Museum
content: Visit planning hint: It is five stories deep, with different levels housing things like a warehouse, living quarters, and a coffin on wheels A magnificent tomb for Liu Xu, ruler of the Guangling Kingdom

title: Lu Shi Yan-shang Zhu-zhai
content: Visit planning hint: Lu Shi Yan-shang Zhu-zhai (卢氏 盐商 住宅) A lavishly furnished home with 100 rooms that belonged to a local salt merchant

title: Shi Kefa Memorial ( 史可法纪念馆 Shǐ Kěfǎ Jìniànguǎn ), 广储门外街24号
content: Visit planning hint: The memorial/temple honors a Ming general who refused to surrender the city to the Qing invaders in 1645 Shi Kefa Memorial ( 史可法纪念馆 Shǐ Kěfǎ Jìniànguǎn ), 广储门外街24号

title: Slender West Lake ( 瘦西湖 Shouxihu )
content: Visit planning hint: Several pavilions dot the park around the lake that was designed to mimic the west lake in Hangzhou Very slim lake winding through the park area just northwest of the city center

title: The Grand Canal
content: Visit planning hint: The old route of the Grand Canal runs along the southern and eastern edge of the historic center city The new Grand Canal, with a continuous stream of cargo boats and barges, is a few kilometer east of city center, and is accessible by city bus

title: Yangzhou Museum ( 扬州博物馆; Yángzhōu Bówùguǎn )
content: Visit planning hint: The museum used to be housed in Tianning Temple downtown (see above), but now it is on the west side, in a new purpose-built building, known as the "Double Museum" ( Shuang Bowuguan ) The Yangzhou Museum has splendid displays of things like a boat salvaged from the Grand Canal that crosses through eastern China

title: Chinese Drunken Chicken
content: Food planning hint: Yantai Huadiao Drunken Chicken is a signature dish from Shandong A must-try local delicacy

title: Juxiangyuan Casserole , No.7 Huamao Street
content: Food planning hint: It specializes in casserole, a dish with soup cooked in the clay pot Juxiangyuan Casserole , No.7 Huamao Street

title: Penglaichun Restaurant , No.13 Dingxi Rd
content: Food planning hint: It is a time-honored restaurant and specializes in cooking seafood The Quanjiafu (Hotchpotch), soft-fried oyster and scrambled eggs with agarics are particularly good

title: Shunshui-renqing , No.34 Haibin Rd
content: Food planning hint: Quite good environment as it is near the Golden Beach Shunshui-renqing , No.34 Haibin Rd

title: Xile Restaurant , No.52 Huanshan Rd
content: Food planning hint: Menu items that are particularly good include the fish dumplings, garlic-style scallop, and fried leek dumplings Recommended for its food but its service and environment are not so good

title: Yantai Impression , Near No
content: Food planning hint: It captures the essence of coastal culinary traditions, offering classics like Braised Sea Cucumber with Scallions, Oil-Stewed Prawns, Sweet and Sour Carp, and the local favorite Yantai Fried Starch Jelly Yantai Impressions is a renowned restaurant specializing in authentic Shandong cuisine

title: Baby Face Club
content: Planning hint: Baby Face Club has loud house music, laser lights galore, poor bar service, cover charge and cross dressing bartenders It's downtown, and the only real clubbing experience Yantai offers

title: Druid's Irish Pub & Restaurant
content: Planning hint: With Guinness, Kilkenny, Magners Irish Cider, Strongbow, Stella Artois and Heineken on tap, good Irish music and soft rock, genuine wood interior, satellite tv, pool room, library with wireless internet, it is the place to go Has a great Western Restaurant downstairs as well

title: Havana bar
content: Planning hint: It's midway down Chaoyang street, plays good western music and has a fantastic atmosphere after midnight if you want to dance (again, western staff)

title: Nanshan Park ( 南山公园 ), No
content: Visit planning hint: Covering an area of over 2,000 acres, it features a temperate monsoon climate and consists of five major sections: the park area, the flower area, the zoo, the forest area, and the children's playground ( Nanshan Park ( 南山公园 ), No

title: Yantai Hill Park ( 烟台山公园 )
content: Visit planning hint: Surrounding the hill are several historical buildings including the former consulates of the UK, the US, Japan and Denmark, which date from the 19th century Yantai Hill Park ( 烟台山公园 ), 7 Lixin Road, Zhifu District (芝罘区历新路7号) ( take bus no

content: Visit planning hint: Yantai Museum ( 烟台市博物馆 ), 61 Nanda St, Zhifu District (芝罘区南大街61号) ( take bus no May-Oct: 09:00-17:00, Nov-Apr: 09:00-16:30, no entry in last 30 minutes, closed on Mondays

title: Yantai Natural History Museum ( 烟台自然博物馆 )
content: Visit planning hint: Yantai Natural History Museum ( 烟台自然博物馆 ), 2001 Binhai Middle Road, Laishan District (莱山区滨海中路2001号) ( Take bus no Get off at the Geological Museum (地质博物馆) bus stop )

title: Bungie Jump , Besides the Three Visitors Cave ( Xialaoxi Bridge )
content: Planning hint: You can bungie jump near the Three Visitors Cave, though not recommended as the construction looks really old and badly maintained Bungie Jump , Besides the Three Visitors Cave ( Xialaoxi Bridge )

title: Orient Royal Cruise ( 东方皇家旅游船; Dōngfānghuángjiā Lǚyóuchuán )
content: Planning hint: Rates at homepage start at $760 for East King (plus $70 for shore excursions) and $1,400 for Yangzi Explorer Orient Royal Cruise ( 东方皇家旅游船; Dōngfānghuángjiā Lǚyóuchuán )

title: Fang Weng Restaurant ( 放翁酒家 )
content: Food planning hint: Built in the three you cave cliff landscape restaurant, see the opposite bungee entertainment live broadcast, do is Yichang food, the white soup fat fish here is very delicious, but the Fang Weng Restaurant ( 放翁酒家 ), Three Gorges Culture World, 169 Xiling District

title: Fareli steak Yichang flagship store ( 法来利牛排宜昌旗舰店 )
content: Food planning hint: Fareli steak Yichang flagship store ( 法来利牛排宜昌旗舰店 ), Xiling District Yiling Avenue Gezhou bar hotel It's a western restaurant that specializes in steak

title: Fu Chu Restaurant ( 福厨餐厅 ), No
content: Food planning hint: Fu Chu restaurant provides local authentic Hubei dishes, spicy taste, chopped chili fish head, sour spicy fern root powder, stew chicken soup, etc., are very good, in the local group can buy vouchers, the Fu Chu Restaurant ( 福厨餐厅 ), No

title: Shunda food City ( 顺达美食城 )
content: Food planning hint: Shunda food City ( 顺达美食城 ), Liujiahe Taiping Stream This is a food collection shop with a wide variety of food

title: The fish ( 那个鱼 )
content: Food planning hint: The specialty of this shop is fish The fish ( 那个鱼 ), Xiling District 23, 190 meters northeast

title: Xiao Dongtian Restaurant ( 小洞天酒CNY )
content: Food planning hint: Xiao Dongtian Restaurant ( 小洞天酒CNY ), Yiling District Jiangxia Avenue Jiangxia Avenue 14 community food city 1 floor A nice typical Chinese restaurant with a full range and friendly staff that is clean and well maintained

title: Peng guihua cold shrimp
content: Planning hint: Pengguihua features osmanthus sugar as its main flavor, which is also very popular with the people of Yichang and is worth trying Peng guihua cold shrimp , Three Gorges Culture World, 169 Xiling District

title: Changbanpo ( 长坂坡 )
content: Visit planning hint: Changbanpo ( 长坂坡 ), 86 Changban Road, Dangyang (当阳市长坂路86号) ( Take a long-distance bus to Dangyang, then walk or catch a taxi Site of the Battle of Changba, a famous battle that took place between the warlords Cao Cao and Liu Bei in 208 A.D

title: Three Visitors Cave and Park ( 三游洞风景区 )
content: Visit planning hint: The surrounding park has a view of the Yangze River as well as some old military defense walls, Sino-Japanese war memorial stones, a river viewing pavilion and some ancient city remains The walk around the park has lots of steps and is a pretty decent, good relaxing spot

title: Tribe of the Three Gorges ( 三峡人家，三峡村 Three Gorges Village )
content: Visit planning hint: Tribe of the Three Gorges ( 三峡人家，三峡村 Three Gorges Village ), Shipai Village, Sandou Town, Yiling District (夷陵区三斗坪镇石牌村) ( On the edge of Xiling Gorge, about 40km west of downtown Yichang Has an amazing view of the river

title: Yichang Museum ( 宜昌博物馆 )
content: Visit planning hint: Yichang Museum ( 宜昌博物馆 ), Bailin River Road, Wujiagang District (伍家岗区柏临河路) ( Bus routes b313 and b343 ) 09:00-16:30, no entry after 16:00, closed on Mondays

title: Yuquan Temple ( 玉泉寺 )
content: Visit planning hint: Yuquan Temple ( 玉泉寺 ), County Highway 230, Yuquan Village, Dangyang (当阳市玉泉村230县道) ( About 80km by road from downtown Yichang and about 15km west of Dangyang Take a long-distance bus to Dangyang (当阳) and ask the driver to drop you off at the Yuquan Temple Intersection (玉泉寺路口)

title: Hiking
content: Planning hint: In principle, there is a trail from Suyukou to the rock art area, although it is still closed due to flood damage as of fall 2018 Aside from the trails mentioned above under Helanshan Suyukou, other parts of the mountain offer hiking

title: The city
content: Planning hint: The best thing in Yinchuan is the people and the Hui neighbourhoods, so the best option is just to take a bus in any direction and getting down in a street market or in a park It is also recommended to go to the main square in the night where there are dances and games

title: Napoli Italian Cuisine
content: Food planning hint: Though it is well marketed the food in Napoli generally does not appeal to foreigners If you are looking for something to remind you of home, you are better off finding an alternative

title: UBC Coffee House ( Shangdao Kafeiting ), 84 Zhongshan North Street
content: Food planning hint: UBC Coffee House ( Shangdao Kafeiting ), 84 Zhongshan North Street For when you need a Western food break

title: Baby Face
content: Planning hint: Popular club featuring dancers and a very impressive layout Booths and box seats have a higher minimum purchase

title: Bob and Leo's BBQ , beijing luo ( 新城大众巷10号（新城电影院东侧的巷子向北100米）胖哥俩烤吧 )
content: Planning hint: Bob and Leo (chubby and happy twins) have some of the best BBQ chicken in Yinchuan, if not China It is an outdoor grill with great selections of mutton and fish as well as a selection of vegetables

title: Come Back
content: Planning hint: Although traditional western coffee is hard to come by, this drink chain (which can be found almost everywhere in Yinchuan) sells their version of a coffee drink that can be served hot or cold While it is still not western style coffee, it is quite good, somewhat similar to Starbucks' caramel macchiato

title: Fall in Love Bar & Marry Bar , Hubin East Street ( near all the main hotels )
content: Planning hint: Fall in Love Bar & Marry Bar , Hubin East Street ( near all the main hotels ) Comfortable seating and a younger crowd, you can sit back with any of the local beers and relax

title: The King Divine Luck Club ( Kadilong )
content: Planning hint: Popular club featuring dancers and a very impressive layout Booths and box seats have a higher minimum purchase

title: 108 Dagobas (stupas)
content: Visit planning hint: Ranging in height from 2.5 to 3.5 meters, fashioned in three shapes (pyramid, gourd and vase), and arranged on a rising mountain slope in rows of increasing odd numbers to for a colossal triangle 108 Dagobas (stupas) , Qingtongxia (青铜峡; Qīngtóngxiá ) ( 80 km south of Yinchuan, it can be reached by bus )

title: Haibao Pagoda ( 海宝塔
content: Visit planning hint: Haibao Pagoda ( 海宝塔, 北塔, North Pagoda ), Minzu Street North, Xingqing District (兴庆区民族北街路) ( in the north of the Old Town; bus routes 4, 30, 58 and 311 ) Part of the Haibao Pagoda Temple (海宝塔寺)

title: Ningxia Museum of Science and Technology ( 宁夏科技馆 )
content: Visit planning hint: Ningxia Museum of Science and Technology ( 宁夏科技馆 ), Intersection of Renmin Square Street West and Shanghai Street West, Jinfeng District (金凤区人民广场西街与上海西路交叉口) ( Bus routes 1, 2, 13, 33, 38, 301 and

title: Xixia Wangling National Park ( 西夏王陵国家公园
content: Visit planning hint: Xixia Wangling National Park ( 西夏王陵国家公园, Xīxià Wánglíng Guójiā Gōngyuán ) ( buses leave Xinyue tourist bus terminal around 08:00-09:00, pass near Yinchuan Station about 30-40 minutes later (on Beijing Road), and arrive about half an hour after that; tThey return around 13:00-14:00; CNY 8 each way ) There are 193 tombs of high officials of the Xia Kingdom, with the three largest (5 km apart) highlighted
