title: Tianzi Mountain . 08:00-16:00 . Famous attractions
content: Planning hint: Famous attractions: Tianzi Peak, Tianzi Cave

title: Wulongzhai
content: Planning hint: Wulongzhai, formerly known as "Black Dragon", is a newly developed attraction in Yangjiajie, which is only 20% developed in Yangjiajie The original name of Wulongzhai is "Black Dragon Walled City", which used to be a place where bandits lived

title: Yangjiajie . 08:30-16:00 . Famous attractions
content: Planning hint: Famous attractions: the world's first wonder waterfall Longquan Waterfall

title: Yuanjiajie . 07:00-18:00 . Famous attractions
content: Planning hint: Famous attractions: the first bridge under the sky

title: Hushifu restaurant
content: Food planning hint: The signature three-time pot is the most powerful and cost-effective.However, it is not suitable for those who like light flavors The popularity is very strong, and the ingredients are also abundant

title: Yinmandou restaurant
content: Food planning hint: The classic dishes are sauerkraut beef and spicy roasted yellow beef, but Sanxiaguo is also delicious: although it is a small shop, the taste is really good, the

title: Grand Hotel Zhangjiajie
content: Best used as a stay area because Grand Hotel Zhangjiajie , North of Dayong Bridge Park, Ziwu West Road, Yongding District

title: Maoyanhejiutiandong
content: Visit planning hint: Zhangjiajie Maoyan River Jiutian Cave AAAA Tourist Scenic Spot, starting from Jiutian Cave in Sangzhi County in the west, passing through Kuzhu Village, a thousand-year-old town, to Kuzhu River Grand Canyon known as the mysterious canyon and Maoyan River drifting known as Baili Gallery The Jade Emperor Grottoes, a group of grottoes ending in the south, are more than 100 km long

title: Tujiafengqingyuan
content: Visit planning hint: It is a large-scale comprehensive tourism service enterprise integrating cultural and natural landscapes, integrating tourism, cultural performances, rare exhibitions, accommodation, catering, entertainment and shopping The transportation is very convenient, only ten minutes' drive from the airport and railway station

title: Zhangjiajie Museum ( 张家界市博物馆 )
content: Visit planning hint: Zhangjiajie Museum ( 张家界市博物馆 ), Intersection of Dayong Road and Ziwu Road, Yongding District (永定区大庸路与子午路交叉口) ( bus nos 1A, 1B, 2, 11, 15, 101, and 102; the Bamenxi-City (八门溪-市内) and Maoxi-City (茅溪-市内) buses also stop here )

title: Century Fun Park ( 郑州世纪欢乐园 )
content: Planning hint: Century Fun Park ( 郑州世纪欢乐园 ), 1 Shihua Road, Guancheng Hui District (管城回族区石化路1号) ( 20-30 minutes away from Er Qi Square; about 1.4 km north of Qili River Station on Metro Line 5; bus routes 321, b15, s126, and s163 ) Be aware most rides have a 90-kg limit for anyone using them, sometimes staff can be strict and refuse to let you ride even after you have paid to get in

title: Zhengzhou Fonte Happy World
content: Planning hint: Zhengzhou Fonte Happy World , People's humanities road ( intersection of Zhengkai Avenue and Humanities Road ) This is a cultural and technological theme park featuring science fiction and interactive experience

title: Cibo Coffee , Jinsan Road
content: Food planning hint: You can order Chinese food by the plate or Western food like steak in set meals with many courses Each plate is a small portion but overall the set meals are a great deal, for CNY 75-200 you get many plates of very good food

title: Crowne Plaza
content: Food planning hint: A good place for Western cuisine with an Italian restaurant and a Western-style pub It offers a buffet during dinner including Brazilian Rodizio and a dessert bar

title: New Island Coffee
content: Food planning hint: Serves a plethora of dishes including waffles and fajita-style meat plate alongside a smattering of coffee and desserts and has several locations throughout Zhengzhou

title: Night market in Erqi (February 7) Square
content: Food planning hint: Night market in Erqi (February 7) Square A good place for a snack and scenery

title: Tudali ( near the corner of Wenhua Road and Huanghe Road )
content: Food planning hint: Tudali ( near the corner of Wenhua Road and Huanghe Road ) If you have an affinity for soju, this is the place for you

title: Erqi Hotel ( in the main square )
content: Representative stay option: Full service rooms are about CNY 250, budget rooms with shared bathroom for CNY 150 (can be hard to get) Erqi Hotel ( in the main square )

title: Guangzhou Hotel , Erqi Road ( Near the corner of Jinshui Road )
content: Representative stay option: Guangzhou Hotel , Erqi Road ( Near the corner of Jinshui Road ) Caters to business travelers

title: Home Hotel
content: Representative stay option: Their rooms are clean and have a style that invokes a SoHo loft more than a Chinese hotel Chain of business hotels scattered about the city

title: Jinjiang Inn , 92 Hongqilu
content: Representative stay option: Double rooms have one large and one standard bed Jinjiang Inn , 92 Hongqilu

title: Londoo Hotel , Erqi Street ( close to Erqi Square )
content: Representative stay option: Massive Chinese-style business hotel with well-worn carpets and paper-thin walls, but otherwise functional Londoo Hotel , Erqi Street ( close to Erqi Square )

title: Sheraton Grand Zhengzhou Hotel
content: Best used as a stay area because Sheraton Grand Zhengzhou Hotel , No.33 Jinshui East Road, Zhengdong New District ( Nongye South Road (Zhengzhou Metro Line 1), Exit 3 ) The rooms are well appointed, and the buffet breakfast spread has good reports

title: Bird Bar , On Jing Qi Lu, a ways off Jinshui Lu, the main road
content: Planning hint: Bird Bar , On Jing Qi Lu, a ways off Jinshui Lu, the main road A small bar on Jing qi Lu

title: Helen's , Just north of Target across the street
content: Planning hint: Helen's , Just north of Target across the street CNY 6 Tsingtao for foreigners, popular

title: Tao Bar , Near the corner of Jinshui Lu and Jingqi Lu
content: Planning hint: Tao Bar , Near the corner of Jinshui Lu and Jingqi Lu A lively new bar opened near the corner Jinshui Lu and Jing Qi Lu

title: Western Pub , Nongye Road ( to the right of the Henan Provincial Museum )
content: Planning hint: Unless you understand Chinese, it will be mostly incomprehensible, yet the experience will give you insight into Chinese drinking culture For an unusual drinking experience, consider this pub, located in a bunker-like concrete building

title: Er Qi (February 7) Memorial Tower ( 二七纪念塔 )
content: Visit planning hint: Museum inside a rather garish double pagoda that looms over February 7 Square Er Qi (February 7) Memorial Tower ( 二七纪念塔 ), Er Qi Square, 230 Er Qi Road, Er Qi District (二七区二七路230号二七广场) ( just outside Er Qi Square Station on Metro Line 1 )

title: Henan Geological Museum ( 河南省地质博物馆 )
content: Visit planning hint: Henan Geological Museum ( 河南省地质博物馆 ), 18 Jinshui East Road, Zhengdong New District (郑东新区金水东路18) ( just outside the western exits of Nongye South Road on Metro Line 1; bus routes 43, 47, 115, 186, b38, k901, k902, s131 and y Contains rock specimens, and many fossils, including dinosaur fossils

title: Henan Museum of Science and Technology ( 河南省科学技术馆 )
content: Visit planning hint: Henan Museum of Science and Technology ( 河南省科学技术馆 ), Northeast side of intersection of Zhengkai Avenue and Yangqiao Avenue, Zhongmu County (中牟县郑开大道与杨桥大道交叉口东北侧) ( the easiest way to get here is probably to get bus no One of the largest science and technology museums in China

title: Henan · Drama Fantasy City ( 只有河南·戏剧幻城 )
content: Visit planning hint: Through immersive theater, it tells stories about land, grain, and cultural heritage, while the three main theaters showcase Henan's history and local culture, offering visitors an engaging, first-hand experience Henan · Drama Fantasy City ( 只有河南·戏剧幻城 ), Northwest corner of Ping'an Avenue and Guangxin Street intersection, Dameng Subdistrict

title: Zhengzhou Confucius Temple ( 郑州文庙 )
content: Visit planning hint: Zhengzhou Confucius Temple ( 郑州文庙 ), 301 Dongda Street, Guancheng Hui District (管城回族区东大街301号) ( near the metro station of the same name on Line 3 ) he first temple was built here in the first century AD, but it has been rebuilt several times due to being repeatedly destroyed by wars and fires

title: Zhongyuan Tower ( Fu Tower
content: Visit planning hint: This 388-metre high tower is the 10th tallest tower in the world and has great views of the city Zhongyuan Tower ( Fu Tower, 中原福塔 ), 1206 Hanghai East Road, Guancheng Hui District (管城回族区航海东路1206号) ( Zhongyuan Tower Station, Metro Line 5 )

title: Chengjiao line is a suburban metro line
content: Transfer hub hint: Chengjiao line is a suburban metro line, starting from Nansihuan in Guancheng and ending in Zhengzhou Xinzheng International Airport The southern extension of Chengjiao line to Zhengzhou South Railway Station is expected to

title: Line 1 runs east-west that connects Zhengzhou Station
content: District movement hint: Line 1 runs east-west that connects Zhengzhou Station, Zhengzhou East Station and a few other points of interest

title: Line 3 is an L-shaped line connecting the northwest with the southeast
content: Transfer hub hint: It runs south from the Henan Sports Center in the southern part of Huiji District and then turns east after reaching Erqi Square before eventually reaching Henan Orthopaedics Hospital in Guancheng District Line 3 is an L-shaped line connecting the northwest with the southeast

title: Line 4 is another L-shaped line running from northwest to southeast
content: Transfer hub hint: It begins at Laoyachen in Huiji District, intersects with Line 3 at the Henan Sports Center, then continues east until it reaches Dragon Lake, whereupon it turns south and heads toward Langzhuang in central Guancheng Line 4 is another L-shaped line running from northwest to southeast

title: Beigushan Park ( 北固山公园 ) ( on the north side of Zhenjiang )
content: Visit planning hint: Beigushan Park ( 北固山公园 ) ( on the north side of Zhenjiang ) The park is surrounded by great landscaping and the Yangtze River

title: China Vinegar Culture Museum ( 中国镇江醋文化博物馆 ), No
content: Visit planning hint: A museum dedicated to the history of Chinese vinegar culture, spanning an area of 4,000 square meters, offers free indoor WiFi China Vinegar Culture Museum ( 中国镇江醋文化博物馆 ), No

title: Jinshan Park ( 金山公园 )
content: Visit planning hint: The Buddhist temple complex and a large lake (complete with paddle boats available for rent) form the majority of the park It's on the northwest side of Zhenjiang and includes a Buddhist monastery and another large pagoda

title: Maoshan Mountain ( 句容茅山景区 )
content: Visit planning hint: Maoshan Mountain ( 句容茅山景区 ), 26 km southeast of Jurong City, Zhenjiang ( departing from Jurong Bus Terminal can reach ) toll-free It is not only a Taoist holy site but also one of the bases during the Anti-Japanese War

title: Zhenjiang Museum ( 镇江博物馆 ), 85 Boxian Road (伯先路85号) ( Take bus no
content: Visit planning hint: Zhenjiang Museum ( 镇江博物馆 ), 85 Boxian Road (伯先路85号) ( Take bus no Tu-Su 09:00-17:00, closed on Mondays

title: Chung Shan Hot Spring Golf Club ( 中山温泉高尔夫球会 )
content: Planning hint: Chung Shan Hot Spring Golf Club ( 中山温泉高尔夫球会 ), Sanxiang Town (三乡镇) ( most visitors would probably come here by taxi; if you prefer to take a bus, take bus nos 211 or 213 and get off at the Yongmo (雍陌) bus stop ) Features two 18-hole golf courses designed by American golf champions Arnold Palmer and Jack Nicklaus

title: Qi River Cruises ( 岐江游船 )
content: Planning hint: Qi River Cruises ( 岐江游船 ), Qi River Cruise Boat Pier, Qi River Park, West District (中山市西区岐江公园内岐江游码头) ( catch a bus to Fuhua Hotel (富华酒店), Zhongshan No 1 Bridge (中山一桥) or Zhongken Department Store (中恳百货) )

title: Zhongshan Culture & Art Center ( 中山市文化艺术中心 )
content: Planning hint: Zhongshan Culture & Art Center ( 中山市文化艺术中心 ), 73 Xingzhong Avenue, East District (中山市东区兴中道73号) ( take bus no 030, 035 or 036 and alight at the Culture & Art Center bus stop; or catch bus no

title: Zhongshan Hot Spring Resort ( 中山温泉宾馆 )
content: Planning hint: Zhongshan Hot Spring Resort ( 中山温泉宾馆 ), Sanxiang Town (三乡镇) ( take bus nos 211 or 213 and get off at the Yongmo (雍陌) bus stop )

title: Zhongshan Sky Wheel ( 幻彩摩天轮 )
content: Planning hint: Zhongshan Sky Wheel ( 幻彩摩天轮 ), Level 5, Block C, Central Power Plaza, 9 Fengming Road, Shiqi District (石歧区凤鸣路9号兴中广场C座5CNY ) ( the closest bus stop is the Central Power Plaza (兴中广场) bus stop, which is served by bus nos Perhaps due to its central location, the Zhongshan Sky Wheel is often considered to be one of the city's most important landmarks

title: Bellavista Restaurant
content: Food planning hint: Bellavista Restaurant , Unit 3, Borough 1, 39 Qiguan West Road (岐关西路39号，一区，3卡) German and Italian (Peter), Thai (Toffee), and Indian (Johnny)

title: Hefeng Japanese Restaurant ( 和风日本料理 )
content: Food planning hint: 015, 038 or 042 and get off at the Zhongshan People's Congress (市人大); the restaurant is easily recognizable by its distinctly Japanese features ) Hefeng Japanese Restaurant ( 和风日本料理 ), 2 Fukang Road, Shiqi District 富康路2号 ( take bus no

title: Yihe Grand Hotel
content: Best used as a stay area because Yihe Grand Hotel , Zhongshan No.5, Xingzhong Avenue, Shiqi District (中山市石岐区兴中道5号)

title: New Bar Street , Qiguan West Road ( near Peter's Place )
content: Planning hint: New Bar Street , Qiguan West Road ( near Peter's Place ) A whole complex of clubs and bars, including iClub and Fashion Club

title: Peter's Place , Qiquan West Road ( next to Wei Jing Wan )
content: Planning hint: On Saturdays they do a buffet for CNY 88, of which the best offerings are the Indian and Thai curries and the BBQ Peter's Place , Qiquan West Road ( next to Wei Jing Wan )

title: See Club ( next to Zhongshan International Hotel )
content: Planning hint: See Club ( next to Zhongshan International Hotel ) Biggest and most vibrant night club in Zhongshan

title: Qi River Park ( 岐江公园
content: Visit planning hint: Qi River Park ( 岐江公园, Qijiang Park ), Intersection of Zhongshan Yi Road and Xidi Road, West District (西区中山一路与西堤路交叉口) ( on the west bank of the Qi River, a short distance south of the Qi River Bridge; bus routes 12, 024, 047, 211, 216, and b10 ) The Zhongshan Museum of Art (listed above) can be found in the middle of the park

title: Sun Yat-sen Memorial Hall ( 孙中山纪念堂 )
content: Visit planning hint: Not to be confused with the Sun Yat-sen Memorial Museum (listed below) Sun Yat-sen Memorial Hall ( 孙中山纪念堂 ) Sun Wen Middle Road (孙文中路188-192号) ( bus routes 001, 002, 005, 009, 021, 050 and 209 )

title: Zhongshan Cartoon Museum ( 中山漫画馆 )
content: Visit planning hint: Zhongshan Cartoon Museum ( 中山漫画馆 ), Inside Yixian Lake Park, Hubin Road, Shiqi District (中山市石岐区湖滨路 逸仙湖公园内) ( bus routes 005, 018, 021, 032, 035 and 209.; the museum is on the northern side of the lake ) This museum displays some of their works, as well as works by cartoonists from other parts of China

title: Zhongshan Museum ( 中山市博物馆 )
content: Visit planning hint: Zhongshan Museum ( 中山市博物馆 ), 197 Sunwen Middle Road, Shiqi District, Zhongshan (中山市石岐区孙文中路197号) ( nearby bus stops include Fengyuan Road (逢源路), Gongchen Road (拱辰路) and Sun-Yat-sen Memorial Hall (中山纪念堂); take bus no This museum, which is housed in a 1930s hospital building, is mainly used for hosting temporary exhibitions

title: Zhongshan Museum of Art ( 中山美术馆 )
content: Visit planning hint: Zhongshan Museum of Art ( 中山美术馆 ), Qi River Park, West District, Zhongshan (中山市西区岐江公园内) ( the museumis in the middle of the park; bus routes 12, 024, 047, 211, 216, and b A small art museum focused on displaying works by local artists

title: China International Aviation & Aerospace Exhibition ( 中国国际航空航天博览会 )
content: Planning hint: Held every two years, it's the biggest airshow in China, attracting thousands of people and companies around the world including well-known Boeing, Airbus and Ilyushin China International Aviation & Aerospace Exhibition ( 中国国际航空航天博览会 ) ( near Zhuhai Airport )

title: Golden Gulf Golf Club ( 金湾高尔夫俱乐部 )
content: Planning hint: Golden Gulf Golf Club ( 金湾高尔夫俱乐部 ), 2000 Jinwan Avenue, Jinwan District (金湾区金湾大道 There is a bus stop just outside the golf club, which is served by bus routes 201, 207, 504, 801 and z Features a 27-hole golf course designed by Scottish golf champion Colin Montgomerie

title: Imperial Yuwenquan Hot Springs ( 御温泉 )
content: Planning hint: Imperial Yuwenquan Hot Springs ( 御温泉 ), Huangyang Avenue West (黄杨大道西) ( In Doumen District, take bus 609 ) From Gongbei it takes about two hours to get to there by bus, or an hour and ~CNY 130 one-way by taxi

title: Lost City ( 梦幻水城 )
content: Planning hint: Features numerous water slides, an 800-metre long lazy river, a 3000-square metre wave pool, and various other water-based amusements September 3rd to October 7th: 11:00-18:00 (weekdays), 10:00-18:30 (weekends and public holidays)

title: Zhuhai Opera House ( 珠海大剧院 )
content: Planning hint: Zhuhai Opera House ( 珠海大剧院 ), 129 Yuwan Road, Yeli Island (野狸岛渔湾路129号) ( The nearest bus stop is Riyuebei (日月贝), which is served by Bus No.Z11 only A shell-like theater which made itself a new symbol of Zhuhai

title: Azur Restaurant ( 中蓝海西餐厅 )
content: Food planning hint: Azur Restaurant ( 中蓝海西餐厅 ), Shop 1-04, Building 9, Midtown, 2055 Jiuzhou Avenue West, Xiangzhou District (香洲区九州大道西2055号富华里9栋1-04室) ( Buses that stop outside the Midtown (富华里) commercial complex include routes, 1, 14, 25, 30, 60, 202, 603, 605 609, 826-2, 992, b2, b7, b8, k6, k7 and k9 The menu is quite small and constantly changes according to seasons and what's freshly available on the market

title: Jenny's Cafe ( 简一咖啡 )
content: Food planning hint: A neat, cozy, jazz infused cafe serving mostly Chinese food but with an extensive and reasonably priced drinks menu that includes coffee, tea and some alcoholic drinks Jenny's Cafe ( 简一咖啡 ), 10 Haibin Road North, Xiangzhou District (香洲区海滨北路10号) ( Bus 69 one stop past Jusco, it is on the right side of the road, just past the Cinema/Great Hall of Zhuai

title: Jinding Barbeque ( On Jinding's main street, can be reached via bus 10 or 3 )
content: Food planning hint: Steam rises, motorcycles whiz by, and music blares from shops as dozens of proprietary stands serve up street specialties (such as spicy grilled squid tentacles) well into the night to a lively crowd seated at plastic tables and chairs The BBQ is over 100 meters long, with scores of proprietary stalls and tables (who vigorously compete against one another)

title: Macanese Vegetarian Buffet ( 澳门发嫂养生磨房 )
content: Food planning hint: Macanese Vegetarian Buffet ( 澳门发嫂养生磨房 ), 2A, Level 2, Laimeili Women's World, Xiangzhou District (香洲区来魅力女人世界2CNY 2A) ( Level 2A, in the Laimeili Women's World (魅力女人世界) building southeast and diagonally opposite Bank of China on walking street Buddhist vegetarian restaurant offering unlimited all you can eat vegetarian buffet including everything from cooked vegetarian Chinese dishes through cakes and pastries, cold dishes, noodle bar, fresh fruit, fresh real fruit juices, various teas, various soups, even vegetarian pizza!

title: May Flower Restaurant ( 皇朝五月花大酒CNY ; Huángcháo Wǔyuèhuā Dàjiǔlóu )
content: Food planning hint: May Flower Restaurant ( 皇朝五月花大酒CNY ; Huángcháo Wǔyuèhuā Dàjiǔlóu ), 3F, Ridong Square, 49 Qinglü Middle Road, Xiangzhou District (香洲区情侣中路49号日东广场3CNY ; Xiāngzhōuqū Qínglǚzhōnglù Rìdōngguǎngchǎng) This is not the kind of place to come if you like to pick things off a menu, but if you are willing to select your food while it is still swimming, it is a great choice

title: ( On Walking Street near the food stands closer to the Macau border
content: Planning hint: ( On Walking Street near the food stands closer to the Macau border, look for the escalator going down from the street ) Disco with lots of action

title: Casa Pepe ( Casa pepe安福会艺术餐厅 )
content: Planning hint: Casa Pepe ( Casa pepe安福会艺术餐厅 ) Shuiwan Road, Xiangzhou District (香洲区水湾路215-217号) ( The nearest bus stop is Yinhai Xincun (银海新村), which is served by bus no Quiet place where you can sip red wine and have some fine dining

title: Cohiba ( 西洋会·葡国烧烤西餐·酒吧
content: Planning hint: Cohiba ( 西洋会·葡国烧烤西餐·酒吧, Xi Yang Hui ) Shuiwan Road (香洲区水湾路203-209号) ( The nearest bus stop is Rihua Huayuan (日华花园), which is served by bus nos Older crowd with quiet outdoor seating and fireplace outside

title: La Bohemia ( 桂缘葡国餐厅 )
content: Planning hint: Aside from the hugely popular Friday night Latin dance parties, La Bohemia offers excellent Portuguese food, Mediterranean food and Asian dishes, as well as a large selection of fine wines and cocktails La Bohemia ( 桂缘葡国餐厅 ), Level 1, Haiwan Haoyuan, 225 Shuiwan Road, Xiangzhou District (香洲区水湾路225号海湾豪苑1CNY ) ( The first bar / restaurant on Bar Street when coming from the North East

title: Sea & Sand ( 海沙吧 )
content: Planning hint: Sea & Sand ( 海沙吧 ), Shop E16, 3 Huaping, Road, Xiawan, Xiangzhou District (香洲区夏湾华平路3号E16号铺) ( The nearest bus stop is Guoshou Dasha (国寿大厦), which is served by bus nos Small karaoke lounge with private rooms on 2nd floor

title: Xing Ge Hui Discount KTV ( 星歌会量贩式KTV )
content: Planning hint: Xing Ge Hui Discount KTV ( 星歌会量贩式KTV ), Level 1, West Wing Podium Building, 2 Jida Road, Xiangzhou District (香洲区吉大路2号国会西侧裙CNY 一CNY ) ( The nearest bus stop is Junyi Huayuan (君怡花园), which is served by bus nos

title: Chimelong Ocean Kingdom ( 长隆海洋王国 )
content: Visit planning hint: There are also dedicated bus services from Zhuhai Airport, the Zhuhai Railway Station and the Jiuzhou Ferry Terminal, as well as from hotels owned by the Chimelong Group ), toll-free Chimelong Ocean Kingdom ( 长隆海洋王国 ), Fuxiang Bay, Hengqin (横琴新区富祥湾) ( The park is served by a number of public bus routes, including routes 14, 86, K10 and K11

title: Former residence of Su Zhaozheng ( 苏兆征故居 Sū Zhàozhēng Gùjū )
content: Visit planning hint: Don't miss the wall made of oyster shells and the various other well-preserved historic houses and structures in the neighborhood, including some old temples The home has been turned into a museum with exhibits about the history of the area, Su's life, and his role in a major strike in Hong Kong

title: Guyuan Museum of Art ( 古元美术馆 Gǔyuán měishùguǎn )
content: Visit planning hint: Guyuan Museum of Art ( 古元美术馆 Gǔyuán měishùguǎn ), 388 Meihua East Road (梅华东路388号) ( There is a bus stop named after this museum A museum displaying works by local artist Gu Yuan

title: Martyrs Cemetery ( 烈士陵园 Lièshì Língyuán )
content: Visit planning hint: Martyrs Cemetery ( 烈士陵园 Lièshì Língyuán ), 1149 Fenghuang Road (凤凰路1149号) ( The nearest bus stop is Baihuogongsi (百货公司), which is an important bus stop in Zhuhai It was transformed to a quiet place for citizens and tourists to relax and pay homage in the busy centre of the city now

title: Zhuhai Museum ( 珠海市博物馆 Zhūhǎi shì bówùguǎn )
content: Visit planning hint: Zhuhai Museum ( 珠海市博物馆 Zhūhǎi shì bówùguǎn ), 191 Jingshan Road, Jida (吉大景山路191号) ( The nearest bus stop is Jiuzhoucheng (九洲城), which is served by over twenty bus routes ) The museum also hosts travelling exhibitions from other parts of China

title: Hebao Island Wharf ( 荷包岛码头 )
content: Transfer hub hint: Hebao Island Wharf ( 荷包岛码头 ), Huandao Road West, Nanshui Town, Jinwan District (金湾区南水镇环岛西路) ( The bus stop near the wharf is served only by bus no 605 from the Xiangzhou Long Distance Bus Station and get off at Zhuhai Port (珠海港) where the bus terminates
